### **[Want more unfiltered conversations with leaders like Allison Gill? Become a paid subscriber to support Endless Urgency](https://substack.com/redirect/7dcdf9d0-4d2a-41ec-9371-ca610ac8b322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 👇**
[Upgrade to Paid](https://substack.com/redirect/7dcdf9d0-4d2a-41ec-9371-ca610ac8b322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Hey folks,
I had the absolute pleasure of sitting down with my friend Allison Gill, host of _Mueller, She Wrote_ and _The Daily Beans_ , for a live episode of _Endless Urgency_. We went deep on the most dangerous and under-covered threats to our democracy--from DOJ weaponization to the Epstein files. This one is a must-watch if you care about justice, accountability, and protecting our kids.
Here are 5 can't-miss moments:
* **[00:02:05]** Trump yanks Kamala Harris's Secret Service detail--Allison and I unpack why this is bigger than petty revenge and what it signals about his authoritarian instincts.
* **[00:10:46]** Sandwich Guy, mass shootings, and MAGA hypocrisy--why the GOP spins over sandwiches but stays silent on real violence, and how that endangers us all.
* **[00:16:40]** Welcome to the second Gilded Age--how billionaires are strip-mining democracy while we fight over scraps, and why it's waking people up.
* **[00:25:24]** The Epstein files heat up--Congress is back, subpoenas are flying, and Allison drops explosive details about DOJ redactions, Ghislaine's sweetheart deal, and what comes next.
* **[00:32:04]** Why this fight matters--justice for survivors isn't a sideshow, it's the main event. We break down why holding the powerful accountable is essential, not optional.

**[We're living in a moment where the stakes couldn't be higher--and that's exactly why we're having these hard, urgent conversations. If you believe in this work, I hope you'll become a paid subscriber. This is the time to stand up, speak out, and refuse to look away.](https://substack.com/redirect/7dcdf9d0-4d2a-41ec-9371-ca610ac8b322?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

| A guest post by| [Allison Gill](https://substack.com/@muellershewrote?utm_campaign=guest_post_bio&utm_medium=email)I'm Allison Gill - Mueller, She Wrote on Bluesky - CEO of MSW Media, and host of The Daily Beans, UnJustified, and Cleanup on Aisle 45 podcasts.[Subscribe to Allison](https://substack.com/redirect/597c7d62-ec7b-4f33-8661-9f14f7964829?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: We refuse to stand down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's clear that opponents of voting rights see the Voting Rights Act as the last wall between them and control of our elections. They want less participation, more eligible voters turned away, and for you to feel like your vote doesn't matter.
They're wrong, Team, and we're going to win. Fuel our work to defend our fundamental right to vote with $25 or more right now and help make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082925_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
There’s a simple, harsh reality, Team: Americans’ right to vote is in more danger today than at any time since the Voting Rights Act was passed in 1965.
➜ We're watching a wave of racial gerrymandering that deliberately silences Black communities and voter intimidation that puts the safety of voters of color at risk.
➜ Opponents of voting rights in Congress are pushing hard to pass the SAVE Act – a bill designed to intimidate and exclude untold millions of women and voters of color.
➜ Cuts to early and mail-in voting disproportionately disenfranchise people of color , and economic barriers like voter ID laws disproportionately target Black voters.
The Voting Rights Act is the cornerstone of racial voter equality but it’s nearly been destroyed through attacks in the courts. A U.S. Supreme Court focused on limiting voting is trying to knock it out entirely. We have to step up and act now before we turn into another failed democracy.
Team, We refuse to back down, but we need your help to power this fight. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082925_3&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082925_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082925_3&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082925_3&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082925_3&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=082925_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082925_3&amount=35]
Listen, defenders of voting rights like the late John Lewis gave blood, sweat, and tears to codify the right to vote for Black Americans.
But now, voter suppression architects are trying to repeal the Voting Rights Act and send America back to a time when the right to vote belonged to only the privileged few.
We refuse to let them turn back the clock. We believe that everyone deserves our fundamental right to have our voice heard in our elections. Whether someone has recently moved, changed their legal name, just turned 18, recently gained citizenship, or face social and economic barriers to voting, we're going to do everything we can to make sure their vote counts. Everywhere.
Team, if you're with us, please pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to protect our fundamental right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=082925_3&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082925_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=082925_3&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Portland, OR 97280

name: Team Heartland Patriots
subject: We cannot back down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Power-hungry politicians and the elites who fund their campaigns want you to be too tired and afraid to fight back.
#
Here’s a simple truth, Peter:
**Power-hungry politicians and the elites who fund their campaigns want you to be too tired and afraid to fight back against their corrupt agenda,_but we cannot back down._**
Our movement is on a mission to elect pro-worker, pro-freedom candidates across the Heartland who will fiercely stand up for everyday Americans. Will you help us do it?

| | | _**IMPORTANT UPDATE:**
The Trump Administration is set to cut funding for Afghan refugee resettlement – leaving thousands vulnerable._
---

Peter – Nearly four years after thousands of Afghan families were forcibly displaced from their homes, many remain in uncertain positions, struggling to secure housing, work, and education.

In that time, Scott has continuously worked to help resettle these families and allies who fought alongside U.S. troops for twenty years. That’s what the U.S. has always done: support our allies.

**Now, the Trump Administration is breaking that promise** , adding even more hurdles to the legal immigration process – leaving thousands of refugees and veterans in limbo and separated from their families.

Trump has severely damaged the U.S.’s global standing, but luckily, Democrats like Scott are fighting back.

[But he can’t do it alone. We must take back the House next year and elect a Majority that will continue standing up to MAGA attacks. name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: March with Lily this Labor Day, Lily on Fox & Friends
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=c338950e03&u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=a053bd5ec3)
---
| |
---
| |
# Labor Day Parade, Lily on Fox & Friends
**Labor Day Parade in Milford**

Happy Labor Day!

We are seeking volunteers to join us at Milford Labor Day Parade on Monday, September 1st, from 1 PM to 2:30 PM.

My opponent, Maggie Goodlander, will be bringing a group of supporters.
Let’s demonstrate the strength of our grassroots involvement!

Please sign up here:
[https://www.facebook.com/share/16xZnNJhqR/](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=6a985ca736&e=c338950e03)

**Lily on Fox & Friends and in Newsweek**

I did a quick early morning interview on Fox & Friends:
[Chinese embassy dismisses concerns over land grabs in US: 'Smearing and obstructing' | Fox News Video](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=57dd3759f7&e=c338950e03)

I voiced my opposition on three Chinese land grabs in NH. I will always stand up for the people of New Hampshire.

I oppose 600K more Chinese coming to study in the US.

Instead, we must focus on:

50K-80K Chinese that came here illegally under Biden.

The 277K Chinese students already here that should be vetted, and their visas revoked if they are engaging in espionage for the CCP.

I am mentioned in this article by Newsweek that got Fox News' attention to have me on as their guest:
[Chinese Companies Buying Up Land Across New Hampshire Under Scrutiny - Newsweek](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=cebe3e03ce&e=c338950e03)

As an American patriot. I will always put our country and our people first.

Please help us win by making a campaign contribution.

Donate online: [Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=1f6417b22b&e=c338950e03)

Or, make contribution checks payable to:

Lily4Congress Committee
PO Box 406
Weare, NH 03281

Remember - For any donations _above_ $200 cumulative this election cycle, please also write down your employer and occupation.
This is required by the FEC.

Thank you.

Live Free or Die,

name: Kim Schrier
subject: A dangerous precedent (and president!).
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
It was never going to stop with Roe v. Wade, and it won't stop with marriage equality either. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114262592/566481043/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQyMzgyNy0zOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ8lRlpJYhXeMyr_HFPYxkjtmle65jbrjkqI-jE47XA=&emci=9945d307-da84-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=fed23827-3985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
---

Peter,

It started with _Roe v. Wade_.

In 2022, the Trump-packed Supreme Court overturned the right to abortion access, and, overnight, states across the country enacted extreme abortion bans that left women unsure about their future. Some states banned abortion as early as six weeks, before many women even know they are pregnant. Some states went so far as to threaten jail time for doctors who perform an abortion— _even if it means saving the mother’s life_.

**Now, extreme Republicans are setting their sights on marriage equality.**

A formal request has been sent to the Supreme Court to overturn marriage equality. Right now, there are nine states that have introduced legislation to end the right to same-sex marriage. Washington State was a proud supporter of marriage equality, even before the landmark Supreme Court decision affirming marriage equality.

Much like the case overturning abortion access, none of this is what the American people want. The vast majority of Americans think people should have the right to marry the person they love. Hard stop.

Families in Washington’s 8th district— _and across the country_ —are worried about the cost of living, access to healthcare, keeping their small businesses afloat, making sure their kids get a good education, and securing federal investments for local projects. Yet Republicans are once again enacting their hateful agenda over the will of the people and attacking the rights we know are ours.

**[I’m fighting tooth and nail to protect our rights, and ensure our government brings back into focus the issues that we worry about every day. Will you please chip in toward my end-of-month fundraising deadline to help make sure I win and we take back the House so we can end the assault on our rights and get down to the business of making life better for all Americans?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114262593/566481044/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250829_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250829_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=fed23827-3985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=fed23827-3985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQyMzgyNy0zOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ8lRlpJYhXeMyr_HFPYxkjtmle65jbrjkqI-jE47XA=)**

Peter, _rescinding marriage equality doesn’t solve a single one of the challenges we face every day_. It doesn’t create jobs, it doesn’t lower prescription drug costs, and it certainly doesn’t make our communities safer. **All it does is cause heartbreak and tear families apart.**

**Most importantly, this administration and its allies in Congress are setting a dangerous new precedent. Little by little, they are stripping away rights we thought were settled law. If they succeed, it will cost Americans their livelihoods, their freedom, and their futures.**

We are slowly but surely being dragged back to a darker past, one where individual rights are not protected, and where politicians think they have the power to decide who you can love and how you live your life. Flipping the House is the best way to put a much-needed check on this administration, and keeping WA-08 blue is absolutely vital to making that happen.

**[I’m doing everything I can to fight back against this reckless agenda, and protect the rights you deserve, but I can’t do it without you. Before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you will chip in $5 to ensure that we have what it takes to run another winning campaign and reject the Trump administration's blatant assault on our freedoms.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114262594/566481045/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250829_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250829_eom3_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=fed23827-3985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=fed23827-3985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQyMzgyNy0zOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJ8lRlpJYhXeMyr_HFPYxkjtmle65jbrjkqI-jE47XA=)**

name: Rob Bonta
subject: We blocked a $184 million cut to AmeriCorps
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250829&t=1001&akid=1930%2E1088799%2EeUOsY0 ]Rob Bonta

We just stopped a $184 million cut to AmeriCorps —
our national volunteer public service agency.

Trump has been trying to gut AmeriCorps for months, illegally withholding
millions of dollars in funding. As a result, I took the administration to
court and, because of our lawsuit, it finally backed down.

This is good news for the thousands of AmeriCorps volunteers who are eager
to serve others, and for the thousands of communities that are stronger
because of it.

AmeriCorps members represent the best of who we are as a country. They
selflessly serve in food banks, homeless shelters, schools, veterans’
facilities, and so much more.

Thanks to our lawsuit, more than $184 million in funding will be released
to be awarded to service programs around the country, including $11.5
million for California.

The Trump administration’s senseless attempt to gut this program is just
another part of its reckless mission to dismantle our government — but as
Attorney General, I will never stop fighting for the critical programs and
services Californians and Americans depend on.

If you can, I’m asking you today to help power this fight.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250829?refcode=em20250829-1930&refcode2=1930_1088799_eUOsY0&akid=1930%2E1088799%2EeUOsY0 ]Will you chip in to my re-election campaign to make sure our grassroots
push for justice continues to prevail?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250829?refcode=em20250829-1930&amount=5&refcode2=1930_1088799_eUOsY0&akid=1930%2E1088799%2EeUOsY0 ]Donate $5 »

Thank you so much for anything you can give — your support makes a
profound difference in the work we’re able to do.

Rob

[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/1061?t=1002&akid=1930%2E1088799%2EeUOsY0 ][IMG]

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

name: Marie
subject: Before you sign off
body:
| | Peter, I hate to email on a Friday evening before the long weekend, so I’ll make this quick.

We’re up against another deadline, and I need your help. Can you give $5 or $10 before this big deadline so we can keep this seat in local hands and make sure Southwest Washington’s voice can’t be bought?

[https://go.marieforcongress.com/a/august](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114262850/566493990/497279752?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_90DO_250829_3_6&refcode2=362b4fd5-3c85-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjJiNGZkNS0zYzg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wo1R7tX9Pz2N-mwTJtMsut_JPc8Mqw7OAmPooYBcIng=)

Every bit makes a difference in ensuring our decision makers stay loyal to soil. Thanks for taking the time to read this, Peter.

– Marie

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: We’re thinking about a rebate check
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Before my end-of-month deadline, please respond before I do anything
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **WE’RE THINKING ABOUT A REBATE!**

Friend,

We have a lot of money coming in. It's coming in tremendous numbers! There's a concept of making a dividend to the people of this country who have paid a lot of taxes and got nothing for it.
There's a possibility. Primarily we want to pay down debt, but there's a possibility that we take a piece of it and make a dividend to the people.
We’re thinking about a little rebate, and I know that might be very nice for Americans! **BEFORE MY END-OF-MONTH DEADLINE, please respond to this one question:**
[QUESTION #1](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
******Should bonus revenue from tariffs go back to the American People VIA CHECK SIGNED BY TRUMP?** **_[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you and may God bless you,

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

body:
| | Peter – It’s no surprise that D.C. insiders chose a career politician who gives handouts to special interests to take on Marie. He is sure to continue the policies that are hollowing out our communities like driving down wages, bankrupting our hospitals, and increasing the cost of living.

National Republicans will do anything to replace Marie – especially if it means installing someone who will protect tax breaks for the wealthy, hand out favors to corporate donors, and keep their broken system running just the way it is.

**See, Marie has never – NEVER – been afraid to take on tough fights.** That isn’t changing now – but this may be the fight of her life. This guy has some very wealthy friends and Marie is still at the top of the NRCC’s target list.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbssl594hom0n827bvr7fhbbo3k9m6le2flg0mto_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2sv9kcukqqqti0u5268j81d3snu6837df6qks0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr2ba0fmfsj2d5nhlqnb9k7kolto3bp9pappq500_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpqcuc4csippo3nka410m52u6b8kq2tpd036gg0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhdd337fq6dgobhlr8fi5rdk9bglceptq8c0i958_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhq0o42u7st1b60jdjq44n8hcf714q26l68p68s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi4o4q2rqapsn61i2850r8sponpldl5leide4370_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdnb419hhjdn93enjchhdiop0j7ipvb33efq467g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o31cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

name: Zach Nunn
subject: Family farms are in danger
body:
Do you support family farms?

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | |
---
Friend,

The heart of Iowa is at risk.

Family farms are under threat--and the next generation of farmers is feeling the squeeze.

Expanding farm safety nets and fixing outdated regulations are critical to keeping farms family-run and in Iowa's hands.
_Farming isn 't just a business--it's a way of life, passed down from generation to generation. Family farms feed our communities, sustain our local economies, and carry Iowa's proud traditions forward._ | [**STAND WITH FAMILY FARMS >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf0spuovgapsv970jvf02h2ff868b00m0jvgnvf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o35c3h2bs)
---

**As your Congressman, I 'm fighting to ensure farming remains a family business. **

It's about more than crops and livestock--it's about families working side by side, building a legacy that lasts. Our rural communities, local economies, and Iowa way of life depend on it. That's why I urgently need your voice.
**DO YOU AGREE THAT WE MUST KEEP FARMING A FAMILY BUSINESS?** [**YES >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbev3pid2v9llc1r7qtmvsunk03v8hu8j5thk2mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o35c3h2bs)
---
[**NO >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4l201r9g4p0be88ddc995sif91o4ic4i4boiqf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o35c3h2bs)
---

Time is critical--every voice counts. Take action today to protect Iowa's farming legacy for generations to come, Friend.

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zsd3j60ke11vlv27bt76v76r5o55578osb4ktc8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o35c3h2bs)
[**GO ON RECORD >>**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zes7c1amou8u5pa37trvgaqtf7a98ptg680c3vv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1o35c3h2bs)
---

Thank you,

Congressman Zach Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfldttrisd2a13526rvsj42kb4pmihb1rnm1il9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1p71cjh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd7ipimc9ac6kho09h5ktbtc0psckbfe6i4fr0k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1p71cjh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z87ar11nk9prjukhgm6es8of2jnemndi9qackd4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clgm1p71cjh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdf167p2tbhan3kjvnjltdi984tq7n534bknk550_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj97drdppcjp0evt1dfqh8pgrf7mu46pun0tfqpo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn700i23kqgbf71t7jgcqgp6nkn8je7vt4asd1s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo9o02jsbro7ks8e4a2dqnbos62ur5is8k014058_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp3q2qm3rfhqp3cu465s06ic8kpv34vml45dvk2o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv3n5427h7l8iqgu5mfmrvcmajgbjcj500pa4dr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh4inbve099tdquko6jae9elc78c1hqma7tsc41o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt4ls4it4bl07nv8pch84u2qniqvr6nqho5r975o_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim8or6cdh2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---

---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. # **[Whitlock: Lies are far more dangerous than guns](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/bVGzqBEugCm0w0BnRx6p5g)**
---
A mass shooting carried out by the trans-identifying man Robin Westman has revealed that lies are far more dangerous than guns — despite the left’s unwavering belief that the two are flipped.“A lot of people are evaluating the transgender angle of this, and it’s worthy of evaluation, but it’s really just a symptom of a much larger problem. And it’s a larger problem of the lies that we have introduced into American society, the lies of convenience that we tell in the name of tolerance, in the name of inclusion,” BlazeTV host Jason Whitlock explains on “Fearless.”“Lies are actually the source of wickedness and evil. Lies are what got America in this place. Lies are more dangerous than guns,” he continues.And Whitlock points out that in Minnesota, those who thrive on leftist lies are in control.

Washington, D.C., Mayor Muriel Bowser (D) admitted that the president's deployment of troops in the district has lowered crime, leading many liberal lawmakers to respond with anger and scorn. Bowser related the significant drop in carjackings in the district during a press conference Wednesday, where she said that crime had been dropping before the federal surge but that those officers contributed to the trend. 'We know that when carjackings go down, when use of gun goes down, when homicide or robbery go down, neighborhoods feel safer and are safer.' "We greatly appreciate the surge of officers that enhance what [the D.C. Municipal Police Department] has been able to do in this city.

# **[A kid got a mint PS1 from his grandpa, and the internet is freaking out](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
A simple hand-me-down has turned into a lively debate about having children at an early age and retro video games.The retro-gaming community has become a gigantic industry (worth between $3 billion and $10 billion depending on the source), so large in fact that an old box of games or forgotten console could be worth thousands depending on the condition.So when a third-generation gamer took to 4chan to post about whether or not it was worth it to fool around with an old PlayStation, readers' brains imploded at his remarks. Not necessarily because of his apprehension over playing the system, but because he was receiving it secondhand from his grandfather.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.)

name: Zach Nunn
subject: Family farms are in danger
body:
Do you support family farms?

---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document | |
---
Friend,

The heart of Iowa is at risk.

Family farms are under threat--and the next generation of farmers is feeling the squeeze.

Expanding farm safety nets and fixing outdated regulations are critical to keeping farms family-run and in Iowa's hands.
_Farming isn 't just a business--it's a way of life, passed down from generation to generation. Family farms feed our communities, sustain our local economies, and carry Iowa's proud traditions forward._ | [**STAND WITH FAMILY FARMS >>**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmlbq7kq2tp4hq18ln7ln4vm8jskrkc3kg8qrf90_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim4pb4c5h2bs)
---

**As your Congressman, I 'm fighting to ensure farming remains a family business. **

It's about more than crops and livestock--it's about families working side by side, building a legacy that lasts. Our rural communities, local economies, and Iowa way of life depend on it. That's why I urgently need your voice.
**DO YOU AGREE THAT WE MUST KEEP FARMING A FAMILY BUSINESS?** [**YES >>**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqepncup3f1h9kjtg0p8mt6or0mh22rta7aslqbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim4pb4c5h2bs)
---
[**NO >>**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpmrs3u6o0e39fi69i76hmk868v0jam94mjc35v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim4pb4c5h2bs)
---

Time is critical--every voice counts. Take action today to protect Iowa's farming legacy for generations to come, Friend.

[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6p5v05e81fn1c5r27b1ab4hq1a8h406in6buijg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim4pb4c5h2bs)
[**GO ON RECORD >>**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlqq0hno5r9ueqb6b3i49frv9hkq8ga4n2ev63kg_rp22sh2s8i6epb3clim4pb4c5h2bs)
---

Thank you,

Congressman Zach Nunn

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. clean_body: Do you support family farms? | | | | | | | Untitled Document | | Friend, The heart of Iowa is at risk. Family farms are under threat--and the next generation of farmers is feeling the squeeze. Expanding farm safety nets and fixing outdated regulations are critical to keeping farms family-run and in Iowa's hands. Farming isn 't just a business--it's a way of life, passed down from generation to generation. Family farms feed our communities, sustain our local economies, and carry Iowa's proud traditions forward. | As your Congressman, I 'm fighting to ensure farming remains a family business. It's about more than crops and livestock--it's about families working side by side, building a legacy that lasts. Our rural communities, local economies, and Iowa way of life depend on it. That's why I urgently need your voice. DO YOU AGREE THAT WE MUST KEEP FARMING A FAMILY BUSINESS? Time is critical--every voice counts. Take action today to protect Iowa's farming legacy for generations to come, Friend. name: Troy Downing
subject: Alert: DEFCON 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Our House Majority is in jeopardy, and I need your help before midnight.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
It’s GOP Freshman Troy Downing. I want to shoot straight with you.
The August deadline is less than **48 hours** away, and my critical GOP seat is in danger. Kamala, AOC, Bernie, and their far-left allies are targeting Montana to take me down and flip the House.
As a Trump-endorsed combat veteran, I’ve faced tough battles before, but this one’s different. The future of the conservative House Majority, President Trump’s MAGA agenda, and the entire America First movement are on the line.
But I know if just a handful of Patriots chip in today, we’ll hold the line and defend the House. But there’s no time to waste
**[It will make all the difference if you can spare just $15.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-X-WKsAwmg)** We’re miles behind on our goal, and every dollar helps us stay in the fight for our future.[DONATE BEFORE MIDNIGHT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._zPqDvvpWQ)This is DEFCON 1, Peter. It’s now or never
Thank you for your support,
Troy DowningCombat Veteran in Congress| |

clean_body: Our House Majority is in jeopardy, and I need your help before midnight. , It’s GOP Freshman Troy Downing. I want to shoot straight with you. The August deadline is less than 48 hours away, and my critical GOP seat is in danger. Kamala, AOC, Bernie, and their far-left allies are targeting Montana to take me down and flip the House. As a Trump-endorsed combat veteran, I’ve faced tough battles before, but this one’s different. The future of the conservative House Majority, President Trump’s MAGA agenda, and the entire America First movement are on the line. But I know if just a handful of Patriots chip in today, we’ll hold the line and defend the House. But there’s no time to waste We’re miles behind on our goal, and every dollar helps us stay in the fight for our future. is DEFCON 1, Peter. It’s now or never Thank you for your support, Troy DowningCombat Veteran in Congress| | Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. ## Trump Deploys Rare Option to Cut Spending
The White House [plans to cancel nearly $5 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL9utDAQxJ_GdD4ti_lzhYuvobuvTYkMXh-bGIxsHxfePnJeIc1qRyP9NDMfj-lh2PP-_G820tmFaad38pQzxcmbOURrrhzNST7Tt0lnCiuHCQFbCYNsYLKG_TWpympHhNRUpOu-7Vo14NBUq76rGVwHHdhWOdf3Dc1DN9NQO5o7al3FutBgaKAGUApvPcJsEMy9tnW_WCUUkOUc4u0z8J5Xcv4KJ8XbErbK6zXnI4nmn8BR4LhfR0i5WALHAhY4wlD-cl5Jln4Cxxxf2yHTEs2RZDtL3qULkfi5S8O2yGgiySMsX5RlpLRwShx2gWMVtT3e7D2nrhcKnpth_xsm_2nBU-NPAAAA__-lg4UD) in congressionally approved foreign aid in a rare “pocket rescission,” a legally complex maneuver that hasn’t been used in 48 years. The federal rescissions process allows the president to make a request to Congress to cancel already-approved funding within 45 days. Congress did this for the administration last month to rescind funding for public broadcasting.

However, a pocket rescission [skirts that 45-day window](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOnTAQRb_GdH4yY8CmoIgU0W3alGiwB5jsgJ-wA_v-Pnr5ha2vdHXO-f0xfSALH-sv3GkoS5oOurNQKXROgnM6I77KiRdJoS_MV04bpwkMtNp4bc0UkeU1NVUcFiIgW9FQu7ZrGw_eVttAzjsIS_SweN-hxR7Bdi0ES9Gb1lU8vN-Mt6Y2pmng4cDMCAb7OtYuxEY1hiKXdD7-JD7KRou80kXnI6S9kmEr5ZmV_aFgVDDe9_1Y0tfb4r0rGJ9JuHDICkbBe8dPOrOeBXPR98aF9Jb-ZtJ7ukgHPAKJbnQ_6yWdxOuhkaNmEVpRlB33nMInR2V_Gts6P_u5Dr3rwtwZa7ueaqojxi5arM4hPm8W4dw51Zh1R5b_zOVboa8B_gUAAP__hhmSaA) and avoids giving Congress a say by coming so close to the end of a fiscal year that lawmakers don’t have time to weigh in. The fiscal year ends on Sept. 30. Democrats strongly criticized the move, saying it could [endanger ongoing budget negotiations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb8GM7sQUDQg2MSsN93QesqzeTsIFryxp_9-qucXJr5V99Q5_-7LHShSevyFAx3veUn4rBGZsSwR1lw8vLjAhZHxC-pVc6C8KKn6Vo6tlosHiq_FNN7tiAp1g66z_dCbUY26CQ78bkw3DtOu7Y7G6G3qu9WsO0iw29A15N5vctSyk9IYdbNKrqAkTJ3v7OaNMBI9cS63_5kSB9zjK19Ybls-mugC81mF_iPULNTMAQPF-N6EmkM-8C0k1Az-oESVCzDlJNTcG2snPbZcPo-zLVg3qpVyalc6oTBVSO0K20eEGoSam-L8-aQYqQ5WGPk4gH4wDf-q2-XUdwAAAP__zqWDjQ) aimed at avoiding a government shutdown. The White House said the move was legal and expected the issue to end up in court.
## Labor Day Travel to Hit Record Levels
Airports are bracing for record-level Labor Day travel this weekend, with the TSA expecting [over 17 million people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAURb8GO83jgaMWFNvYzbZbEoTHyIaRCRBd_37j7Cdsd5ObnJtzv-76bkIM2-PTPElVn_RGR4lUK2UdzZKyM2fNZqdY6ceUvaQ1JI2AfQtjK0A7E-KpZeOUJ0ISDSk-9LdejjiKZlXL5AWKxfHeT0STlV7w3oO1HgXJ29gEddFgFMABpMRuQFgMgpm444N1kkkgF2rK3XcKW13JxzPtlDubnk1Ua62vwsQHw5nhfBxHZ5dyWVw9w_mKDOe3TOvM2f7ptNcqw7nJyr2OEGMot4FJeDxNiG90_dcfu8LfAAAA__8x0XRT) to move through its checkpoints over the next five days. Many more people will be driving, and they’ll find gas prices on average to be cheaper than they’ve been in years. _The Vacationer_ , a travel site, says its surveys show [more than half of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAQRL8GsqHEIJZ1oMAJ2Tl1SI2Y4ZAt0JY0tzJ_79pz-Qsu6aSru_r1z7fljUIM5_sPOsTplpZTaomiKnmJ5FNmujTTU6LKHyrPkvaQFjQ4grnDYBamEK_Ftuw2EZShFddP4220d7wP7e5oWz2J9SPzNCF6w-xp3UbTT_bGZmiDe7WZ-2B6Y6zFbkLjCQ1967mfVraNNcJBU-5-pXDqLlu80lNyt6ajjW5XfZRm-N7g3OBca-0u2lN6uQ3OL5wG54-XUNawRmlw_iQDpguqyG85Gf4xghaCSvkskDZYc6osDBTyI2Ut8IgfBXQX8FIUNBxSQNP_rL9gpQz9aMe-x8l2ux6xzY4fNcQYym1qrHk_KMTP5fqlu58O_wYAAP__D26Xkw) are planning to travel over the holiday weekend. The American Automobile Association said hotel rates are 11% lower this year than last, and car rental costs are down 3%. For those hitting the road, [here are tips](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0Ltq7DAQxvGnkTsb3XzZQsWBg1NtqkBKM5bG6wlaa5EGb_z2wZtHSP2HYX7f53W6AkXabu9wR8dLmjZ8lojMmKcIc8oBDs6wY2T8hrKXtFKatNRtLYfayCkAxWOyVXALokZToVN927V20IOpVuc9eNmb1ks5tBdvejSqW_yAtgtmMHNF7rwmByOVlNbqptdyBi3hooLqfbDCSgzEKTdfiTZecYlH2jE3Pt2r6FbmRxHmn9Cj0CPM_hQ0t3Rmoce361k-XgShx5epDnDUv6o6YGHagCltpQ4IsdRMjyL0WDjlQ5iRgjD_lbZta5TqquzC40kxUul6YeXtDhRfr_Cf9tud_gkAAP__uBGD7w) for the best days to travel and potential deals.
## Ohio State-Texas Game Kicks Off Season
The college football season starts in earnest today with two highly anticipated opening weekend matchups: No. 1 Texas takes on No. 3 Ohio State this morning, followed by No. 9 LSU against No. 4 Clemson later tonight. You can see the weekend’s [full slate of games here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7HggW0yMHTxlq4d0Qs8x7QvJgJqN39fpb_Q-eqeI52Pi79g4rTd3vFOri3Zb3RUptaoeMZrLhGfreBO3OgH617zmrIHCcNJ2pOWPmLipzdddAsRkO7IqWkYB2PB6m51NoQpoNVGo4k6qrNVZKZxjHFQi1Fjl9yLJq2WSkpjoJ9AXhEknlVUU4hGGEkxtVz6z5y2ttLCz7xT6UO-d-zW1h5V6DcBs4D5OI6e6mN7jQLmkJnpRqcl53ZFZgFzDSvFbyYBs38diL4EzKorLj6OxJzqOAkjb3dM_Kdo_-qyO_gNAAD__2eGdrc) Texas quarterback Arch Manning has dominated headlines leading up to today’s big Texas-Ohio matchup. The nephew of NFL Hall of Famers Eli and Peyton, Manning enters his first start with big expectations, fueled in large part by his record-breaking [$6.8 million NIL valuation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFurDAQheGnMd0iMxjsLVzchm5vmxINeFgmmbVXxoHw9tEmj5D6k86R_rfbeEMWjvf_-CBfljRGOjahUiiPglPKAc-ScScp9IXbvqWV0wgauot2l1aPAVnO0VTBL0RAbUW-sV3fGQeurVaPwTjsr9bNwU1LB31nGtubaWoBbZhDxf61pl2rG62NgdqCnhA0XpvQ2DkYZTQFLinX74ljWWmRM-2U6zk9KvFrKc9Ntf8UDAqG4zjqFNuXKRgii4IhY_zgeN8UDE_Bk_KvXHaUTyyc4kuq7MPzYBHeequMvj-Q5eei_KnL7uE7AAD__8bOd3I) This college football season is unprecedented for decisions made off the field. It’s the first where players can now be [paid directly](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAQAF-DM0a4DYM3ILiEbC-90OqBts2KAQt67Zvfn-a-sHFJpVL9-Vw-MeVUtt_4JMdrXQpdPRMztSXjo7aIL254Umb6i_3sdU91AQVGqllOaomY8mvRQ3QrEdA0kButuRs9wzwNuwvrfbThYTCYGDTadf2YiOI8xWjRajMk97apeVKjUlrDzYJ6ICj8GONoQ9RCK4qJa7t91VR4pzW_6kntFupzyG5nPrqYfgnwAvx1XTfqR3lDAT7UnGkj2Y_auAvwnWt7CfCLAJ-iAK-NvlujjAD_9R03klvDwl2uqWCWeBytnpjlXr87yVOWgCg7MWd6UuGhuXhcKefU71ZotT0x5f9h_KObp4N_AQAA__-IbosT) by their schools, following the NCAA’s legal settlement earlier this year.

It will end with a newly updated College Football Playoff [seeding system](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnTAQhZ_GdEb22PwVLtLQbdqUaMDDxcmAr2wHwttHrLRPsPV8c3S-8-tj-sDA4Xj9xJ1cWeN00JWZSqE0Mc4xebxLwpO40D_MZ45biBMoaKTqpVGTx8D3ZCvvViIgU5HTXdM2tofeVJtTlrRpFhjaZhh60K1Szdqi8WZQQ6t1FdyTpnqjtFLWQt2BmhEUDtrrbvFWWEU-lJjq3zEcZaOV73hSqpe4V-y2Ut5ZmB8CRgHjdV31sSA-RwHjYyNgXGMsMzILGDGVsDAJGL8kNAgYt3hJDbIQ7nKJzPQi-fUl34x3XFd5BWZ5xfTnk8syLxv5v0xyDj5Xyfn3Q4TcdsKq146BPzuWbw17OvgfAAD__1vejCo), tweaking how teams are qualified. Today also features the final College GameDay broadcast of longtime analyst [Lee Corso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHOnDAQxfHTmM6rYbBht3CRxt2XNiUa7GHX0YBXtgPh9tFGyglSP-mnp_-Pr_mLkqT9-Z02dm3N885nFW6Nyyy05BLpaoUOlsa_qR41v1KeEdBquOsB5khJrtl00a3MyEPHrp_saM0d70P3ciGAGafRLGgWO2H_MP1o-wARAtgQH11yHw3uA_QAxuBtQlgIgR597KcQjTLAMbVcbj9z2tuLV7nyweUW8taJe7X2rmr4ptAr9Od53ri-98-o0Icswk_Wa85tIRGFvrZcLoV-VuhTVOjNCKO1FhV6YdYhl5p12t4Uml5Zml6p6H_QkzaOdGn6FRPvgbvi4vtMIqmOkzLw3CjJ32ftv3IeDv8EAAD___CCiU0) on ESPN this morning, starting at 9 a.m. ET, followed by Longhorns vs. Buckeyes on Fox at noon ET

clean_body: Airports are bracing for record-level Labor Day travel this weekend, with the TSA expecting to move through its checkpoints over the next five days, with 7 million predicted for just this weekend. | | | | | | Saturday, August 30, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1963, John F. Kennedy became the first U.S. president to have a direct text/teletype line, famously called ” connecting him to the Kremlin in Moscow. The Powerball lottery jackpot has threshold for tonight’s drawing, which gives buyers a roughly 1-in-300 million chance to become a very wealthy winner. Some people buy tickets just to daydream, while others are more regular players. Take our Poll below and let us know how you feel about playing the lottery. We're sponsored today by , the ultrasonic tooth cleaning device that is changing the way people look at dental hygiene. | Trump Deploys Rare Option to Cut Spending The White House in congressionally approved foreign aid in a rare “pocket rescission,” a legally complex maneuver that hasn’t been used in 48 years. The federal rescissions process allows the president to make a request to Congress to cancel already-approved funding within 45 days. Congress did this for the administration last month to rescind funding for public broadcasting. However, a pocket rescission and avoids giving Congress a say by coming so close to the end of a fiscal year that lawmakers don’t have time to weigh in. The fiscal year ends on Sept. 30. Democrats strongly criticized the move, saying it could aimed at avoiding a government shutdown. The White House said the move was legal and expected the issue to end up in court. Labor Day Travel to Hit Record Levels Airports are bracing for record-level Labor Day travel this weekend, with the TSA expecting to move through its checkpoints over the next five days. Many more people will be driving, and they’ll find gas prices on average to be cheaper than they’ve been in years. The Vacationer , a travel site, says its surveys show are planning to travel over the holiday weekend. The American Automobile Association said hotel rates are 11% lower this year than last, and car rental costs are down 3%. For those hitting the road, for the best days to travel and potential deals. Ohio State-Texas Game Kicks Off Season The college football season starts in earnest today with two highly anticipated opening weekend matchups: No. 1 Texas takes on No. 3 Ohio State this morning, followed by No. 9 LSU against No. 4 Clemson later tonight. You can see the weekend’s Texas quarterback Arch Manning has dominated headlines leading up to today’s big Texas-Ohio matchup. The nephew of NFL Hall of Famers Eli and Peyton, Manning enters his first start with big expectations, fueled in large part by his record-breaking This college football season is unprecedented for decisions made off the field. It’s the first where players can now be by their schools, following the NCAA’s legal settlement earlier this year. It will end with a newly updated College Football Playoff , tweaking how teams are qualified. Today also features the final College GameDay broadcast of longtime analyst on ESPN this morning, starting at 9 a.m. ET, followed by Longhorns vs. Buckeyes on Fox at noon ET | The following stories are featured exclusively on The Flyover Podcast—a daily show that gives you the most important headlines in under 15 minutes, straight from the heart of the country. ➤ Trump moved to revoke Kamala Harris’ Secret Service protection after learning that Biden had quietly extended it. () ➤ Alaska officials are searching for a bear after it attacked a woman on a morning run. () ➤A North Carolina election official was arrested after allegedly spiking his grandchildren's ice cream. name: Troy Downing
subject: Hey you! (yes, YOU, Peter).
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? If you do, I’m BEGGING YOU to read this email...

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Hey you!
Yes, you, Peter.
No, not your laptop. The person looking at it!
I was really hoping to reach you today.
This is Congressman Troy Downing, and I want to thank you for opening my message. Can I borrow just one more minute of your time?
**President Donald J. Trump and House Republicans have accomplished a historic eight-month run unlike anything in modern American history.**
_🇺🇸 We secured the border 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We brought back American jobs 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We cut taxes for working Americans 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We reduced government waste 🇺🇸_ _
__🇺🇸 We eliminated the woke agenda 🇺🇸_ The tide has turned in our favor.
**_BUT!!! BUT!!! BUT!!!_**
**WE CAN’T REST ON OUR LAURELS NOW!!!**
The Democrats are more desperate than ever.
They’ve doubled down on extremism with their unhinged socialist economic policies, woke DEI agenda, and aggressive climate change plan.
They’ve become a dangerous cabal that **CANNOT BE TRUSTED** with America’s future.
If the pro-Trump GOP can hold the majority through 2028 and solidify America’s Golden Age.
But we need the funds to make it happen NOW!
The further we fall behind the Democrats in fundraising, the closer we get to losing our chance.
**_Peter, do you consider yourself a true Patriot? It’s time to prove it._**
I’m not asking you to risk life and limb for your country (though I think you would). I’m just requesting $17 to lock in a Republican House Majority for two more years. [Is it worth it to you?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-IZeUkcUe2muPnScFWSkQw)[CHIP IN $17 RIGHT NOW

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1862, General Hood's Texas Brigade helped capture a federal battery of artillery in the Battle of Second Manassas. It was one of the South’s [most successful counterattacks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGuqzAQRVdjOtDYBmMKF7-hy29ficZ4CJYcHNmjEHb_lGzhVae6R1fn57bcMKZ43P_jgxy_t7wcdNZEzFQWpjfWV817zJWRyVPlQhzLokANLdhWwxIwpmvpm-A8hEk25OQ4mGGQxthmd-R9ILL9uE6jB6VWLXHYNiOtWgk1NtF9ZGA1SAkSTDdamLyWpsdpGlcjRQ8UIufS8U7fS1u68otKt-ZHk9zO_KxC_xNqFmo-z7PjumM-Ujyoy-Uu1PxdtQGv1l8fCDXTweXDSdumuPA8Y0qxmlH0cH9gTF85_y3Jy6nfAAAA__9WBnZj) of the Civil War. Love the state’s live music scene? There are over 1,000 music venues scattered across Texas, some of them dating back many decades. Check out the special Labor Days savings from today's sponsor [ServicePlus Home Warranty](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Mtu6jAYBOCnsXdEvjteeHGOULqCqheJ7iIn_kOsGoLsvwTevoJX6P6b0WgOu34XUk7n4z6cwONtWvozrDUDIpQe4RbqtS5zWioGhAEqFsBUesGE3rB2I1kfQ8r3XtHoBxYdp-C51UZrbkxLZ69lnJgWWkbDzaitVWpSIAO0loETjib_KGOtZJwzzkxjW-YGyY0KztnRcKIYxIRLaXCG56Qp35crlGZcTjT7GfFSifxHREdEt65rs5bxO52HnB-CiE688JbzN2GI6LaHD_f_ff_Asqs_Aydy-_nVvdLi42VNOadqLFHseArpmaf4t1-uXvwGAAD__wkTc9Y).

## Texas-OSU Game Launches Season
Texas college football kicks into high gear today with a season-opening matchup between No. 1 Texas and defending national champions, No. 3 Ohio State. It's the highest-ranked season opener [since 2017](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvO4yAUhVdjd0QXMK-CYpp0_7RTWjyuYyQSIriKk92PnC385dGRzuP797P-hFLL4_Y33NHTe2vrA49RkQj7SvgO4zXaXtqgQBhxUEcqfRUgFAPLJKw5lPpZlzn7CNnxGT03SivFtbbz7uOijMhaCkRAk7lxG0SbJIRsuYU8F3-GgZXAOXDQF2PBRcn1EpwzSfNpAcyFWr_Qjt9JW_20F_ZLave5-p3oOSb5ZxLXSVzD8zxwWqfoVFLFSVxTqxVvyLbWKIZa2bEHYtTYESjtLFtpOUrnuEoGrQVEJza7qSySjE7O3efnUWotQ5tpgds9lPrtp99Re3nxPwAA__-7W4A-). ## Abbott, RFK Jr. Address Rural Healthcare
Health Secretary Robert Kennedy Jr. capped off his Texas visit this week with a roundtable discussion on [rural healthcare](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGO5CAQRU-Ds2oBxtgEDjZxNptuaBWmPLBDmxZUt2duv3JfYeN6eqqn_-dj_cCU0_H5G-808_de1oPOlomZ6sr0je3VSkylMTJ5alyJU1211APICXq5Bkz5ZzVdmL0MTnU0q3Gww6Csnbo4D5P1hBtuvjda7mSNskYppEFNrvemS_Mlk1MvlZJK2ts4Sed7ZQ06N25WCSMpJC71xpHeL-35p7yo3rZy7_IcmR9N9L-EXoRezvO8fb2edB2FXrBy2jIJvVxdQi-5bJiFXt4ioZe6f8HfCuh9YYbHs0XgikfbS71DfVbM8EYhEmaOG1aCM3GEg07YKdBF7M8jXDJtHfTSkfebB-umAcxoCdyoDAQz7iaEUfVad3UOjzPlnJodhZGfd0z5ncP_N8Jr1v8CAAD__-LOm1g) in the state, joined by Gov. Greg Abbott. The newly passed federal Rural Transformation Program earmarked $50 billion for improving healthcare for rural Americans. Half of those funds will be distributed evenly among U.S. states, and the other half will be awarded via individual applications. Kennedy indicated that awards would prioritize states that are pushing “Make America Healthy Again” legislation forward, as Texas has done with a slew of [health-related bills](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAUAE-DGdYDFDQg2MRsNt3QQnkO1KJMwRsdb7-1c4V_ge6u_vOYHy6meDx_ux0tfbY8H3jVhERYZsKPq2fNIeZKjnDBSgUpllmC7DkMXMHsXUz33DXeLuBH0aAVptd9L7QemmD7FdcN0Bi1bINTCrpFukV634-wgsEm2v8wGBQIAQJ0awYYFyV058bRrFqwDtBHyqWlgN-kLd35xNKueW-SDUSvytQvJicmp-u62hBq-8wnk9OrYK285LwzOVVcC5IrN_-Lx4H-5rsLjlN-F-7eleLB6dMG2lNTrH9dMaVYtWEdPHcX01dHP5t0WvkvAAD__1TTfkY) signed this week, with Kennedy present. Abbott said that funding will focus on serving pregnant women and new mothers, as well as children, seniors, and uninsured Texans. Funding could also [expand telehealth](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAUhE8DmZH_oQMHm5DNphsiGz_AWreNnt8ww-1X3XuEiatU-ur787F8-JRT2X_7Jzj63upS4KtlIAJcCL59u1o9Um3kCQI0QqCEi-TSMD4xxZfoU74X3UcXeHyIHpwYjTVGWDv1h5OKQzBRR7OpuI6T0lpuYYxWR2Um4_vkXmN8UlwILrgdxok_ghJW-8djXK3oNIeYqOJAB7yRtnzXC3BY67PP7iA6W6d-dXLu5LzXa3iXhr1enZxfdzo5n7XR_xSwVGQ-hErEGqwI5PFmf6EUiDc7ao4MP9FndoDPdKwegWH9LJF8yMBOhNbYWssGCGWFHl08v1LOqdmx03x_-pTfaPQzoZeT_wIAAP__PX2OyQ) options in rural areas and address staffing shortages in rural hospitals.
## List: Best Budget Beach Retirement Towns
A new ranking of the nation's best budget-friendly [beach retirement towns](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0Luu6yAQheGnsTtHMxhzKShOky6n3aUFZhwjERPB5Pr0W8kr7HpJvz6tn9N88imn_fzfX8jxcy3zTo-WiZnqzPT07d7KlkpjzxSocSVOdRYgpgHMMMIcfcqvWfbRBYgWe3KoJzVNqJTpNyelNFqDUKhGK4KdKKBdtLIoV0M09cl9YmBGQAQEddAGbBhRSW-tXhR2EigmLvXAG31Ja36VO9XDUi59dhvztXXjv04cO3Fc0-73hcLt_f7snTgG8ss2cHnsbfjqaUADMIRbPBP31cXrI-WcmtKdhPPFp_wt89_-uDvxGwAA__-fB3RA) included three Texas locations in the top 10, with Port Lavaca taking the No. 1 spot overall. name: A fatal election
subject: Losing this race means it’s over (Dems are collapsing here)
body:
We are barreling into a Pearl Harbor moment and no one is talking about it. Losing this election means we never win Pennsylvania again. Period.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RMuXIra3-BpncyYc5EYphy3VaeWxZ6VtSxZ2FnmJSF96z5ubZVdUPgmJVEBkKDGgT1Z17daJR7MVNRVpu4EGkqznfoOXUzHSRmjeeI_VvEnxwC_MHBRlQHHNwkOujhUcTmZf2ZATvTj1eC92LLzDaRoLQ5Ys-naeYhBmLG0k85jDIlkCYeLElBSoCyU94Fu7Lj6-CxiSfRHq2juqHv4YOBOM_zIL9Auh&c=uzsccUxU_qcNwfIdLPf3ZiBi5QBm5Q-RfrjQbG0jupkh3oVpEMBzfQ==&ch=DX0PABb0kP0Ktn8bQnj_KFRHGrPQCIezyejihMepKMUJWCFSbB0d5A==)
---
| Peter,
As of today, there are just 66 days until Pennsylvania holds an obscure judicial election with life or death consequences, not only Pennsylvanians, but for every American who values democracy, rule of law, and human dignity.
The election is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where voters will determine whether or not to retain the three democratic justices who give Democrats the three vote majority on that court.
If MAGA takes the majority it means every blue Congressional district in PA will be erased through redistricting, a total abortion ban will be upheld, and unprecedented levels of voter suppression will deliver swing state PA to MAGA in the 2026 and 2028 elections.
Prospects for a Democratic victory here are looking bleak:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RMuXIra3-BpncyYc5EYphy3VaeWxZ6VtSxZ2FnmJSF96z5ubZVdUPgmJVEBkKDGgT1Z17daJR7MVNRVpu4EGkqznfoOXUzHSRmjeeI_VvEnxwC_MHBRlQHHNwkOujhUcTmZf2ZATvTj1eC92LLzDaRoLQ5Ys-naeYhBmLG0k85jDIlkCYeLElBSoCyU94Fu7Lj6-CxiSfRHq2juqHv4YOGWfvFsAvJbk&c=uzsccUxU_qcNwfIdLPf3ZiBi5QBm5Q-RfrjQbG0jupkh3oVpEMBzfQ==&ch=DX0PABb0kP0Ktn8bQnj_KFRHGrPQCIezyejihMepKMUJWCFSbB0d5A==)
---
Saddled with hundreds of millions in debt leftover from the Kamala Harris campaign, the DNC will be unable to intervene in this race and the consequences of this are already being felt.
The million voter registration lead that Democrats once held over Republicans in Pennsylvania has evaporated to less than a 40,000 voter lead and Republicans are on track to surpass us in the coming days. The GOP is also investing heavily into field, ads, and mail, whereas Democrats have yet to spent a dime.
We are barreling into a Pearl Harbor moment and no one is talking about it. Losing this election means we never win Pennsylvania again. Period.
Even if you don't live in Pennsylvania this matters.
[Defend Our Courts is scrambling to organize the defense of these Democratic justices but we are outnumbered, outgunned, and the cavalry from DC isn't coming. Can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us mount a comeback in the 66 remaining days until this critical election?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RMuXIra3-BpncyYc5EYphy3VaeWxZ6VtSxZ2FnmJSF96z5ubZVdUPgmJVEBkKDGg8we_NF0sgT8kTYQOBshxywUO3hwkwOmHPk4gMatIsWGUHOhvjJy6v8YeZoOdU92XkKRReprwLYA5qAd541lo8ol1rB_KniWdpa_2euqPsg5Ka802KP6fsbcyCK-ZDQcUiSpegeY5YFdg1fUwu3KiGmZfG1GEJ2kzM20DeDbZzH4=&c=uzsccUxU_qcNwfIdLPf3ZiBi5QBm5Q-RfrjQbG0jupkh3oVpEMBzfQ==&ch=DX0PABb0kP0Ktn8bQnj_KFRHGrPQCIezyejihMepKMUJWCFSbB0d5A==)
---
