clean_body: We are barreling into a Pearl Harbor moment and no one is talking about it. Losing this election means we never win Pennsylvania again. Period. | | | | | == | Peter, As of today, there are just 66 days until Pennsylvania holds an obscure judicial election with life or death consequences, not only Pennsylvanians, but for every American who values democracy, rule of law, and human dignity. The election is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court Election where voters will determine whether or not to retain the three democratic justices who give Democrats the three vote majority on that court. If MAGA takes the majority it means every blue Congressional district in PA will be erased through redistricting, a total abortion ban will be upheld, and unprecedented levels of voter suppression will deliver swing state PA to MAGA in the 2026 and 2028 elections. Prospects for a Democratic victory here are looking bleak: | | == Saddled with hundreds of millions in debt leftover from the Kamala Harris campaign, the DNC will be unable to intervene in this race and the consequences of this are already being felt. The million voter registration lead that Democrats once held over Republicans in Pennsylvania has evaporated to less than a 40,000 voter lead and Republicans are on track to surpass us in the coming days. The GOP is also investing heavily into field, ads, and mail, whereas Democrats have yet to spent a dime. We are barreling into a Pearl Harbor moment and no one is talking about it. Losing this election means we never win Pennsylvania again. Period. Even if you don't live in Pennsylvania this matters. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == We will not forget those that came to the aid of Pennsylvania when all seemed lost. No protection.

Friend,

**I want to try and get to Heaven.**** **
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!

But I believe that God saved me for one reason:**TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**

I wasn't supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 -- but I did.

I wasn't supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history -- but I did.

I certainly wasn't supposed to survive an assassin's bullet -- but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.

SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can't do it alone.

Friend, you've been with me through everything.

You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!

Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN 'T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**

The forces that hate our country don't want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we're not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.

**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**

I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.

Every time they count us out - count YOU out - we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.

This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.

_That 's why I've launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I'm asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_

Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen! But I believe that God saved me for one reason:TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! I wasn't supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 -- but I did. I wasn't supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history -- but I did. I certainly wasn't supposed to survive an assassin's bullet -- but by the grace of the almighty God, I did. SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can't do it alone. Friend, you've been with me through everything. You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more! Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, THAT DOESN 'T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS! The forces that hate our country don't want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we're not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT. Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER! I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU. Every time they count us out - count YOU out - we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before. This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country. That 's why I've launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I'm asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books! name: Brad Finstad
subject: Wishing you a safe and happy Labor Day weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, Labor Day is a time to pause and recognize the incredible contributions of America’s workers; the men and women whose grit, determination, and faith in the American dream built our communities and keep them strong today. Here in southern Minnesota, we know the value of hard work. From farmers in the field, to small business owners opening their doors each morning, to families working together to make ends meet, it’s that spirit of perseverance that makes our nation great. As we celebrate this holiday, let’s take pride in the values that bind us together: faith, family, freedom, and a belief that tomorrow can always be better than today. I’m grateful every day to serve you in Congress, and on this Labor Day weekend, I’m especially thankful for the opportunity to represent such hardworking, dedicated people. Wishing you and your family a safe and happy Labor Day weekend. Gratefully, Brad Finstad
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Mississippi’s Progress and the Push for School Choice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/msthriving-12849859?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
Next week, I’ll be traveling to Washington, D.C. talking about Mississippi’s remarkable progress, including our elimination of the income tax and how we might best advance school choice in our state.

**Mississippi is gaining national attention for our transformative public policies.** Once seen as a perennial underdog, our state is now recognized as a leader in free-market reforms that are driving unprecedented economic growth. **A****lot of folk in Washington and elsewhere are starting to notice our state for the right reasons! **

**Over the past five years, under Governor Tate Reeves’ leadership, we’ve achieved more economic progress than in the previous fifteen years combined, attracting massive investment.** The folk making the decisions to put their dollars into our state know success when they see it.

**This week, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy was honored with an award for our role in eliminating the income tax** —a milestone in a series of reforms, including labor market changes in 2021, flat tax implementation in 2022, and school funding reforms in 2023.

As I said in my speech when I accepted the award on behalf of our Mississippi team, together these reforms make a potent policy combination. **Click on the image below to hear what I said to the audience about Mississippi’s success story.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5fddefb965&e=5703353baa)
---
| **Now, we’re focused on the next critical step: school choice. **Momentum is building, and there’s strong support from Team Trump, who see it as “the civil rights issue of our time.”

This week, two senior Trump administration officials, Deputy Assistant Secretary Laurie Todd-Smith and Deputy Chief of Staff Lindsey Burke, visited Mississippi to advocate for education reform before the House Select Committee on Education Freedom. **Their compelling case was met with enthusiasm from parents, who outnumbered the entrenched status-quo lobbyists.**

Mississippi is on the cusp of ensuring every family has access to the educational opportunities their children deserve. Your support is vital as we work to make school choice a reality.

Thank you for standing with us.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4531b87d2d&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| Ps. My good friend (and God father to my daughter) Lord Daniel Hannan is speaking in Jackson in a few weeks. There are still a handful of places available – please come and listen to what he has to say! [Click here for the last remaining tickets](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=acce9c168b&e=5703353baa)
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=abb790b568) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=abb790b568).

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114273017/566515824/-664592562?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVmNWNkMS05Zjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_0Mh4IxqswmNUQruPypDldRYdDSsqgcdmTeis8EZ30=)
**➤➤ NEW: Trump leans on Putin to justify banning mail-in ballots** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114273019/566515825/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVmNWNkMS05Zjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_0Mh4IxqswmNUQruPypDldRYdDSsqgcdmTeis8EZ30=&emci=a2755b6f-1185-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9f5f5cd1-9f85-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)
* * *
This is appalling, friend. At this month's Alaska summit, Donald Trump stood beside Vladimir Putin and echoed his claim that mail-in voting makes elections “dishonest.” He even suggested that he agrees with Putin, and pushed a false claim that “no country has mail-in voting”. Let us say this clearly: **mail-in voting is safe, reliable, and used by Americans across the political spectrum.** Trump’s claims aren’t backed by evidence, they’re just parroting Putin’s aim to destabilize our democratic norms. This is exactly the kind of daylight Putin craves: sowing confusion, feigning legitimacy, and emboldening undemocratic tactics at home. **With vote-by-mail now facing _existential_ attacks, we just launched an urgent petition and need signatures from grassroots like you in 43614. That’s why we’re asking:** [**Will you add your name right now to stand against Trump’s attacks on vote-by-mail? We’re hoping to collect at least 5,000 signatures by midnight tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114273023/566515826/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVmNWNkMS05Zjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_0Mh4IxqswmNUQruPypDldRYdDSsqgcdmTeis8EZ30=&emci=a2755b6f-1185-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9f5f5cd1-9f85-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114273026/566515827/2009201802?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjVmNWNkMS05Zjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_0Mh4IxqswmNUQruPypDldRYdDSsqgcdmTeis8EZ30=&emci=a2755b6f-1185-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=9f5f5cd1-9f85-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=26828920)**

Thank you,
Team DASS

subject: From the desk of the Vice President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend, President Trump made his decision. I’ve made mine. And
now... we’re waiting on you.

This isn’t a routine announcement. It’s a strategic move that
could determine the balance of power in the Senate – and the future
of the America First movement.

The man President Trump just endorsed is a warrior. But he can’t win
this fight alone. The Liberal Cabal is already mobilizing – pouring
millions into targeted attacks and dark money operations to crush this
campaign before it begins.

We’ve all endorsed him. EXCEPT YOU.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/from-desk-of-vp-jdv-nr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=fromdeskofvp-jdv_jdvance_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250827_TW-5L.117501_t1695137-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

I’m not exaggerating when I say your endorsement might be the most
important one left. BECAUSE WE DON’T JUST NEED SUPPORTERS. WE NEED
BELIEVERS. FIGHTERS. PATRIOTS.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/from-desk-of-vp-jdv-nr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=fromdeskofvp-jdv_jdvance_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250827_TW-5L.117501_t1695137-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

finish this job.
ADD YOUR NAME TO THE OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT LIST >>
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/from-desk-of-vp-jdv-nr-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=fromdeskofvp-jdv_jdvance_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=true&ex_tid=20250827_TW-5L.117501_t1695137-575&utm_term=lrm-active]

clean_body: Friend, President Trump made his decision. I’ve made mine. And now... we’re waiting on you. This isn’t a routine announcement. It’s a strategic move that could determine the balance of power in the Senate – and the future of the America First movement. The man President Trump just endorsed is a warrior. But he can’t win this fight alone. The Liberal Cabal is already mobilizing – pouring millions into targeted attacks and dark money operations to crush this campaign before it begins. We’ve all endorsed him. EXCEPT YOU. [] I’m not exaggerating when I say your endorsement might be the most important one left. BECAUSE WE DON’T JUST NEED SUPPORTERS. WE NEED BELIEVERS. FIGHTERS. PATRIOTS. [] You were identified for a reason. You’re one of the few we trust to finish this job. ADD YOUR NAME TO THE OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT LIST >> [] There’s no room for hesitation. The future is on the line. For the fight, [] JD VANCE [] Vice President of the United States ENDORSE MIKE ROGERS >> [] [] Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.NRSC.org []

name: Team Ilhan
subject: We don’t have the luxury
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1785%2E791427%2EY96EHL)

Friend — Let’s get straight to the point.
We need to raise another $15,000 before tomorrow night, or we’ll miss our August fundraising goal before the deadline. That’s bad news for our ability to build a winning campaign for reelection and continue to fight Trump.
Now, for some campaigns, raising $15k is as easy as calling up a few billionaire donors or corporate lobbyists and asking for a check. They could raise $15k in a matter of minutes. **We don’t have that luxury.**
That’s because Ilhan Omar doesn’t accept these legalized bribes from the super-rich. She doesn’t want to be beholden to special interests in Congress. Her campaign is powered by grassroots donors who believe in our mission.
So for us, raising $15k will require hundreds of folks on this team stepping up with contributions of $5 or $10 at a time.
We have less than 48 hours until the deadline. We can smash our goal right now if even just 5% of the people reading this email chipped in today.
**[Please, make your first contribution to Ilhan Omar today and help us get back on track to hit our goal before midnight tomorrow. This is a people-powered campaign, which means the help of supporters like will make or break our efforts to beat the far-right and fight for our progressive values.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250830-1-180&t=2&akid=1785%2E791427%2EY96EHL)

name: Fight Like Hell PAC HQ
subject: 3 Reasons before tomorrow’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
This deadline is coming fast, and we’re short of our goal |
#
---
Team, **[With just one day left before the August fundraising deadline, we’re humbly asking you to pitch in a donation to Fight Like Hell PAC. Every donation, no matter the size, helps Governor Whitmer share her message and deliver results for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114281438/566540045/-2020768204?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkOTBiNTMtYTM4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zzepFnOpkon9E0jZ6UWU2qqKt0AE14ETVlQm5s57hKc=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114281442/566540056/1700965107?refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2RkOTBiNTMtYTM4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zzepFnOpkon9E0jZ6UWU2qqKt0AE14ETVlQm5s57hKc=)
---
Your support before the deadline will make a huge difference. Here’s why:
1. **Governor Whitmer knows how to win.** She won her last election by _over 10 points_ — and that wasn’t by chance. She wrote the playbook on how to win, and we’re sharing the most successful strategies by training candidates running for office and their staff across the country.
2. **Election season is heating up now.** Winning the toughest races requires year-round investment, organizing, and voter outreach. With the summer coming to an end, everything ramps up from here on out.
3. **The other side is already attacking us.** The DeVos political machine is reaching hundreds of thousands of voters with baseless attacks against Governor Whitmer, and they’re poised to spend millions more. We can’t let these attacks go unanswered.

Governor Whitmer has worked tirelessly to make Michigan the best place to live, work, and raise a family. She’s created good-paying jobs, defended reproductive freedom, and delivered real results by working with leaders on both sides of the aisle.
But the stakes couldn’t be higher, and grassroots donations are a _huge_ part of our work. The truth is that we’ve got a ways to go to reach our fundraising goal, so we have to ask:
**[Will you chip in before tomorrow’s deadline to help Governor Whitmer kick off September in the strongest possible position? clean_body: This deadline is coming fast, and we’re short of our goal | Team, = | | = Your support before the deadline will make a huge difference. Here’s why: 1. Governor Whitmer knows how to win. She won her last election by over 10 points — and that wasn’t by chance. She wrote the playbook on how to win, and we’re sharing the most successful strategies by training candidates running for office and their staff across the country. 2. Election season is heating up now. Winning the toughest races requires year-round investment, organizing, and voter outreach. With the summer coming to an end, everything ramps up from here on out. 3. The other side is already attacking us. The DeVos political machine is reaching hundreds of thousands of voters with baseless attacks against Governor Whitmer, and they’re poised to spend millions more. We can’t let these attacks go unanswered. Governor Whitmer has worked tirelessly to make Michigan the best place to live, work, and raise a family. She’s created good-paying jobs, defended reproductive freedom, and delivered real results by working with leaders on both sides of the aisle. But the stakes couldn’t be higher, and grassroots donations are a huge part of our work. The truth is that we’ve got a ways to go to reach our fundraising goal, so we have to ask: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = — Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. subject: BOMBSHELL Leaked Call: WaPo Stung!
body:
We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG. This exposes media bias at its worst. Our citizen journalists catch this in real time and stories like this keep coming because of you.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1470198/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVlI2ajZLc1d2Uw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MzA/LbmNsWE1BU3IxNA/qP2hpZHM9bmM2dndTWVJCczVsZGFscw/gaLL7DQ/s7i0f138a79)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Dear Patriot,

**We just dropped a bombshell leaked call at OMG.**

[**Watch here and please help OMG break through the mainstream by donating as much as you can today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
A former Trump pageant contestant reached out to us after the _Washington Post_ contacted her. **They wanted dirt on President Trump from his pageant days**. But she had only good things to say – Trump was kind and a true gentleman.

She recorded the call with Matt Viser, WaPo's White House Bureau Chief. He admitted: "If all we had was people saying Trump was a gentleman... **we wouldn't do that story**."

They only chase negative angles, **ignoring the truth if it doesn't fit their agenda**.

**This exposes media bias at its worst.**

The Post is out to "expose" Trump, **even linking to Epstein without proof**. But when faced with positive facts? They drop it.

Our citizen journalists catch this in real time.

Stories like this keep coming because of you.

**[**Our August drive needs your help**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** to fund more leaks and undercover ops and keep the leaks like this coming our way.

**We hold the media accountable – no matter who they target.**

[**Can you donate today? Just $25 powers our next big reveal.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

_Please Donate Now_

Thanks for fighting with us. The truth wins when we stand together.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Sharing my story with you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Aphasia may make it harder for me to speak, but I have not lost my voice.
#

Friends --
Fourteen years ago, a gunman shot me in the head while I was meeting with constituents in front of a grocery store in Tucson.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=1&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)
Because of the damage the bullet caused to the left hemisphere of my brain, where the language function sits, I have aphasia. This means that even though the words are in my head, I have a hard time getting them out.
**Aphasia may make it harder for me to speak. But I have not lost my voice.**
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=2&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)
The road to recovery hasn’t been easy for me, but I’ve never given up. In addition to speech therapy and physical therapy, I dedicate much of my time to riding my bike, playing my French horn, and practicing yoga. These activities have helped me so much in my recovery journey.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=3&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)
I know sometimes the challenge of ending gun violence in our nation can feel overwhelming. When we see the headlines after a mass shooting -- or when we remember the countless tragedies that don’t make the news every day -- I know how hard it can be.
But friends, we can’t give up. I have found my recovery journey and the fight to end gun violence to be very similar.**Even on the hardest days, we can never lose hope.**
We are officially at the halfway point of the quarter. Our FEC fundraising deadlines are a critical test for the gun safety movement, as both our adversaries and our allies will be looking to see if we have the resources to take on the gun lobby and elect gun safety champions.
So this is where I need to ask for your help:
[**Will you make your first contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? We can’t reach our quarterly fundraising goals without your help.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=4&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&amount=3&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=23&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-aug25.8KHFUP&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=24&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-aug25.J5-c7V&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=25&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-aug25.DZaPyu&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=26&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-aug25.Yj6wVz&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=27&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-aug25.bPjs74&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=28&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**
---
****
Thank you for all that you do in this fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug25.6hMzIw&refcode=em250830-1-b&t=29&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=10831%2E3935704%2EMUHsVw) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Georgia HQ
subject: The reality we’re seeing in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=Vgkt%2B%2BsB7krakU1Bq%2BtAdN9XAOUXStHtCm2TNL01hfg5up%2F4pdkTkk8pM4%2Bvfcs6tZKal%2BmJAvoNg84UKP%2BUgwCKYQmcCWgPRiyFqSKAGCg7F%2BF1gS8RbcpE9rz0THzlFmmw%2Bf42dBEqtpTsDKHHOu%2FPgvWvQrkUkLpEQl1K28%2BJxtAj%2BzGUcUDVvZHKF1xHfru3QOoWXav56rv3qe4%2Fz4vSWKEE1StS1HP7qAzCYa5olkPXuvtpAsAN5dB8pS3yBWFqsg%2BEYuKjjK015wYzENV8oQqYOsPdbuFS6vZt%2F315xHjNTrFxh84uE6dCbV3%2BlKpYRRXWgXH94kCEH1PCqPNoMOM9zjsV2Hnprnf8zF7VlwF8N4Nxco0od0G4TvoDb9ygByj3zKsnLhj%2F2xFs7ldI1U5jTSxSruBXuEjyICeHksoVr8oh9N2%2F%2FrHnSHe3)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114286345/566548918/2021534627?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_083025_EOM4_D4_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzNjNjI2OC1hNTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l1wFGoUvXadHDsPDVAhAUfRDJKksXLnM0cukvDcIzgQ=)
---
Peter, Republicans are scrambling to do damage control to win back Georgians after stripping away our healthcare and driving up costs while giving tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. Recently, JD Vance visited the Peach State to try to convince voters that the Big Billionaire Bill was actually a good thing — **_but we aren’t buying it._** **Here's what Georgians are actually experiencing:** good-paying jobs are harder to come by, wages aren't rising to keep up with the cost of groceries and bills, and we're feeling the instability of Donald Trump's tariff policies in the market. The Republican majority will continue to sacrifice Georgians for the people they really serve — _the one percent._ That's exactly why we need to prepare and build the resources to organize — so we can flip the Senate blue in 2026 before Republicans rig the political field any further. We need to reach our end-of-month goal so we can start the last month of the quarter strong and show Republicans that we are not backing down. name: Adam
subject: A message from a regular guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=022d018139f9437ebffc6b04f1a56785&_e=cyOWq8XPDaHLI-3AHauc4wOVOf0g4mvqGMg89MFXWvi614t4NR-8WNrNHYcvobC_oUy4d3WGgDUUHEBGnqOC8wmJvdwKNjKprWQMhDP0kOhd7Cl1k1pWrrnd39E9aERGILqGCSJ2qy8uFpdIVC8kNt72MhjliKw4zbnRsxPOsH9njyq8WQY6oqDpkD9OsdeDRUojS20XHZOppgZmcWjDxVy7DvKWUKnSLU8gKUKVlBOEp0zv7fT07zSvGGDvBkBbg6VpuTtWn4Ypy-B0aEp2It12fKaOgitBbkJM9w_wpIl5CiJYWugbV0yAqWlcBaemPVJedN7B6UOqXTdPVn71LEq0lfPcXm927V_O8UOOUHAq2TwRL0CiDKoEQ3zm3_sFlc9Q0enyo02JOzFavEyw2F19w6sAVW5Ds7Dx0U1uXt-Uv1MRuyEmFZlFDey3-07xT8hYgGIwvQ1bCgDieQjryR1Iqv8RVl3K7AwekHuhRSoR-SHn5qmFggMZA87yVnucXuMebUS2Qd1WrBFJZ1Q2BdUpzEjPw1RFsdGr8Il7eVMgvLwvYKqTyHVecIzuOBf0YNBILKQX-m6uuYRUJVCHZyC8ecIiFnTPQ4QlzFJ9PBs8xByI2Mqe5KK0MnkCOHo5H4yGkcLwsdTghy2h5rcy1BZYE9drJtK09JjyiIHB8DMvSECkoUEGwnhouIvzD6kBYKBBQiBwzBxBriy7jESH-SAuVEsj5NJ70cjtUAyltKjhPAntcmhjTEBvmt8AHwrZMB6yYG7nudXQIMU0InmTDA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

clean_body: As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. | Fellow Conservative, You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen. I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation. Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms. I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love. Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate. But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat. I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is quietly building its war chest. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters. It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington. As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on. Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable. I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values. With steadfast resolve, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. name: Chris Pappas
subject: This is just the beginning of Trump’s authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We’ve all seen the headlines.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2113%2E582294%2EKrVhfJ)
We’ve all seen the headlines.
Donald Trump is flagrantly abusing his power — sending the National Guard into D.C.’s streets and threatening to do the same in cities across the country.
Democrats are fighting back, but let’s be honest: If we don’t flip the Senate in 2026, there will be no real check on his increasingly authoritarian behavior.
I’m running for Senate to stand up to Donald Trump and his administration and fight for New Hampshire, but I can’t do it alone.
New Hampshire’s race could decide Senate control. The stakes are that high.
[**If you’re ready to stand up to Trump and protect our democracy, I hope you’ll contribute $5 or anything you can before our August end-of-month deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250830_1_eom?refcode=em20250830-2113&amount=5&refcode2=2113_582294_KrVhfJ&akid=2113%2E582294%2EKrVhfJ)

Chris

name: Martin Sheen
subject: re: Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail
body:
#

[
---
Peter, it’s Martin Sheen. You may know me from my roles as an actor — _including a former fictional president_ — but today I’m reaching out about Jon Ossoff’s critical reelection campaign in Georgia. My character in _The West Wing_ famously said, **"Decisions are made by those who show up."** _And, Peter, I have made it my mission to take that lesson from the big screen and into my day to day life._ So, let me tell you a bit about why I think it’s _**so important_** to show up for Jon Ossoff today: Jon is the only Democratic Senator up for reelection in a state Donald Trump won in 2024. That makes him Republican’s #1 target in 2026 — and we _know_ the GOP establishment will do whatever it takes to flip his Senate seat red. **Peter, we cannot afford to lose Jon’s leadership.** He’s a tireless fighter for working families and a watchdog for government corruption. At a time like this — when our President consistently acts against the best interests of the American people and works to enrich himself — we need someone like Jon advocating for us in the Senate. But Jon and his team can’t do this alone. He needs supporters, like you and me, to __show up_ and stand with him. _ [**Please, if you’re able, will you donate $5 right now to help reelect Jon so he can continue fighting for Georgia and our democracy in the Senate?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250830-1-f&t=2&akid=702%2E5691347%2Ei-vOk5) **[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250830-1-f&t=3&akid=702%2E5691347%2Ei-vOk5)** Thank you for standing with Jon and I in this fight. Martin Sheen
Paid for by Jon Ossoff for SenateThis email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=702%2E5691347%2Ei-vOk5) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=702%2E5691347%2Ei-vOk5) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: you deserve an explanation

body:
Here is the truth:

In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee to help us pass the Election Rigging Response Act. But before we do, you deserve an explanation about why this request -- especially today -- is so important.
Here is the truth:
Our opponents are already hammering us with ads -- all funded by one person with a history of funding extremist candidates and causes. We have to respond ... and fast.
So when our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close tomorrow at midnight, we are going to take stock of the resources we have and make some difficult decisions about how soon we can start our paid ads without risking our ability to keep them up through the election.
We're looking for as many donations as we can get to go as big as we possibly can, and we can't do that without your support. So please:
[**Use this link to make a contribution to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee. Our average online donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that we're getting as many donations as we possibly can before midnight tonight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250830&refcode2=2508_4767699_8xN_eb&akid=2508%2E4767699%2E8xN_eb)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fb8a32f48e14c8e8a50b9a024c08e95&_e=D4uDTFQLRC36GP1xmjGhwnjUHSKSgt01AelGz8_ip-6q5dWasdIlSirC0obqW_-avZr52EsrorEpgD0p0d44MwJq--IYMNJXiowFhuMYSQSAws7BiDFMez8AY09yaNxJE0DVBAiQX28BQ21XV-_SDIDFu-5KvQ9_oJ4LzwkAKb-XYwAxkVyfUOw-3IjLCvjo5Y2W14JZW4C5fwOnF4JOU87A3EUWsws7pm-7-QcAwbIUTrEU_CxmWm_wI9LIELv12zip9GaItJJvxplaEXxdNvjJrsYF2AQvN9Q_Wx2bNHT9FZAobG0cSGJxrGY9USILfWl3MVcIJbpCA5oHQXb60j0y8t7D0CvFddEIMm5lCwqtkCcsKHQSyGMYNUd9-1FT4o04JHdJMdUBigIUrMDpSXVe8_6Ah0MmccMyLYn5gxNhK_9fqxIl89g_rf-cQAB_u3vMDWo9HuVO-8G-I4GwnRVR5xt0tDIGkAA4bhhEf1sJow4SyOqAnJGeOxC2JHCAYE-rsVdN5lO7hJr5i4RdiOkLa2Vzou6TvrO_Pow6XwQJF1RuNPyKoxhXrnvk5ePm2fYOmnoX07IE-qGhzL8ZpzpTWqioUUx7RQDMIyMDFOQHdKV3N8VEi8Z776Qusbtd)

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fb8a32f48e14c8e8a50b9a024c08e95&_e=D4uDTFQLRC36GP1xmjGhwnjUHSKSgt01AelGz8_ip-6q5dWasdIlSirC0obqW_-avZr52EsrorEpgD0p0d44MwJq--IYMNJXiowFhuMYSQSAws7BiDFMez8AY09yaNxJE0DVBAiQX28BQ21XV-_SDIDFu-5KvQ9_oJ4LzwkAKb_vb1i-zr6cZ5UpL_41BiPlySVaiTW91XYampwjSsZkV7bA1aO09OTA3KfU3inGttnsYnwJFs3lFpqnQ9ISQPPobB03zEeWkqgppjSS1nldIArn4pSe1wd2DXkVmoP2GKZlLVLizn5at_oV40-ANO5fB-jzWgAt_wt7-e_sDTHxYlteSKRQFs8Q64EAhd9bU7XvvjR1hcuwZo46rG9czp1zwDCjIdKWoBV_OMOJ2XjyvLvwaZcQ6p8OIKAY59pdiDA06oAvjkE1kohKnmw7sEbHDr1Adf3-gyV6ZwmTU_DCQr1Uacq9tyw2qTYYOmmcq6DvGXaalU4myEsD8OymPohQYwg5SAgzGd8Jb1yMf0cV8bR2_woyzxFa7K9PjiFnrFrbyjihow8xakC5CXhn3NaCjHvQBp6CWn03Wq00Qo2U_fTU_FPhcTjoCRW6I6JTTEhAtqx9m2aYOwcO-DptlXQW)

[Donate Now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fb8a32f48e14c8e8a50b9a024c08e95&_e=D4uDTFQLRC36GP1xmjGhwnjUHSKSgt01AelGz8_ip-6q5dWasdIlSirC0obqW_-avZr52EsrorEpgD0p0d44MwJq--IYMNJXiowFhuMYSQSAws7BiDFMez8AY09yaNxJE0DVBAiQX28BQ21XV-_SDIDFu-5KvQ9_oJ4LzwkAKb8wQ25kXk6o-rVw-19k6-GuC5FLnTwjWDT_QwN5gqFttia1x9l1uI7T7usjhGjMgwbH9ksBof_J4pwqxVEhUskCxStEMgsfclv2QFgvDWttakmdnPU1SWe4qKg4Z-kcswrEnh2QVodDzl_lahChimMI86U1oYgHhY89GEiHJeXpb4cNc6G1lFm54-CHqeH4HOBfe8HGLKOoR5KmbPuydnncunNvE-cAJNGP0R3daW06SN6OyeFt91vwYKiti4kxwhEnJbfKQkR29c1kJVsmk8P-Cwqwn8AHu4tF80e0X6lhD_8JuMMA27vJtuG3QUNOBfEh4_zf_R_K3dMY65hFvwI2hEkEJdQg-zTlD39rjeEc2d1oezlkwx-dasTIjizuYFQC1etmh9hC-1Bkj-B6qbkAFA3_7K366uysjxP7druNR4jrlkIOYa7OZBEo2j6lCw1mQrdf9ege-JscltZ8k-IhjdlsJbT-aOoMZSq8giIaWQ%3D%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5fb8a32f48e14c8e8a50b9a024c08e95&_e=D4uDTFQLRC36GP1xmjGhwnjUHSKSgt01AelGz8_ip-6q5dWasdIlSirC0obqW_-avZr52EsrorEpgD0p0d44MwJq--IYMNJXiowFhuMYSQSAws7BiDFMez8AY09yaNxJE0DVBAiQX28BQ21XV-_SDIDFu-5KvQ9_oJ4LzwkAKb_5q68o6d3EvozQaGYeeKfKQKTGMHBiocFu9vbToYwvFUotkWMxBJB6SoF1lu6HPUtYrjc2PZ1D5hzwLm0tXMrmsrPPa9ICZoWGZ1qLOIgs_C9Kiqh0SkuxWnuuZR1Ne-LLtCLNsUrx0Y6T0M3ReJOrR7y_BwyJbcHS0qbrvbLOT_yxtivVG5fX5jRRmeiMoqK2FAalmfnzV-Ww_ZHbiLViBo4fiCmERDTCpR5Anugs4Llm6yozYRR7lMid86qPxdlclC7eRmenrZwzSSCScfLk4qHNUvqqKFuOywvUg_hQYesCzSiaqxnkiHZ1z8fwlWuVQWaimKzll6KPjFOQNZQTASsqwT07juKA6_y_qDBWPqcTCksLchbCTmKrKrtjSVn6yKNYvewWoZKE3JjTTWxfbPH7Pxa4V7su0AKrOFOsrIJAwIX5qZ-bKbXKN8YLTOTDY_XulvXBWOB6gmZmvbAR)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: You were on my mind the other day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
I wrote you this letter to show my deep appreciation for you!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend** **Top Patriot in your hometown**

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Dear Friend,
As I was flying aboard Air Force One the other day, I couldn’t help but reflect on the incredible journey we’ve taken together.
We’ve been through it all — rallies that shook the political establishment, victories the experts called impossible, witch hunts that tried to break us, and endless attacks from the radical left.
And in spite of every storm we’ve faced down, one truth has remained: YOU never left my side.
You’ve been there when the Fake News said we were finished. You stood strong when the Democrats thought they could divide us. You gave me strength when the weight of these battles was heaviest. And together, we showed the entire world that this movement cannot be stopped.
Now, more than 200 days into this historic fight to save America once again, I want to hear directly from you.
**[I want to know what you think about our progress, our victories, and the road ahead. That’s why I’m asking you — personally — to take my 200 Days Survey.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Your voice has always been the heartbeat of this movement. When history is written about these times, it won’t just be about me flying on Air Force One or fighting in courtrooms — it will be about millions of patriots like YOU who refused to quit.
**[So today, I’m asking you to make your voice heard again. Take the survey. Show the world that this movement is stronger than ever.>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
Together, we will finish this fight. Together, we will Make America Great Again.
Sincerely,
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Donald J. Trump

President of the United States
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

subject: Fighting Misinformation

Dear Friend,
Earlier this week, I joined _Fox New Business_ to talk about one of the most important issues we’re facing in Washington: President Trump’s Big, Beautiful Bill.
On air, I made it clear: this legislation has real potential to deliver for hardworking families in Wisconsin and across the country. Despite the misleading claims from Governor Evers and Democrats trying to muddy the waters, I reminded viewers that **this bill puts taxpayers first and politics second.**
I meant every word. Washington doesn’t need more games, it needs leaders willing to stand firm, speak the truth, and deliver results. That’s what I’ve done, and that’s what I’ll keep doing.
But here’s the truth: I can’t do it alone. I need your help to push back against the misinformation and to keep advancing our conservative agenda.
If you believe in what we’re fighting for, [will you chip in $20, $50, or even $100 or more today?](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=8fe4fde14e&e=561a28864e)
Together, we can make sure Wisconsin’s values are represented in Washington—and ensure that common sense and accountability win the day.
Thank you for standing with me.
Sincerely,
Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin’s Fifth Congressional District
P.S. The other side with Governor Evers is already working overtime to distort the facts. With your support, we can make sure the truth and our conservative vision prevails. [Please click here to contribute today.](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=ca445d1a25&e=561a28864e)

Federal law requires the committee to use its best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year.

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Earlier this week, I joined Fox New Business to talk about one of the most important issues we’re facing in Washington: President Trump’s Big, Beautiful Bill. On air, I made it clear: this legislation has real potential to deliver for hardworking families in Wisconsin and across the country. Despite the misleading claims from Governor Evers and Democrats trying to muddy the waters, I reminded viewers that this bill puts taxpayers first and politics second. I meant every word. Washington doesn’t need more games, it needs leaders willing to stand firm, speak the truth, and deliver results. That’s what I’ve done, and that’s what I’ll keep doing. But here’s the truth: I can’t do it alone. I need your help to push back against the misinformation and to keep advancing our conservative agenda. If you believe in what we’re fighting for, Together, we can make sure Wisconsin’s values are represented in Washington—and ensure that common sense and accountability win the day. Thank you for standing with me. Sincerely, Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin’s Fifth Congressional District P.S. The other side with Governor Evers is already working overtime to distort the facts. With your support, we can make sure the truth and our conservative vision prevails. | | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Scott Fitzgerald for Congress. All rights reserved.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Please read before the weekend, Peter
body:
You probably have a lot of unread emails, but I hope you’ll open this one.
Peter, if your email inbox looks anything like mine, you’ve probably got a bunch of unopened emails from campaigns asking for help before the end-of-month this weekend.
I hope you’ll take a moment to let me explain why our campaign here in New Jersey really does need your support:
**1) We’re one of only two governor’s races that will be decided in 2025.** The election is just over two months away. “Fall short of our goal but hope to make up for it later” isn’t an option right now, Peter — because there is no “later” for us. Either we get the resources to get our message out on TV, online, and in person starting immediately, or we don’t.
**2) Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are going to do everything they can to defeat me in this race.** Trump has already endorsed my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and led a rally for him — meaning MAGA money from all over the country is going to pour into Ciattarelli’s campaign. Not to mention, Ciattarelli’s being supported by a MAGA super PAC that’s pouring millions of dollars into negative ads that make one false assertion after another about my record and my character.
**3) Polls show what was already a close race getting even tighter.** Ciattarelli’s super PAC has been attacking me relentlessly for weeks, and it’s clearly having an impact, Peter. These polls also show that over 10% of voters are still undecided — so if we don’t get our message out to them before Ciattarelli does, losing doesn’t just become a risk. It becomes a likelihood.
**[Peter, the end-of-month is coming up tomorrow night, and it’s so important that we are on track to hit our August fundraising goals. If you could split a donation between my campaign and Wes Moore before tomorrow to help us catch up to our goal, I would be extremely thankful →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250830-1?refcode=em-20250830-1&refcode2=516_1086043_gL1StE&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)**
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250830-1?amount=10&refcode=em-20250830-1&refcode2=516_1086043_gL1StE&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)**
Thanks, and have a great weekend.
-Mikie
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250830-1?refcode=em-20250830-1&refcode2=516_1086043_gL1StE&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250830-1&t=1&refcode2=516_1086043_gL1StE&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=516%2E1086043%2EgL1StE)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Please, let me explain.
body:
|
#
Friend, I’m sure you’ve been getting a ton of emails lately, including these ones from our campaign. I figured I owe you an explanation as to why we’re reaching out to you so often. So, if you’ve got a minute, please: let me explain why I’m in this fight in the first place. **Here it goes:** I grew up in Portland, Michigan. My dad worked construction – 70 to 80 hours a week during the season, snow removal when it got cold. He didn’t mind getting calluses on his hands if it meant putting food on the table. Thanks to him and my mom, my sisters and I were the first in our family to go to college. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114291525/566558166/1362877131?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU5ZDI5Yy1hOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8STXyWGv0pQdkE2X1RaHvfoNKj89O5IBFOSu_9Wt4Y=) _My dad, sister, and me. _ That experience shaped everything I’ve done since: from leading Head Start programs to serving at the Michigan Department of Education, to ultimately running for Congress, I’ve spent my career fighting to make it a little easier for working families. **Unfortunately, we all see that the playing field is increasingly stacked against working families.** Child care costs are up. Groceries are too expensive. Public schools are under pressure, and too many families are being forced to make tradeoffs they shouldn’t have to make. Since I was sworn in earlier this year, I’ve been focused on changing that – from fighting to keep our local Social Security office open to pushing back against cuts to SNAP and Medicaid, you have my word that I’ll never stop showing up for the families who need someone in their corner. But none of this has stopped national Republicans from attacking me with nearly a **million dollars** in attack ads... In fact, it’s put a target on my back. They see this district as critical to winning the House Majority, and for Democrats to win, we need to win here. [**So friend, I hope that explains why you’ve been hearing from us so often. Because the truth is, we can’t afford to fall behind. Not now. And if you’re still with me – and you’re in a position to chip in, your $3 donation would mean a lot**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114291532/566558173/1362877131?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU5ZDI5Yy1hOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8STXyWGv0pQdkE2X1RaHvfoNKj89O5IBFOSu_9Wt4Y=)[**.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114291540/566558179/1362877131?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU5ZDI5Yy1hOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8STXyWGv0pQdkE2X1RaHvfoNKj89O5IBFOSu_9Wt4Y=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114291551/566558245/1362877131?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGU5ZDI5Yy1hOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E8STXyWGv0pQdkE2X1RaHvfoNKj89O5IBFOSu_9Wt4Y=)**

name: Elissa Slotkin for Michigan
subject: A great rebuke to Betsy DeVos...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Remember her? She's back.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2339%2E135344%2Ewp83_P)

Remember her?
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug25.4NDLve&refcode=em250630-1%2F&t=2&akid=2339%2E135344%2Ewp83_P)
She's back.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-aug25.4NDLve&refcode=em250630-1&t=3&akid=2339%2E135344%2Ewp83_P)
With a plan to spend huge sums of money to flip Michigan's statewide races red in 2026.
Here is the truth:
The DeVos family has always supported Elissa's opponents – and Elissa has defeated them every time.
In the next election, Elissa will have a leading role in making sure Democrats win up and down the state – to hold the Senate seat, retain the governorship, and flip the seats Democrats need to take back the House.

Peter,

We’re 1 day from our end of the month deadline, and this is about more than a number on a spreadsheet.

Every extra dollar Rhode Islanders are forced to spend at the grocery store because of Trump’s tariffs is money they don’t have for rent, bills, or savings. It’s a tax on the middle class, plain and simple.

Seth is pushing to end these tariffs. But to keep fighting for my community in Rhode Island and across the country, he needs our grassroots team with him.

body:
When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114293113/566562647/1703322652?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5591-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzM2Q1MS1hYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlT_TlV_QSxl0nOfGZjTGGIjaRBS84FfW14O1rFNO6M=)
Friend: When you love this country, you fight for the people who make it work. These words have guided my life in public service.
So it pains me to see everyday folks working harder than ever but still falling behind – while D.C. politicians give handout after handout to their wealthy donors and corporate special interest friends.
**That’s why I’m getting back in this fight. I’m launching my campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio.[Will you chip in $5 or more before my first end-of-month deadline – split between Jacky Rosen and me – to help fuel our grassroots movement and flip Ohio’s Senate seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114293114/566562648/1703322652?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5591-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzM2Q1MS1hYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlT_TlV_QSxl0nOfGZjTGGIjaRBS84FfW14O1rFNO6M=)**

I never planned to run for office again. But I see what’s happening in Washington, and I can’t sit on the sidelines. Right now, no one in the Senate seems to be working for the people of Ohio, and that’s a job that I know I can do.
This isn’t about left versus right. It’s about who you fight for – and who you’re willing to stand up to.
When we fought to save the pensions of tens-of-thousands of Ohio retirees, we stood up to Wall Street and _won_. When we fought to cap insulin prices and bring down the cost of prescription drugs, we stood up to Big Pharma and won.
Together, we can build an economy where hard work pays off and where everyone has a shot at a decent life – but I need you in my corner from day one.
**Our Senate race is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2026, and corporate special interests will spend millions of dollars to defeat me. The only way I can fight back and win is with your grassroots support.**
**[I’m personally asking, friend: If you believe in my vision for a brighter, fairer future for all, will you chip in $5 now – split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s – to help me to help me hit my first end-of-month goal, win in Ohio, and deliver for workers across the country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114293121/566562653/1703322652?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5591-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzM2Q1MS1hYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zlT_TlV_QSxl0nOfGZjTGGIjaRBS84FfW14O1rFNO6M=)**
Thank you for standing with me.

In solidarity,

Sherrod Brown
|

name: Greg Casar
subject: I’m not going anywhere. I’m officially running for reelection in Austin.
body:
This is a tough moment for Texas, and our country. But know this: I’m not going anywhere.
#
Peter,
After weeks of political protest and resistance by Texas Democrats, Donald Trump and Greg Abbott have passed their racially gerrymandered maps through both the Texas House and Senate.
These maps are designed to protect Trump from accountability by silencing communities of color, suppressing the votes of millions of Black, Latino, and working-class Texans, and pushing progressive voices like mine out of Congress.
Peter, this is a tough moment for Texas, and our country. But I need you to hear this from me:
**I’m not going anywhere. I’m officially running for re-election in Austin.**
Trump and Abbott may want to redraw the lines to serve their agenda and silence our progressive movement, but I’ve spent my adult life standing shoulder to shoulder with working people in Austin, Texas — and I’m not backing down now.
This movement is too important. Our communities are too powerful. And our fight is far from over.
**[If you are with me, please split a $5 contribution between Justice Democrats and my campaign to help us start our reelection campaign off on the right foot.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250830-gc?refcode=em20250830-36973&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36973_1203867_Qs3vX7&akid=36973%2E1203867%2EQs3vX7)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250830-gc?refcode=em20250830-36973&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36973_1203867_Qs3vX7&akid=36973%2E1203867%2EQs3vX7)**
No matter how they redraw the lines, we will never stop fighting for our communities, for justice, and for progress.
In solidarity,
Greg
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250830-gc?refcode=em20250830-36973&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36973_1203867_Qs3vX7&akid=36973%2E1203867%2EQs3vX7)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250830-36973-footer&t=2&refcode2=36973_1203867_Qs3vX7&akid=36973%2E1203867%2EQs3vX7)**
