clean_body: Fellow Patriot, I was at the Capitol on January 6th. I didn't see an "insurrection." I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in. What I didn't expect -- what none of us could've imagined -- was the brutal retaliation that followed... Since that day, I've watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists. After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough. Some are still rotting in jail today. Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them. They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible. That's why I produced the films Capitol Punishment and The War on Truth and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance. They're helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly -- hope. These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs. Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated. But the media doesn't want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an "insurrection" while ignoring the peaceful majority. The government wants them forgotten. But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten, Fellow Patriot. With gratitude, Nick Searcy P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties in finding a job, Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm, Harassment on social media and in their personal lives, Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison, And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.** But they can't do it without you. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599.

clean_body: | | | WOOF! It’s Milo, Daisy, and Coco, with Dogs for Guzman. We haven’t seen as much of our mom Elizabeth Guzman lately, because she’s knocking hundreds of doors a week to flip VA-HD22. We like walks, but that’s too much for us in a day to keep up with. But it’s alright! We have a special request for you: can you Winning this race would expand the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates and deliver a nationally-watched defeat of Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans. Also, according to Coco, our expert bill tracker ... as a Delegate, our mom voted to ban any humans with an animal cruelty conviction from working at a pet shop or as a commercial dog breeder. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Woof! \- Milo, Daisy, and Coco | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. name: Wes Moore
subject: Chicken hawks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again.
It's Governor Wes Moore.
I heard Donald Trump is going after me for telling the truth, so here it is again: Deploying the National Guard in D.C. lacks seriousness and is deeply dangerous.
**I don’t listen to criticism from chicken hawks.**
People who talk tough but have never worn a uniform besides Brooks Brothers suits should not use our service members for political games.
As the commander-in-chief of the Maryland National Guard, I know what they are trained on. I know what it means to ask someone to put their life at risk, and what that means you are asking of their families. This political ploy isn’t it.
If the White House wants to get serious about public safety, they should talk to us. We’ve achieved some of the most impressive drops in violent crime in the country and Baltimore is the safest it's been in 50 years.
[**This stunt by the Trump administration is BS, and it has to stop – if you’re with me, please split a contribution between my campaign and Congresswoman Sarah McBride.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/partner-ms-wes-em-mcb?refcode=em20250830-2304&refcode2=2304_21716_tLcCeE&akid=2304%2E21716%2EtLcCeE)

name: Dennis Speed
subject: Manhattan Town Hall: An “Alaska Moment”Presents Itself in Asia—Putin, Xi, Trump Must Meet!
body:
Join the Manhattan Project Today at 2pm EST!

| | | [ ](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HM6Vx3bJFWn0kHCKwY0V20z&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_8_30_25_a&n=1)
---
## An “Alaska Moment” Presents Itself in Asia—Putin, Xi, Trump Must Meet!
#### Feat. Harley Schlanger and Mike Robinson
# [](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPohXlMnhlf3okwXb72na6V-kpGq1qULkBBczC5AHFHXO0P0z13PgOkpaWUIWRhSQZWXRjhEcFy9n7S73YsXSlRg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_8_30_25_a&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPohXlMnhlf3okwXb72na6V-kpGq1qULkBBczC5AHFHXO0P0z13PgOkpaWUIWRhSQZWXRjhEcFy9n7S73YsXSlRg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_8_30_25_a&n=3 "Watch on Rumble!") [Watch on Rumble!](https://www.laroucheorganization.com/r?u=gFB7Tylx1fPa2jOHrKCBPohXlMnhlf3okwXb72na6V-kpGq1qULkBBczC5AHFHXO0P0z13PgOkpaWUIWRhSQZWXRjhEcFy9n7S73YsXSlRg&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=manhattan_project_8_30_25_a&n=3)
---
Friend
---
While the Collective West remains gripped by the policies of militarism, financial austerity, and cultural decay, there are major events underway shifting the course of humanity away from colonialism and into a new paradigm. Those meetings will be taking place in the upcoming week. Tomorrow, leaders of major nations will meet in Tianjin, China, for the heads of state summit of the Shanghai Cooperation Organization (SCO) meeting Aug. 31-Sept. 1. This will then be followed with the Beijing Sept. 3 commemoration of the 80th anniversary of China’s defeat of Japanese militarism in the Pacific, and then by the Vladivostok Eastern Economic Forum from Sept. 3-6. It is clear, at least in the Asia-Pacific, that a new system of international relations, based on equality, mutual respect, and new economic activity is emerging from the coordinated activities of China, Russia, India, and others. When will the United States, and the other nations of the Global North, who have isolated themselves from the Global South, and supported policies in the Gaza Strip which have led to the mass killing and starvation of hundreds of thousands of women and children, finally wake up and join this effort amongst sane leaders? As Helga Zepp-LaRouche, chairwoman of the Schiller Institute and initiator of the International Peace Coalition, has stressed for weeks, should U.S. President Donald Trump journey to Beijing to attend the celebrations, a new dynamic could open. Even now, as improbable as the meeting seems, pushing for Trump to attend is the sane and moral vantage point. Otherwise, Helga Zepp-LaRouche, in yesterday’s IPC meeting, had also stressed the urgent importance for the world community to act and stop the genocide. “If the world community proves unable to stop it,” she said, “this is the end of civilization. This is the last chance. If the world community fails to act, we are losing everything... even the ability to look at oneself in the mirror.” We have a window in which to act in this period, though it is not much time. You can begin by mobilizing yourself and other people to get on today’s meeting of the Manhattan Project at 2pm.
---

|

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: These are our priorities
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I hate to reach out over the holiday weekend, but I wouldn't be emailing if it weren't important.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4944%2E35263%2EmTjKwf)
I hate to reach out over the holiday weekend, Peter, but I wouldn't be emailing if it weren't important. Republicans in Washington continue to push policies that leave Wisconsin families behind — ignoring the very real issues like historic cuts to Medicaid, the housing crisis, and how Trump’s trade war is hurting our farmers. In the Senate, I am committed to fighting for Wisconsin families every single day. But to continue this fight, I need your help. Our August fundraising deadline is fast approaching, and everyone’s contribution can make a significant difference. Your support today helps me uplift Democrats nationwide who will champion accessible health care, affordable housing, and support for our farmers. **These are our priorities in Wisconsin, and I promise to fight for them alongside like-minded Democrats.** **[Please chip in before my August deadline to help power this work. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every dollar counts:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-aug25.EOUccb&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4944%2E35263%2EmTjKwf)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-aug25.L5mwgg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20250830_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4944%2E35263%2EmTjKwf)

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: We’re going back to 1976 with this one
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. Fellow Conservative,

You may not know me yet, but my name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m a lifelong Minnesotan, former Navy SEAL, and Marine Corps veteran running for U.S. Senate in 2026. I’m stepping into this fight because Minnesota—and our country—needs a new voice to stand up for our values, and I’m asking for your help to make it happen.

I grew up in Bloomington, Minnesota, playing hockey and learning teamwork from my working-class parents. _**On my 18th birthday in October 2001, just weeks after 9/11, I enlisted in the Marine Corps to serve our nation.**_

**Over 21 years, I deployed nine times to over 70 countries as a Marine and Navy SEAL, putting my life on the line to defend our freedoms.** I earned my undergraduate degree from the University of Minnesota, a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But at my core, I’m a regular guy who wants to make my mom proud and fight for the Minnesota I love.

Right now, Minnesota and America face a critical moment. The radical policies of Tim Walz and his lieutenant governor—who’s running to replace retiring Senator Tina Smith—threaten our way of life. From the unrest in Minneapolis in 2020 to attacks on our police, their agenda doesn’t reflect the Minnesota I know. _**This open Senate seat in 2026 is our chance to take back our state and stop the left’s push toward extremism. Just like in Georgia, where one seat flipped the Senate majority in 2021, Minnesota’s vote could decide the future of the U.S. Senate.

**_ **But here’s the challenge: I’m a new face, and the Democrats are already raising millions to keep this seat.** I’ve noticed you haven’t been active lately, Fellow Conservative, and I get it—the news can feel overwhelming, and it’s easy to think the fight’s already won. But it’s not. Right now, donations are slowing, and the other side is **quietly building its war chest**. I’m thinking of patriots like you who’ve supported conservatives before. Your past support has helped Republicans win tough battles, and we need you now to introduce me to Minnesota voters.

**[I’m asking for just $5 today.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b31f257b5a764e3493db3ede604cf22a&_e=DI5O1zOMSsjyUaWKDao02EtE--lGjaPvME2N0MmYsh61-dzJAqo3P08d2AgcVEWoHvgD3h4i1DgwYoTqCMoOtpKjQbmLGP8kFvCXgMu-c-ih7gb0PHtBG1RqkZUFu3WBp5zgbxLrXKIAPmnWVuO8Fctw4B4Fqj2xac5BWbsWHJmdX6c1I7lLnXsjZqhUkkmpNgehzfwKxSadSQbqXFZbr7v0kgMANmg6bwwYFIu6X2766OjELL77L16U-pZXA5cCYkL0sXVNt21K-NTK2d7nQojZfV0Hp04HzflB4FlGbAYPDzHE75ZlsL9ocQxmkT_BMPJM_eyXhrM9BBkVUAEGCuakVI0ciAVUtzFWfPKms4B4M21CGos7ddFQUZhXHGM9iS9Rh67uhunTVhyi0vZ2VvqrotE6XqSAS3nOUOWUvX9tFB16VFYWqKEdDXgqMaQEa6itUWx-VBIN0gSHb0i7Kjbvxp1sfwXRl-Fbsbr858Pq7Wp5GS4RLRoooV-aOtwwcVBx5qLxeXai4T3yby9bjsjDLDF-yDzP3cx5E_3MMzUNjIpc0q39yH7lymWbU6TkapYfFci1ttu-1hyHr70waHPsZuuXdd-lkW9CStPLtx6bL12fNoXAXqkEeJrNX9G59dVOsnItA0sEEtGHVAHpl5jR92wKfvn89ahfaU-OFllxMx2NvE-23BZauAUtkOIRxIxw0iHD2Jw-hleDHXMgiXwxiDzvoMl-SNFBJve0fthEHWp8veOtKYZ4F6zJIztDhE0mQJS3BL2b4yQGvwVjHA%3D%3D)** It’s not about the amount—it’s a signal that you’re with me, that you believe Minnesota and America deserve a conservative fighter who’s served our nation and will serve you in Washington.

As a Navy SEAL, I’ve thrived in the most challenging missions and am ready for this campaign. But I can’t do it without you. We need thousands of grassroots supporters, _**not Hollywood elites or mega-donors like the Democrats rely on.**_

[**CHIP IN $5
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=b31f257b5a764e3493db3ede604cf22a&_e=DI5O1zOMSsjyUaWKDao02EtE--lGjaPvME2N0MmYsh61-dzJAqo3P08d2AgcVEWoHvgD3h4i1DgwYoTqCMoOtpKjQbmLGP8kFvCXgMu-c-ih7gb0PHtBG1RqkZUFu3WBp5zgbxLrXKIAPmnWVuO8Fctw4B4Fqj2xac5BWbsWHJmdX6c1I7lLnXsjZqhUkkmpNgehzfwKxSadSQbqXFZbr7v0kgMANmg6bwwYFIu6X2766OjELL77L16U-pZXA5cCYkL0sXVNt21K-NTK2d7nQsJv1d5PhFw8gHT3ryoBkRETrrDfEvfyV-OD2aVuCkudbCKLyGxmUVYdgSVDQbSw4dPRqJsWaWM7Jz6PJp9BSRuHPKphzmf0SnHSbxBtVJXyUll9yXebsi4FyakPjyBUZCwpQLmae3FDJERG99eWsdgKEuhcHw5DMyDOsBflauBOOlaIL6_53O-fkD3JEOWuX7dfPEr-IiX4NXEKstsVGFQZlda4JwOid0YfPNZNkJ0r0bNccmoyC9qKhZV_WPJVuXKFY-UNwOiZlWtN0HG2U-XK5o4D2T_mFRMKJD7_Pru8mQVUpAsuRG4kE4vAIT-fWOq48Dpe-GyOqlmeTyn-UPmT_IIv7UwaAnsBvoc4D5I9RwRqOFnnRsTJmBQuH29dcG4hIQ6HAIVBo86DEz9SMvc4WqxyCJfVQoYqGs5nabaa29LH3zN-uUmx6ck_pxHFESDj_XJHkGTqd9L7TSNsHGY8rAj9Zrz7B6wg8HCC5o6-lMaJSXVriW8e3YBNJoLBfA%3D%3D)
**Minnesota hasn’t voted Republican for president since 1976, but this race is winnable.** I’m running to secure our borders, support law enforcement, revive our economy, and protect our freedoms. Please, chip in $5 today to help me introduce myself to Minnesotans and fight for our shared values.

With steadfast resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

name: Suzanne Beecher
subject: Will you stand up for women’s sports today?
body:
Women shouldn’t have to share locker rooms with men.

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/3Hix0RyY2gRPDn39BRI0ej1WkTixq97t2m6AtINTwHBcphNY_qaEhvqY9lKb96eInCTXDoT7Grcn8f4lomXgeOw2FP1y2Hk96zpjFCjlu0GtIzzMsi9xRIrkztZjxTDvA-hMnO9wPkLet2CqEvZItqKNN09HSinVLnngbZVBkFBU2OXw7fTU_hZg/6WnUJMN1zmlbzsTSlyf8wuyAeDTJYpXQ/12)_
---
| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/_jJ1-_D-MmCA8fQ8K8MnGDzuY6XaUuCTsry7ZtCPVHred5U_Yyr3ajeHLnuR6w0KT2hgN4sOynA64SM2a_clwZDyOQFW_bF0d32qvZC74cgHvUfwnsv7Fklg5D6n4E8pK0T4McYssUEhOksPpuoqXwMUEv6YQbArgjG6F5yBI6-puXwmztp0dAYwm6G0xMLBIQeTw7OD0kEzgtKPqjYwm-mTAu0hl0V2qPlVDMFxIsKrIpCO8omfsLKuXH5Cr9UWjwbCVXdQqeclxupjp5CzuG8BLgBCkZ9aYFUw_Z1Wzn63kGdVeeFzPJbMHDLHbWcHFX6pAme-omh4ToJGprNCjCEgpRwfwy_Y1LYXs2T1GCw18OGpKd13IlFZeiE95T4MdVwxdHXgmg4VI7tdPBG1j54Lycob3u5UDqRm7I0cFC4bXBNYijTIrXLhWPCKehVWeOYHues24Tje9eihVsBu1SWRbf7L4fGJx9eO_SXW5caI9JhC_SbiB4xpoeJP5zAwcvzqm0_ZAwmI1P2Wx4kQCEBVnwF6dAv5qiQ7IEwW2RwCmg4sL8hZ1W3xJRc6O6RXikoBJlykvoZmqjwr04KaCR2mRSWkfy3B3LZN1LijV-98QWy0fkcbVAef-yYOEYQ4NMc68ztWUAiMjVEDiKMn1xVUnrDSFj8tMqUG4fTzlbo4frjKcRqEOUqkbR36rshIxlXeVxn1SKBIbklatP3tSNM6CQx6Tf4O73iWbtth01wDwGFPG_s19wOaxWQc/ARu0MTCaOAzhIeSmz9HN0nvlLpNCXAdq/12)
**** Dear Defender of Truth, Women shouldn't have to share locker rooms with men. They shouldn't have to compete against male athletes. And they shouldn't be punished for speaking the truth.

But across America, that's exactly what's happening.

Men are being allowed to compete in women's sports--robbing girls of scholarships, medals, titles, and safety.

Now, for the first time in history, the U.S. Supreme Court has agreed to hear two cases--_State of West Virginia v. B.P.J._ and _Little v. Hecox_ --that could decide the future of women's sports nationwide.

This could be a watershed moment in the fight to protect biological reality and fairness.

If you believe women's sports should be reserved for women, we need your voice today.

Yes! I’m really asking for just one single dollar. Allow me to explain why just one dollar makes a difference:
Your $1 helps me keep fighting for the wins—like fighting Pentagon price gouging, PFAS cleanup, supporting more competition in military contracting, boosting our industrial base, and strengthening the "right to repair" for our troops.
Your $1 helps me keep fighting for even _more_ good to be done—like urging Congress to pass my Railway Safety Act and my No Corporate Crooks Act.
Your $1 helps me fight for transparency in our government—from banning congressional stock trading to calling for the Epstein files to be released.
And your $1 helps me stand up to Donald Trump and his pathetic agenda—whether it’s defending democracy, pushing back against Trump’s effort to strip federal workers of protections, or rolling back health care for millions of Americans.
Look, I know there’s a lot of bad stuff coming out of Washington these days. And I know it can be frustrating—believe me, I feel it too.
But that’s exactly the moment we stiffen our spines and stand our ground. We can’t let Donald Trump and his kiss-ass Congressional allies win again—not in Washington, and definitely not here in Western Pennsylvania.

I’m asking if you can donate just $1 to help me protect PA-17—the ONLY battleground seat in Pennsylvania held by a Democrat. = | | = Yes! I’m really asking for just one single dollar. Allow me to explain why just one dollar makes a difference: Your $1 helps me keep fighting for the wins—like fighting Pentagon price gouging, PFAS cleanup, supporting more competition in military contracting, boosting our industrial base, and strengthening the "right to repair" for our troops. Your $1 helps me keep fighting for even more good to be done—like urging Congress to pass my Railway Safety Act and my No Corporate Crooks Act. Your $1 helps me fight for transparency in our government—from banning congressional stock trading to calling for the Epstein files to be released. And your $1 helps me stand up to Donald Trump and his pathetic agenda—whether it’s defending democracy, pushing back against Trump’s effort to strip federal workers of protections, or rolling back health care for millions of Americans. Look, I know there’s a lot of bad stuff coming out of Washington these days. And I know it can be frustrating—believe me, I feel it too. **Despite our race heating up fast, I want you to know that I don’t consider you an ATM. Every single supporter – whether you read an email, knocked on doors, or donated – was a key piece of our victory last year, and your continued support is even more important today.**

Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Upcoming voter registration deadlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
2025 may be an "off year" election as far as Congress goes, but that doesn't mean we don't have important elections this year or we can take a break with our voter registration work, folks.
Voter registration is open in New Jersey until October 14th -- and early voting starts on October 25th. Control of their state legislature hangs in the balance, while it's also an open race for governor as the current governor is term-limited.
Voters can register in Virginia until October 24th , with early voting starting on September 19th. Virginia's legislature is also up for grabs, plus the opportunity to replace the current vote-suppressing governor (who is term-limited) with someone who will protect voting in the commonwealth again.
Our mission is simple: The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
It costs us roughly $3 to register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083025_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083025_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083025_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083025_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083025_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=083025_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083025_1&amount=36]
Yes, there have been a few special elections to fill vacancies, but these elections are our first real opportunity to fight back against the widespread efforts to dismantle our democracy. The results will determine whether our country stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and keep working toward a better future.
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming states nationwide with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- will absolutely tip the scales of these elections towards justice. Please pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters this year! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=083025_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=083025_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=ZeopIGBBX9QvKIs41HeMOx7aRnUJL5k8H6m5CKoYv73tCMxKjbWMrAz3bDsMncBEX955CBeAejRiEidC7wQ%2FQx02LafS%2BCA8GzCR7bx7BFp0Wm3zyjdJIvaH3HjuGrxWUgq4u6hkcJehY5MXqQ2siLnJs%2Fl4cC77ngri3%2FfINnXojSAa9a3tGWjfwlWkgr%2B4kXtdhGf%2BUEUKQkkpwycds4jCZftUYdPUAB7nZIxRU4g6C2%2FKHcTDGMqhnlA1PLouNtJaAg7t3%2B83enpgW0rO1d8SrkJgMEZ5o0nruIfqTSA7mkjgPZANWohOBU6WBpXZbbipO7jodef0FDahBykQ%2BVrgVuXH2O3zF%2BMYP6T0u2ieEil6HP6vEUoRZXFplVIV4mJRZygvFBGtkudmXjBco7Sam6FREuCN9b6cCxzoFv8%3D .

name: Juliana Stratton
subject: An honest update…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I need to be completely transparent with you right now.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4644?t=2&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO)
---
| It’s Juliana — and I need to be completely transparent with you right now.

We’re pacing behind on our fundraising goals this month.

That’s not the update I hoped to share. But I believe in being honest with the people powering this campaign. Because the truth is: If we don’t catch up, we’ll be forced to scale back our plans.

You’ve probably heard me say this before — but it bears repeating: One of my opponents has over $20 million in his war chest. He’s backed by corporate PACs and special interests. And he’s already using that money to flood the airwaves and drown out our grassroots message before we’ve even had the chance to be heard.

But unlike him, our campaign isn't funded by corporate PACs. I haven’t spent the last decade building a $20 million war chest. What we have is you — and a movement built on $10, $25, or whatever folks can spare.

Every single donation helps us reach voters across Illinois, run ads, hire organizers, and stay competitive in one of the most important Senate races in the country.

But the truth is: I can’t catch up to our goals without your help.

So I have to ask — and I wouldn’t if it weren’t important:

[_**Will you please split a contribution of $10 between my campaign for the U.S. Senate today and the Long Run to help us get back on track?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4645?t=3&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO)
---

---

---

---
| [$15 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4649?t=10&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO)
---

---
| [$50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4651?t=14&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4652?t=16&akid=5597%2E196590%2ERt68lO)
---
Thank you for believing in this campaign — and in me. We’re going to do this, together.

— Juliana

| | Fellow Conservative, _This is not a drill -- the radical Left is pouring millions into Texas, convinced they can flip our state and erase everything we've fought for! _ They've made Texas their #1 target. Groups of left-wing operatives, liberal family foundations, progressive PACs, and Soros funded NGOs- All of them aiming to transform Texas into a far-left bastion forever. _We can't let that happen -- but time is running out to stop this attack. _ Our **August 31st end-of-month deadline hits at 11:59 PM** , and we're still short of our critical fundraising goal. If we fall behind now, we risk giving the Left added momentum right before the final push into campaign season. _This is the moment we either stand strong -- or surrender ground._ [**RUSH IN YOUR DONATION NOW >>**](https://trk.email.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9BdWd1c3QtRU9NNF8yMDI1MDgyOSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUF1Z3VzdC1FT000JnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcmYW1vdW50PTUwIn0/u5OsqgpHWaznfpL267FF2Q) Hitting our goal will send a message loud and clear: **_Texas won 't be conquered by the Left. **[The New York Times took aim](https://substack.com/redirect/5ef994a1-d5fe-486e-9b63-fc9c7b5d6835?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for their viral fitness challenge, asking Americans to try to do a 100 push-ups and 50 pull-ups challenge in less than 10 minutes.
Even though the challenge was meant to call Americans to push themselves with their physical fitness and promote a positive initiative, of course the media had to paint it negatively to jab at the Trump administration.
## What did the NY Times say?
* **Form and Technique Issues:** The Times cited fitness experts who criticized Kennedy and Hegseth for using shortened range of motion in their pull-ups, failing to meet both CrossFit and military standards, as they didn't reach above the bar with their chins or fully extend their arms during descent.
* **Safety Concerns?:** Multiple fitness experts warned that the challenge is not feasible for most Americans, as many people can't perform even five proper push-ups or a single pull-up, and attempting such high volumes without proper strength foundation could lead to poor form, overcompensation, and serious injuries including muscle strains or tears.

## Watch RFK Jr and Pete Hegseth complete the challenge and decide for yourself:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b61381f4-9f3a-419f-abf0-58c70b7d3f96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
## The NY Times missed the point:
RFK Jr and Pete Hegseth's hearts are in the right place. They are encouraging Americans to get moving. This challenge is designed to make people excited about exercising and about getting healthy again. By turning it into a movement, it lets people feel included and part of something bigger. This is why they have encouraged Americans to share this challenge with their family and friends.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8iM3r7Ivc7VlFg454_u2wVDCQQiZjU4RKLtkmM1R-KE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172351751)
* * *
# **RFK Jr. Drops Bombshell about Federal Dairy Guidelines**
RFK Jr. has **[criticized the government's low-fat dairy recommendations](https://substack.com/redirect/7195003f-4976-4f91-814f-3dfce1cc6950?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and federal dietary guidelines from the 1970s-80s. He calls them "antiquated" and promises to do away with them entirely.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7195003f-4976-4f91-814f-3dfce1cc6950?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Rethinking low-fat dairy:** The Federal dietary guidelines have long recommended low-fat dairy based on concerns about saturated fat and obesity, but emerging research suggests whole-fat dairy may offer benefits like improved glucose tolerance, enhanced satiety and slow digestion. Maybe that's why randomized controlled trials have never offered definitive evidence**** that low-fat milk is healthier**** than whole milk.
* **Experts are divided on changing current guidelines:** While some international scientists argue there's no evidence to differentiate between regular-fat and low-fat dairy, federal expert committees say there's still insufficient evidence to reverse long-standing low-fat recommendations. But RFK Jr. and his advisors argue that saturated fats from whole foods like dairy aren't harmful, unlike those in processed foods or red meat, therefore these guidelines need to be looked at.
* **Research on children shows mixed results:** Studies on milk fat levels and childhood weight show inconsistent findings. Some suggest whole milk reduces obesity risk in children, while others show no difference, indicating personal preference may be the deciding factor.

## Fitness professionals already knew:
As someone who works with clients daily on nutrition and body composition, this debate hits close to home. I've been telling clients for years that a "low-fat everything" mentality is not a healthy way to live. In my experience, clients who switch to whole-fat dairy often report feeling fuller longer and having fewer mid-morning energy crashes.
My take? The fitness industry moved past the "fat is evil" mindset years ago. It's about time our federal guidelines caught up with both science and what works for real people trying to maintain healthy weight and energy levels.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..8iM3r7Ivc7VlFg454_u2wVDCQQiZjU4RKLtkmM1R-KE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172351751)
* * *
# RFK Jr. tells Trump -- Federal Agency Will Expose Causes of Autism by September
Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. says he will announce specific "interventions" that are **["almost certainly causing autism"](https://substack.com/redirect/e9a5b321-7433-4cf0-87ea-2078a4bf843b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and ways to address them by September.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9a5b321-7433-4cf0-87ea-2078a4bf843b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **What did Kennedy tell Trump?**
* **President Trump asked Kennedy for a progress update** during a Cabinet meeting Tuesday, saying, "The autism is such a tremendous horror show. What's happening in our country and some other countries, but mostly our country. How are you doing?"
"We are doing very well," Kennedy responded. "We will have announcements as promised in September, finding interventions, certain interventions, now that are clearly almost certainly causing autism."
"These are kids who will never pay taxes, they'll never hold a job, they'll never play baseball, they'll never write a poem, they'll never go out on a date. Many of them will never use a toilet unassisted," Kennedy said. "Autism destroys families."
* **Factors Causing Autism:** Kennedy has long claimed that environmental factors, or vaccines, are likely culprits behind the rising rate of autism diagnoses, arguing research to back this up has been blocked by federal authorities. Kennedy noted how diagnosis rates have significantly jumped since the 1970s.
* **Current CDC data:** This data shows 1 in 31 children and 1 in 45 adults have autism, significantly higher than the 1 in 150 rates from decades ago. Medical experts attribute the increase in autism diagnoses to improved detection methods and broadened diagnostic criteria since autism was first identified in 1943.

## **Cover-up will be exposed!**
The CDC has done an injustice to the American people by not being transparent about their autism-related findings over the years. RFK Jr. is finally going to expose what they have been hiding from us.
A question that I hope gets answered is, why was the CDC not transparent? Who was benefiting from withholding this information? We know that it wasn't the American people.

body:
A multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump| | |
---
| |
---
| | Peter,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting their critical mission.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2323c7c0046f448294b0d6b6fd219f48&_e=tIO9AXPM6eS9m5Buc9IqQcFNTHKb20u_yYyhMx_lBi2hgtd7K32CVFqpVSJKcHIMEdp3xYezLc5rFyEnExthtWMON6Zeojfs6sCd8LyUSszaRUtOnUViRWw-ts4fEC_EWQ8Mj_eA3zeUdcnAJG8dDRjwQ7AOKu16S0nHtyp42_hhiLt8ZiNFCTJ0scI-Fdvc9G-N5ny1yIoUg_Bdo-25SEYzts8nSiS2luLOWCxl6F26MQyHyqNZN6Fht1BHRp0eBHo1ylT_18RwZ4ZwKFqOzVsPFx4YBjcvkqdwRWrfCJCZ-q2_-Nd4vdVUlfoRokNaUOTTw-uirYXvJJ7x92abayhZOZgumevBxLe_2W65l8nlvw6d3NpPmQ_zhQH_068PT6-xVX42uF-HyOtFw_X37vm7SIh9SHoKayOD_3TWcN1hkgbf-Jb6QVHQlF3sOBTelHFop_yXe9IB9eQAQW7bo6AP8XQOfDBrOnqrUNdQpVwBOmfXzUJour1tKyw2x_mcNq7x4j_V3DFHcOwy94IbepJQPlOySKrz0lstyVVgcqpQR4uNZLB3ACnD5v10TqOEqiCrGEUrbtXEmFt2eJ85YVX71IY0vsK-sxUUioRXNzfQwAi2n71Hp6vOiXp_5LQsaWCQ95FumVHaMP7G7siLdLab3sVfjAM8A-R79bJsTvJXxYvxtwwtiX-vxRqVfv0T-xemWdggRnb2XOXN9G3svarj4sJUJbs2JiykHFKM-s_sKrAig4RjzOnj5uJPwM0gCOGnBxNOA7P1MqEUEHEXv9MhIDU1bVr9Sze2zPOhizs%3D)** It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the _disturbing_ truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain:
---
1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media.

2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact.

3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real.

---
It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.**But it worked.** It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:**The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media.** Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference.
---
* They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes.
* They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge.
* They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust.

---
But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a **“First Amendment Fund”** to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. **[Today, will you consider filling their “First Amendment Fund” with a donation of $35 or more?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2323c7c0046f448294b0d6b6fd219f48&_e=tIO9AXPM6eS9m5Buc9IqQcFNTHKb20u_yYyhMx_lBi2hgtd7K32CVFqpVSJKcHIMEdp3xYezLc5rFyEnExthtWMON6Zeojfs6sCd8LyUSszaRUtOnUViRWw-ts4fEC_EWQ8Mj_eA3zeUdcnAJG8dDRjwQ7AOKu16S0nHtyp42_hhiLt8ZiNFCTJ0scI-Fdvc9G-N5ny1yIoUg_Bdo-25SEYzts8nSiS2luLOWCxl6F26MQyHyqNZN6Fht1BHRp0eBHo1ylT_18RwZ4ZwKFqOzVsPFx4YBjcvkqdwRWrfCJAK6vJYINlloiX-Z79YuTmGIEz5Rnf2ueGlLZwBRE6lzFmNJVipxYt1k_VVnRrDqcxPRIT9sHFccD9eV-ERm_eFw1gLqQqe-1GHOpGilMozMpXuL2XqFO1VY1cjwuJgV1065tcgKNmNgm2yuJYctiRdxIHPcpJ3zKzgI6rpriD9mnDvffGY4pcuJMs8MvPH8GUK-ET1IrBeb5A1HLXeZgQbSaI6MaBdql7NFsFcFQwphdd60T7Es5JoBnrmuyeFrw0R1xqh6l5bQDY9WXW7FUY9B0BK19UMHZKABxZJi0MuWQnr5xh_P8QXbatc3Y0PEU8tSrOmV3xw_T5_3DS0RKzTd_l9x-0b9TF9qPVmJTMcPcKibElTbzNhj21CIATYofNpZDPUP33qyF47QOiAh-3IXSwptXV4v7aebxpEiYSA4TUmA6MBZfKUMtEMor_TWdRgJ50MO2yB2DEJivjgqFML9Mo2GGtCyTUnOdf7Vg5j4e8-dTWjADaVjIdqYpqfs5A%3D)** A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.**Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.**Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. But no matter where I go... certain people will always see me the way the liberal media painted me.That’s why the Left pushes these hoaxes. It’s all about inflicting **maximum punishment** on anybody who dares to stand up against their radical doctrine.Your support of the American Media Council and their **“First Amendment Fund”** today will directly help patriots like me clear their names and stand up against the liberal media’s lies.This is only possible with your support today. **[Will you support the American Media Council just like I do?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=2323c7c0046f448294b0d6b6fd219f48&_e=tIO9AXPM6eS9m5Buc9IqQcFNTHKb20u_yYyhMx_lBi2hgtd7K32CVFqpVSJKcHIMEdp3xYezLc5rFyEnExthtWMON6Zeojfs6sCd8LyUSszaRUtOnUViRWw-ts4fEC_EWQ8Mj_eA3zeUdcnAJG8dDRjwQ7AOKu16S0nHtyp42_hhiLt8ZiNFCTJ0scI-Fdvc9G-N5ny1yIoUg_Bdo-25SEYzts8nSiS2luLOWCxl6F26MQyHyqNZN6Fht1BHRp0eBHo1ylT_18RwZ4ZwKFqOzVsPFx4YBjcvkqdwRWrfCJCc7sPO1JfaGT9BCYQGh2Hgr4nfxHMMWmnLYIj8K7nKC6VKMlprGusGoqkEU2n_aJyDLhjC4vcBq8_fRfGHAuOP8F3OsQU-2b9Ncj8QgJuuy3bH5o7EVe3TE-bgGlUwUCN5AxbfveWe-tDdqgCvCjLQ15m7GmkgGlZwgl6TaBInEFWnslBtkNm9DaZE-c000QJ9v8HUmZFVQvj8aMDSX8kGyINNkB1wzKUSxTZxUEwqsvvF1oaZCXP2c0707Z3f4hp7wFDBZkfmkmA_d3ygWpsM4TgssRQvb31U7-npyaszyFt0dt1GtG1Rqaxp64an0MKojRuiDepx3UeZYHfDy4Nzv0f48VB-nIEpB9qlnA7yJMLI8UoXLa8PxqJ7whHKDlJk8naItff2WauDK0n-09vQQ2pkVXVfk-RkKDJA4y46t3-9JucXYRN5dCsXa0wyB2ELrytLDkBLonainSH8SlfMdyMlVndgrw_ChBuNv0KrzEmm2qkXEdNx5Dm7Xx_18Bs%3D)** If you’re in a position to sign up for a monthly donation today – $15 or more – I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence as my sincere thanks.
---
Thank You and God Bless You

clean_body: A multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump| | | | | | | Peter,Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration? My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the disturbing truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain: 1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media. 2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact. 3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real. It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.But it worked. It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media. Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference. They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes. They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge. They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust. But that’s not all.Thanks to the generous support of patriots like you, they have a “First Amendment Fund” to help conservatives overcome lawfare waged by the mainstream media. A $35 donation would be a tremendous help. But if you feel called to make a monthly donation, say $15 or more, I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence.It’s so important to me that you support the American Media Council that I want to “Thank You” with a complimentary book.My friend, it’s hard to put into words just how impactful your support will be today...... but I’ll try.The Deep State wanted to destroy me.They tried to take away my career and financially bankrupt my family. I had to sell my house to pay the endless legal fees. It put my wife, Lori, through hell and back.That’s the Left’s goal.Humiliation. Retaliation. Destruction.Sadly, the damage to my reputation can’t be fixed in a courtroom or wiped from the internet.President Donald Trump pardoned me. My name has been officially cleared. But no matter where I go... certain people will always see me the way the liberal media painted me.That’s why the Left pushes these hoaxes. It’s all about inflicting maximum punishment on anybody who dares to stand up against their radical doctrine.Your support of the American Media Council and their “First Amendment Fund” today will directly help patriots like me clear their names and stand up against the liberal media’s lies.This is only possible with your support today. If you’re in a position to sign up for a monthly donation today – $15 or more – I will send you a complimentary copy of Pardon of Innocence as my sincere thanks. Thank You and God Bless You Lt. Gen. Michael Flynn P.S. As my deepest thanks for supporting the American Media Council and their critical mission, I want to send you a complimentary copy of my new book, Pardon of Innocence. But in truth, any gift amount you can send today – whether $35 or some other amount – it will be a tremendous help. No matter the amount you can send today, I want you to know that I’m grateful there are still patriots like you out there who believe in the truth. As long as you’re still around, the Fake News liars will never win. | | American Media Council** PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: On SCOTUS’ attack on marriage equality
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114317404/566625592/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM3ZGEwZS1jZTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVQoe-LleVsmwjCI9AKgtKyTLGxmKXNIN-F_Xr8xm60=)
Peter, As you may know, before I came home to Illinois, I was a meteorologist at a local station in Tyler, Texas. One morning, my boss approached me and said we needed to speak after the show. When I got to the conference room, I saw my employment contract laid out on the desk. Next to it was a printout of my profile from a gay dating website. I was told I had a choice: to be _"that person"_ in the profile or _"have a job."_ I decided then and there to resign and move back to Illinois. **That story has replayed time and time again in my head, throughout my life. And it’s been triggered again by the Supreme Court announcing they would take on a case that seeks to ban marriage equality.** As the first openly LGBTQ+ legislator to represent Illinois, I believe in what’s possible. But MAGA extremists -- from elected officials to Trump-appointed judges -- have been emboldened by the hate spewing out of the White House, and are trying to strip others of the freedoms they claim for themselves. **These efforts to re-litigate our humanity are a reminder of why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting youth who may already feel marginalized.** And in the face of attacks by the Supreme Court, it’s a reminder that every seat matters in flipping Congress — so we can strengthen federal laws against these hateful efforts. [**I’m standing up to hate in Congress, but it's going to take a team effort to get this done. Please contribute $3 to my re-election campaign, and help me defeat these bigoted attacks on our communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114317405/566625593/896231865?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM3ZGEwZS1jZTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVQoe-LleVsmwjCI9AKgtKyTLGxmKXNIN-F_Xr8xm60=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114317406/566625594/896231865?refcode=em-8.30.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTM3ZGEwZS1jZTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sVQoe-LleVsmwjCI9AKgtKyTLGxmKXNIN-F_Xr8xm60=)
---
Thanks for hearing me out,
-Eric

clean_body: | = Peter, As you may know, before I came home to Illinois, I was a meteorologist at a local station in Tyler, Texas. One morning, my boss approached me and said we needed to speak after the show. When I got to the conference room, I saw my employment contract laid out on the desk. Next to it was a printout of my profile from a gay dating website. I was told I had a choice: to be "that person" in the profile or "have a job." I decided then and there to resign and move back to Illinois. That story has replayed time and time again in my head, throughout my life. And it’s been triggered again by the Supreme Court announcing they would take on a case that seeks to ban marriage equality. As the first openly LGBTQ+ legislator to represent Illinois, I believe in what’s possible. But MAGA extremists -- from elected officials to Trump-appointed judges -- have been emboldened by the hate spewing out of the White House, and are trying to strip others of the freedoms they claim for themselves. These efforts to re-litigate our humanity are a reminder of why we need representatives in Congress who can lead with empathy -- especially when it comes to protecting youth who may already feel marginalized. And in the face of attacks by the Supreme Court, it’s a reminder that every seat matters in flipping Congress — so we can strengthen federal laws against these hateful efforts. = | = Thanks for hearing me out, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

A recently declassified report details irrefutable evidence that **President Obama, former Director of the CIA John Brennan, and others fabricated the Russia hoax** , promoting the LIE that Vladimir Putin helped President Trump win the 2016 election.

You read that right, Friend. The Democrats manufactured a complete, alternative reality just to undermine the legitimacy of President Trump.

_**Take a moment and think about all the effects downstream of this betrayal...**_

Now, Tulsi Gabbard is referring former President Obama to the Department of Justice for criminal implications.

THIS is why it is CRITICAL that radical, conniving Democrats, like Obama, do NOT take back any ground we won in 2024.

Turning Point PAC has a plan to build the RED WALL to secure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This is why I need your help to raise $75,000 before the end of the month.

**As part of that plan, we're giving away my book and exclusive President Trump lithographs when you donate before the end of the month.**

Otherwise, these bad actors will come back into power and resume their subversion of our American way of life.

They will destroy everything that this country stands for, namely the Constitution and the Bill of Rights.

Friend, we now have proof they tried to undermine President Trump's victory before.

** _What else have the Democrats done to stop us from achieving victory that we don't even know about yet?_**

This is why we are fighting door-by-door, ballot-by-ballot, to win in critical battleground states.

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. body:
Hi Peter,

Today, I’m officially launching my campaign to become the next Congressman for Arizona’s 2nd Congressional District because I’m tired of seeing Eli Crane betray our neighbors by voting to raise costs, bury the truth, and take away healthcare from our neighbors.

As a man driven by faith, family, and love, my campaign is about bringing people from all walks of life together to create meaningful change for our district.

In 2024, our campaign delivered one of the strongest overperformances in the nation. We had over 78,000 grassroots online donors, and put AZ-2 on the map to the point that this is now one of the DCCC’s “Districts in Play” – meaning that winning this seat is critical to taking back the House.

Before I say more, I want you to know: the early days of a campaign can make or break it and we need to raise $104,319 to hit the ground running, fully staff up and start getting our message out. Will you help me start strong by becoming a founding donor to my campaign today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/P594VD7k6XoM17VodpWbKw~~/AAPPABA~/p6NoKbOren2rlHnzA-IZYwaKa7Pz_3BoOT0-4feZsnFd1yalW1HqedppQoyL4MEIiBpXRazSCVhD4gdTeyQX9UZJy0cfBaocFIEK8yTLbn0m2gIApvGd6IAo-dKpfh0mZ3TykwI61ee1ncZJQF5BjA~~

Following my graduation from Northern Arizona University, I was elected to the Navajo Nation Council to represent my community, and I’ve been in public service ever since. I subsequently served as a county supervisor and as Vice President of the Navajo Nation before being elected President of the Navajo Nation in 2019. I’m proud of my record of public service, leading the effort to save lives during COVID, and making major investments in clean water in Northern Arizona.

I’m running to deliver generational change, because we owe it to our children and grandchildren to leave them a future better than the one we inherited. Unfortunately, Eli Crane isn’t interested in improving the lives of our neighbors. His votes to cut healthcare and food assistance from our most vulnerable populations might go over well in the fancy suburb where Crane lives, but out here in rural Arizona, that dog won’t hunt.

I’m ready to show up in Congress as a champion for rural Arizona, but I need your support. Can you please chip in anything you can today? https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/Brtn2CtnrI1n_ujWuzTuWg~~/AAPPABA~/zRcG4SuXMQ2uBteS4mAQUfuZVoUiUY1Joybba5YARNzuFa1d-r5dC7n4i3W_D90qMUj1ARuBildXv2iiBbKbmZEAsWy6vnJ6qFiiHRjtFh7JjBkgYdOst0bjkUaPBDJq9FN6le9_1cJtnj0dszpVH5T4pAZYksc16rd2WGYfI4L4yutvVvqsvp1UJ8ghedQSUss8zVE4wMNMjDdd2UXgzg~~

Our district faces real challenges: from the rising costs of gas, food, childcare, and housing to a lack of accountability in Washington. We need a representative in Congress who’s focused on the issues here in Arizona — not the partisan squabbles of DC. Someone who will put working Arizonans first, create good jobs, lower everyday costs, support our veterans, secure Arizona’s water future, and protect the right to choose.

As the former President of Navajo Nation, I’m ready to deliver on the issues that matter most to our communities, but I can’t get there without your help. Please consider supporting my campaign today: https://clicksp.jonathannezforaz.com/f/a/wMiEPWxVgND5MJ_n-rNrHg~~/AAPPABA~/d0RZq8jQUm8WDGhZSX0p1kcBftj5_YSinx9f6_Z8AwedVYMa6GNOL6DvwbmqA-5m93dbmWFzC5TkuqxE5M6gkpMaqw9gxuhcvszFxgICL-gQ6RU6LdyKa9S7Vbva_oRFaB-YLkptcfwsmFdzFqoYCg~~

Jonathan Nez

I’ve worked on enough campaigns in Pennsylvania to know exactly how Republicans operate: they drag their feet, stall progress, and then hope we don’t have the resources to fight back. And right now, with our budget over 40 days overdue, they’re counting on us to fall short.

I’ll be blunt, if we don’t hit our end-of-month goal, we risk starting September at a serious disadvantage. The GOP has billionaire donors pouring in dark money. We have grassroots supporters like you.

body:
The DLCC’s plan is crystal clear: The best way to defeat Republican gerrymandering is to win more Democratic legislatures. Our August fundraising deadline is tomorrow. Donate to power our mission. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Gov. Newsom and state Democrats in California are on the front lines of the fight against Trump’s attempts to rig next year’s midterm elections. This November, Californians will vote on a new ballot measure to counter the Republican scheme to redraw congressional maps in Texas and a slew of other Republican-controlled states, including Indiana and Missouri. **The DLCC’s plan is crystal clear: The best way to defeat Republican gerrymandering is to win more Democratic state legislatures.**[ Our August fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and we’re asking you to donate $7 to power our mission. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDVi64qgX8p27lD6WAR1u3H2avA2aLPWrv6CEr-sqW92L4Xx2QgTsye4GKcvkoXIXZbqw_6b6nALCCDO6lfzaHbIpJQJT5UL2x-l_gJYdu3NpQFpUOH-KUNNh8atgoIInTVmWUw9C8ppxWSQXLQC21MXiXSWd_Z_56SPvt_KuTJt70DfS9gEjlmmxJTYU18SqJh4fd1It-4JRPtYixdez9r9SGndyH60IvIbym_MGGE_1l3ab-tYNIn42fJ9rCFeRqJabyxvhNGUfqRsEhFM1SKkbT9TMPlc3dv8dcdrWkhAZwtAf0a_tX77CYV6rz-Ua-OBS6YrMv2tq_vIhdZshwqrQGIZ5bCbhCWhUKZh4zwIXJBYEP6socFENoRL14lQqJF3Lb3TGCnnnTPVem8cUj1w/4jh/GMWv0-6UQWibxqjcrpR4ew/h0/h001.V4DPMhlPPmwDSKEDx5h7Pl9CX9ecRroT2B5oJxaH0AQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

Donate to power our mission. | | | | | ---|--- Gov. Newsom and state Democrats in California are on the front lines of the fight against Trump’s attempts to rig next year’s midterm elections. This November, Californians will vote on a new ballot measure to counter the Republican scheme to redraw congressional maps in Texas and a slew of other Republican-controlled states, including Indiana and Missouri. name: Nick Searcy
subject: I stood at the Capitol. Now I stand with the persecuted
body:
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=30c65f954e9d4a509bcbf30232e285ba&_e=Scp1Rowrnfl2PRL8liiQcgfCECJyDw6l126D7X2SNGPJg395NW6J9D-RClEeXhDVotisCANNwJ0tjVD-RFJnFKZYDQFEwGq_Eg8SQ0VhwQoYaoo0l7_lexQzeDVKorTMLprufQ3X5pJ4zZhSGhnjN1zVQJsPalE8URKXK-sXmlsWwPcndlVfAK3NRhaTp0FiWnx_Ra72DMl-WUDgiSVSKo5ZZ3gNqj8gEQyy_vPNcfTiZtjTn2oikHmHf-nc2O4EQ8QCZdupEmFMQMdoEK_i1to_IyMYYqbQeVzVit1W0Tkfj4uoWsx4uwDeC9bxQv2xYFkJ4YX6D2MwYEJKxPgS2kGeVz0OqWqhU914XbMnyvbgrOr-um8U8GgLVvXMHd2VM7vEAZkJgBnb4R3nGrcLNnCo9wJgXQhXqvPRXzVf33jamgLD6DTUKkD9-z6RetMiyDMJ7gUldiQznKJ75bwe8yip5Pzg48tdN-1OvowgCplEnZQes2E7lLLrf5HHuqX9wiBIzxK6Re7LaIvfWQLMauPGvH2q_FjQOGDwbAVIbiuAZe10r5drG7fbgeRTmRVn7dQ7o4C2No9ylbAOHgSRC7dtsmA7Z1D3IbCiw9tpgcUF-f92LnEl0OOjQz3ujJBJ)

Fellow Patriot,

I was at the Capitol on January 6th.

I didn't see an "insurrection." I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in.

**What I didn't expect -- _what none of us could've imagined_ -- was the brutal retaliation that followed...**

Since that day, I've watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists.

After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough.

Some are still rotting in jail today.

Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them.

They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible.

That's why I produced the films _Capitol Punishment_ and _The War on Truth_ and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance.

They're helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly -- hope.

[You can help Stand in the Gap give these patriots the second chance at freedom they deserve by donating today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=30c65f954e9d4a509bcbf30232e285ba&_e=Scp1Rowrnfl2PRL8liiQcgfCECJyDw6l126D7X2SNGPJg395NW6J9D-RClEeXhDVotisCANNwJ0tjVD-RFJnFKZYDQFEwGq_Eg8SQ0VhwQoYaoo0l7_lexQzeDVKorTMLprufQ3X5pJ4zZhSGhnjN1zVQJsPalE8URKXK-sXmluTGzUxV-ijhoEa9hqJ4FOQiAM5LRMidvsW4VaJscZcodu4XPtN7mKE5tsCTaTBhCa6_DrJ8fnoyqZKckdl8nO78QX_aVy9SCV612XvUDfxPWmIqWX_1fx-RKOz0YiFRnDWUaVj0gjK2_aWyQcKPyB_0hW832PkzvoOu6eTf1QnjJaffe0z9VAq735ycLLHqz5kbBv5ztBADVYHcY1Fe1fzCdfIXtjEV9RovhRTo4qYyBZKkYFKVnyyS3xaG3if8Wq4i5Pa75KCxTXGx6HK0ZRtp_G6hsEkGNy_z5C8ZowiUSNFnt59kH5-RinUzulFykfFHg96adUusoi-WTD2Eyw7esxIbmzHSnz_ryErHKDtOAFVT7ng0H7oWcK5EoPc2d_5oaSV6PhhHv6g5CErdGx8wrtPTa0ygBEVq5AmRcR8dW5yVx0kEFM2RRubqnAoN82M43Z2_IucagjYOHB_kmCr)

[Donate Now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=30c65f954e9d4a509bcbf30232e285ba&_e=Scp1Rowrnfl2PRL8liiQcgfCECJyDw6l126D7X2SNGPJg395NW6J9D-RClEeXhDVotisCANNwJ0tjVD-RFJnFKZYDQFEwGq_Eg8SQ0VhwQoYaoo0l7_lexQzeDVKorTMLprufQ3X5pJ4zZhSGhnjN1zVQJsPalE8URKXK-sXmlsBSRNbUQFxKzTZ1NDz_ulYk47Lk1i7lKVsjKgeqNivogL5y48xbPLrubYcsQ5RhBHlaCI1KLMVDPVmx3x-rB17RXLlUVazmFbmHKNp12fk3mkK-_TpcpWjLaV5qu1HqKJs_RDHmKEFqzbI3uxhB73zuOayc353J-yR7VXGrshspSA6-xVmDiv0HVjSHR5cPZYglC5J3xhV5K2oUFbIV4GJlsn565eEnXoQZ0WAt5fNMpM6m3uJ-kBvfZM0v7K8lbZ-uc8q_DJvZlXXb8TJuWOUaqwzFlTtg_X29DQacv0xKSOq3lYHwlfiTXccBBL8QJzaXMaoj_koEYdE8CJY3-mHb7DV6aGopFNzhGPV-zCexP46g1TXVnqqQguRyEolEV-UlljuOF8P5xwzC_aby04N45zYZV36z4Z3ZPt0nchJQ29BioV6Kvbp5akixxx5IcScdvtduxsn6LM6T64DRlpfGWMJFhfRsGBVUl3c0hiSmA%3D%3D)

These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs.

Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated.

But the media doesn't want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an "insurrection" while ignoring the peaceful majority.

The government wants them forgotten.

**But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner.**

This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.

Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration.

Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten, Fellow Patriot.

[Will you help J6 defendants get back on their feet by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 to Stand in the Gap today? >>](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=30c65f954e9d4a509bcbf30232e285ba&_e=Scp1Rowrnfl2PRL8liiQcgfCECJyDw6l126D7X2SNGPJg395NW6J9D-RClEeXhDVotisCANNwJ0tjVD-RFJnFKZYDQFEwGq_Eg8SQ0VhwQoYaoo0l7_lexQzeDVKorTMLprufQ3X5pJ4zZhSGhnjN1zVQJsPalE8URKXK-sXmluTGzUxV-ijhoEa9hqJ4FOQiAM5LRMidvsW4VaJscZcoacMVLz7UZi7bVVBeaxkhgIZWV7S_U7G4qa0YU-ur6Q0FofV_C4QLspgpVdJQvq0sz1KYTCk0rKge4HQYhHsUuqsrG6pPjTkMK6k89XIDws95Yi09tfOKBeBsXAss7DrKcQWTDJqwlAh12uQ2gn4CAPcmgWqny73I6XBIjzh1pQoy4G3cwnCv-fGk1YJUolP-Q2o7v-_uQNqvP1X3UYU8KvKV9DquVTeQ9JY5UrufBH1TeKtJe2jB7GySdv10echSRmU3Kyy2IQIf41630HRnd2KIBGUGWn1N8tZ5tdqhsQUDG1V8YFwge5oWpHOwJss3qISMbdWPET8nEsx8Oy21hmJ3Yv_QB01xfz0nIMU_x-7jH2sYE2e5efb9GQyh02WWiXv1on-jFw6gqAm9lyILmCfW13gUeweiGJjyogdEYwn)

P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was.

Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face...
* Difficulties in finding a job,
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm,
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives,
* Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison,
* And even homelessness.

For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming.

**Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.**

But they can't do it without you.

clean_body: Fellow Patriot, I was at the Capitol on January 6th. I didn't see an "insurrection." I saw Americans praying. Singing the national anthem. Waving flags. I saw families, veterans, and peaceful patriots standing up for what they believed in. What I didn't expect -- what none of us could've imagined -- was the brutal retaliation that followed... Since that day, I've watched in horror as men and women I stood with that day have been hunted down and treated like terrorists. After 4 long years, the January 6th defendants have finally been pardoned. But the pardons alone aren't enough. Some are still rotting in jail today. Others are trying to pick up the pieces of lives that were shattered by a government determined to make an example out of them. They've endured political persecution, lawfare, and a social stigma that sometimes makes a second chance seem impossible. That's why I produced the films Capitol Punishment and The War on Truth and why I am proud to support Stand in the Gap, a nonprofit on a mission to provide the help, hope, and healing J6ers need to succeed in their second chance. They're helping former January 6 defendants and their families rebuild their lives, with legal aid, health care coverage, counseling, housing support, and most importantly -- hope. These are real people just like you and me... Fathers. Mothers. Sisters. Brothers. Patriots. Their only crime was showing up to take a stand for their beliefs. Every one of them had their constitutional rights violated. But the media doesn't want you to hear their stories. The official January 6 committee suppressed the full story, cherry‐picking footage to paint the day as an "insurrection" while ignoring the peaceful majority. The government wants them forgotten. But Stand in the Gap has not forgotten the prisoner. This remarkable organization provides real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Stand in the Gap believes in second chances, providing support to January 6 defendants transitioning back into society after incarceration. Let's show these patriots they're not forgotten, Fellow Patriot. With gratitude, Nick Searcy P.S. Before January 6th, many of these patriots were unaware of just how broken the American justice system truly was. Even after being pardoned, many J6 defendants still face... Difficulties in finding a job, Loss of rights, like the right to vote or the right to own a firearm, Harassment on social media and in their personal lives, Strained family relationships due to lost time in prison, And even homelessness. For many, returning to some semblance of a normal life is overwhelming. Stand in the Gap is committed to being a comprehensive support system for January 6 defendants and their families by providing essential resources to help these American patriots heal physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually.** But they can't do it without you. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. -

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Life in Michigan should not be this hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Growing up, I saw how poverty robbed people of their right to a long, healthy, and prosperous life.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb69c8140-397c-406d-9e94-6b5adc03330c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hey Peter, it’s Abdul. I want to tell you a little bit about why I’m running for Senate. As a first-generation American born to Egyptian immigrants and raised in a multi-ethnic household by my father and stepmother, I got to live the American dream. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d87db83-a170-43d3-81ec-29615529f9c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) But growing up, I saw how poverty robbed people of their right to a long, healthy, and prosperous life. We deserve better. Life in Michigan should not be this hard, and that’s why I’m running for Senate to change this. As your senator, I will fight for a government that works for working people, not billionaires or would-be oligarchs. I’ve done it already here in Michigan — rebuilding Detroit’s health department from bankruptcy, erasing $700 million in medical debt for 300,000 Michiganders, and reducing lead contamination in our schools. I can bring our fight to D.C. with your help, Peter. [Will you split a donation of $10 between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us build a movement strong enough to win? Dark money interests are ready to flood this race with cash, and we need to be prepared.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T995556e7-76a8-4f43-9f70-47d50d64229b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| Thank you, Abdul

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T53ac7e7b-66b0-42f1-9f39-da88b5a4de9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
