### Billionaires are trying to suffocate democracy. To celebrate workers on the front lines of this fight, we're offering [25% off all Paid Subscriptions thru Labor Day](https://substack.com/redirect/341926d5-562c-4fde-b065-36f62dc20a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).[ Please Subscribe!](https://substack.com/redirect/341926d5-562c-4fde-b065-36f62dc20a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JiroDKNFcOldLMGlqTBEW9i8fAa2YlDfdNp2asHOoR0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=172090875)
* * *
**Hi Amplifiers!**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6f3855d0-8d30-4899-9950-396532c28ff5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Going into the long weekend I had a Friday convo with Jonathan Larsen, "Veteran journalist and TV news producer" (for names you know like Anderson Cooper, Keith Olbermann, Chris Hayes), which you can watch up above!
He writes ["Jonathan Larsen's Substack"](https://substack.com/redirect/91486b28-881d-47a7-ad51-37c0b8fca5d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the cheeky ["The Fucking News](https://substack.com/redirect/7a171a0b-7a2f-4218-9c07-0abbe77a7573?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The latter where he uses his talents and profanity to describe our profane times.
As you may know, I'm [in the midst of a four-part series on who Dems need to be](https://substack.com/redirect/027944ff-f487-4fdd-9c87-5455a46504c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), how they must message and fight back and why so many who can help build the necessary infrastructure to do it seem to perpetually have their thumbs up their collective arses.
So far I've only written [Part 1: Be Sherrod Brown](https://substack.com/redirect/ce2acce1-f37a-4159-9a7c-74f7f0ea9306?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which got a warm reception from you kind folks. Jonathan agreed with some, disagreed with other parts. So we debated!
You can see how we began below, and the the rest of the transcript should be available to you here, if I understand the Substack machine correctly. Thanks!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JiroDKNFcOldLMGlqTBEW9i8fAa2YlDfdNp2asHOoR0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172090875)
Also, [catch the convo David Shuster and I had on "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter" with Olivia Troye](https://substack.com/redirect/d35c2a8c-2733-42c4-a60e-e9178477ba93?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), during our usual Thursday edition of the show!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/38f7a7e8-5097-4d96-8556-4c5f89fa07d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If you don't know Olivia, she is Mike Pence's Pence's former National Security Advisor who quit in disgust [over Trump's Putin-fondling and basic treason](https://substack.com/redirect/c682c883-c406-408a-b88b-48d14e3b5a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Otherwise, have a great long weekend!
Cliff
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/115e1a1a-bc79-469b-a900-9d3d5df5d799?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### **Beginning of the Transcript**
**CS:** I'm happy to be here with John. We're going to have some fun. We're going to talk about a piece I wrote.
We talked about the Democratic Party, one of the sort of three key themes of Blue Amp, or [blueamp.co. Subscribe, please.](https://substack.com/redirect/341926d5-562c-4fde-b065-36f62dc20a1b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.JiroDKNFcOldLMGlqTBEW9i8fAa2YlDfdNp2asHOoR0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=172090875)
There's going to be a four-part series on what I think Democrats need to do to have an [FDR-like romp](https://substack.com/redirect/d9a46ddf-2bcb-40e0-8be5-a2969d03b021?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Whether they can do it, whether they will do it, are all questions.
[T](https://substack.com/redirect/027944ff-f487-4fdd-9c87-5455a46504c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[he first one was that was just called ](https://substack.com/redirect/ce2acce1-f37a-4159-9a7c-74f7f0ea9306?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[Be Sherrod Brown](https://substack.com/redirect/ce2acce1-f37a-4159-9a7c-74f7f0ea9306?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)._
And I think I expounded upon why, because he lives and breathes fire as a workers-first Democrat.
He doesn't pretend to be one, you know, and I think I expounded upon why.
He doesn't just start talking about it a couple of months before an election and say, yeah, I think that workers' rights would be great and important for us to talk about now.
He's out there on the picket lines. He wears a little canary pin he was given by a miner, canary in the coal mine kind of thing.
He has always led with working issues. Which is why he ends up getting a 10, 15, 20 percent [crossover vote with Mango Mussolini, Mr. Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/2cf2cd52-237c-4c39-8039-ac60e6714c2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
He outperformed Kamala Harris by eight points. Only lost by three in 2024, and is running again. It think he should be the prototype. Let's discuss!!
* * *

name: Mary Trump
subject: this fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114318177/566628018/-204460493?refcode=250830_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc4YzZjZS1kMjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt6nW5suS7dduFpTZNHvDuc3YzLZhWu407VZE9b_s-Q=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114318178/566628019/-204460493?refcode=250830_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTc4YzZjZS1kMjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pt6nW5suS7dduFpTZNHvDuc3YzLZhWu407VZE9b_s-Q=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump

clean_body: A $1 today means a stronger fight tomorrow Friend, We're reaching out to ask you for something that might seem small but will make a MAJOR impact in the fight for America's future. Senator Johnson has never sat on the sidelines. When he saw the Deep State weaponizing our government against conservatives, the millions of illegal immigrants pouring across the border, and the Left launching attack after attack on President Trump, he acted. He 's led the charge on: \- - Exposing the Swamp's secrets on COVID, Russiagate, and Biden's health cover-up. \- - Defunding the Deep State. \- - Voting to advance the MAGA agenda, from border security to the chronic health crisis. \- - Revealing the truth about the Left's agenda to millions of Americans. He's not slowing down, but to keep fighting, he must meet his August fundraising goal and he's still short. ********** If every conservative reading this message chipped in just $1, we'll close the gap TONIGHT and have the resources we need to put the pressure on. We don't have time to waste. August ends TOMORROW , so please, and stand with Senator Johnson! ******** Thank you in advance for your support, Dylan, Team RonJon Paid for by Ron Johnson for Senate Inc. %%subscriptioncenterurl%% PO Box 1159 Oshkosh, WI 54903 A $1 today means a stronger fight tomorrow

Peter,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

clean_body: Peter, I promise I won’t take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Peter, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Peter,
Our democracy is facing one of the biggest tests in its history.
Donald Trump is abusing his power, trampling over the rule of law, and undermining the rights of the American people. But every day, people like you stand up for your neighbors and communities.
Your dedication inspires me to keep pushing back. And as Minnesota’s Attorney General, I’m on the front lines of this fight.
**When Trump ignores our laws or puts Minnesotans at risk, it’s my job to step in and defend them. I didn’t run for office to sue Trump — but if he keeps breaking the law, I’ll keep taking him to court. **
I’ve got your back, but I couldn’t do any of this work without this grassroots team. We rely on your steadfast support to meet urgent goals and grow our people-powered movement.
I’m reaching out today because we need your help to meet our end-of-month goal. With less than 36 hours remaining until the deadline, we’re still $4,852 short.

| | Peter, it's Lieutenant Governor Austin Davis. Donald Trump never planned to stop his militarization with Washington, DC. He's made it clear that he plans to target other states and cities next, and now, it's official. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114319153/566631395/-1135492007?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_083025_DC_30DO_D1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWRmNDNlNy1kNDg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TBZ_UIpF-cqVyPw5e-XoYGsDkowgSZY4fBWQy4RoMtc=) **Trump's decision to turn the military against us, especially targeting cities led by Democrats, stands in direct opposition to the methods of crime reduction we know to work. It's also an attack on the foundations of our Democracy.** We need to take a comprehensive approach to fighting crime. From investing in recruitment and retention of police officers to supporting violence prevention programs to creating ladders of opportunity for every Pennsylvanian. We need compassionate policies that bring our communities together and forward. Donald Trump is using fear tactics and aggression to divide us and send us backward. **[Will you chip in to my re-election campaign so I can continue to stand up for Pennsylvania? name: Team Stevens
subject: Did you watch Haley on MSNBC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
What Haley said to Jen Psaki last night:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5589?t=2&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
Did you catch Haley on MSNBC? **She joined Jen Psaki to talk about her campaign for Michigan’s U.S. Senate seat – and how critical it is for Democrats to win in Michigan to take back the Senate.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5590?t=3&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
Having flipped a battleground House district from red to blue – and defended that seat three times in a row – Haley has the track record it’s going to take to win this Senate race!
But the road ahead won’t be easy: Haley’s GOP opponent, Mike Rogers, ran for Senate last year and lost by fewer than 20,000 votes after Trump and Republicans shelled out nearly $80 million to support him. Now he’s running again, and everything indicates that Trump and his billionaire buddies will dump _tens of millions_ in Michigan to protect their majorities in Congress.
Haley won’t let that happen. She’ll fight with everything she has against Trump's chaos, but she needs your immediate support to build up the resources it will take to win a race that _The Cook Political Report_ has already rated as a “Toss Up.”
**_[Will you rush a gift of $5 or more to help elect Haley Stevens in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5591?t=4&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5592?t=5&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5593?t=6&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5594?t=7&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5590?t=8&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
Thank you,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5595?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5589?t=10&akid=746%2E49239%2EBZaNNr)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Please read and forward: They're trying to make an example out of us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
For fighting the [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67013?t=1002&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]attempt to gerrymander five congressional seats in
Texas, I have been accused of bribery by Texas Attorney General Ken
Paxton.

I also face criminal contempt charges related to his bribery accusation.
And if that were not enough, Paxton is now trying to shut down the voter
registration and voting rights organization I founded. Our Texas-based
assets have been frozen, and the AG has gone so far as to indicate that my
personal assets could be frozen as well.

We’ve racked up over $300,000 in legal fees over the last two weeks, and
counting.

And, if Paxton’s requests are granted in full, I will be locked up in the
Tarrant County jail before long.

[3]Texas AG asks judge to arrest Beto O'Rourke for redistricting battle
fundraising

You might wonder what laws I’ve broken to incur the full legal wrath of
the State of Texas.

Me too.

But, as you’ll see, it turns out that this has nothing to do with the law
and everything to do with Paxton’s attempt to decimate the opposition
party before the next elections, improve his prospects in the Republican
primary for U.S. Senate and divert attention from his own legal
challenges.

Here’s why Paxton is coming after me, our organization, our volunteers and
ultimately the voters of the state of Texas.

I run Powered by People, one of the largest voter registration
organizations in the country. Over the last six years, our volunteers have
helped register hundreds of thousands of Texas voters. This is no small
thing. Texas is the toughest state in the nation for people to join the
rolls. There is no online voter registration, no automatic voter
registration and no same-day voter registration here. And the laws
surrounding the few available means of getting registered are onerous and
confusing.

Our in-person, volunteer-driven registration program has worked to
overcome these challenges, and our focus on young voters has proven
particularly effective. In 2024, the young Texans we helped register voted
at a rate of 79%. The national average for this demographic is 42%.

One of our great volunteers Aimee, working with first-time voters in
Houston.

Our volunteers have also done important work outside of elections and
politics.

During the pandemic, for example, when demand at food pantries was high
and the availability of traditional, older, volunteers was low, Powered by
People volunteers took on more than 17,000 shift hours at food banks
across the state and donated more than $200,000 to their operations. We
provided a critical stop gap for our fellow Texans, regardless of party or
any other difference between us.

[4]Powered by People volunteers at the El Paso food bank in 2020.Powered
by People volunteers at the El Paso food bank in 2020.

The next year, during the 2021 Texas power grid failure, our volunteers
made more than a million phone calls to senior citizens across the state
to connect them with warming centers, clean drinking water, food and
transportation. We also raised more than $1.4 million and donated every
penny of it to local programs throughout the affected parts of Texas to
provide shelter, water and assistance to people and communities who bore
the brunt of this man-made disaster.

[5]Grant from Beto O’Rourke’s group will help DeSoto pay for temporary
housing for seniors displaced by winter storm

While Senator Ted Cruz was at the Ritz Carlton in Cancun, while energy
pipeline companies were making billions in obscene and illegal price
gouging profits, while the governor and those in power were hapless and
impotent, our volunteers once again stepped up to help those in need.

In addition to our work registering people to vote and helping them in
both natural and man-made disasters, we have also aggressively organized
Texans in the fight for greater voting rights. Our thinking: how are we
going to make things better for one another over the long haul if so many
millions of our fellow citizens are locked out of the political process?
Because Texas is the toughest in the nation in which to vote and register
to vote, it’s critical that we do everything we can to elevate voting
rights to the forefront of the state and national conversation.

[6]Rally for voting rights at the Texas Capitol in Austin, Sunday June 20,
2021

This includes testifying at hearings, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67014?t=1003&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]organizing rallies and protests,
and making the issue central to elections at all levels of government. In
2021 we helped organize support for Democratic Texas lawmakers as they
fought a series of anti-voter election bills being considered by the
Republican majority. Our support included holding rallies at the Capitol,
connecting citizens with opportunities to testify to legislators and
raising more than $600,000 in donations to help Democratic lawmakers as
they used one of their only points of leverage in the minority: breaking
quorum to deprive their Republican colleagues the numbers necessary to
steamroll the legislation through. Though the Democrats eventually
returned and reestablished quorum, the attention they brought to the issue
resulted in some positive changes to these otherwise anti-democratic
voting laws.

[8]Beto O’Rourke group gives $600,000 to Texas House Democrats’ stay in
Washington, D.C.

We faced no legal challenges to any of this work, including supporting the
quorum break in 2021, because we were doing what you’re supposed to do in
a democracy: use our first amendment rights to advocate for the changes we
want to see. We vigorously contested the clear efforts to reduce voting
rights and the political power of our fellow Texans and used legal,
peaceful and democratic means to fight for what we knew to be right.

But when we did the same thing earlier this month – that is, raise money
to support the legal, democratic tactic of a quorum break to oppose
anti-voter legislation – we were met with this blizzard of bizarre charges
from the Attorney General’s office (bribery, criminal contempt, deceptive
trade practices, etc. etc.).

What changed between 2021 and 2025?

Two things.

First, unlike 2021, today Paxton and the larger MAGA movement are
panicking over the prospect that Democrats could win a majority in the
U.S. House of Representatives.

It’s the sole reason that President Donald Trump asked Texas Governor Greg
Abbott to find him these five Congressional seats. He understands that he
and his administration are deeply unpopular and that he is on the path to
a crushing electoral defeat in 2026.

A [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67015?t=1004&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]survey from YouGov and The Economist conducted this month found 47%
of Americans strongly disapprove of Trump (only 23% strongly approve). His
overall approval rating is quickly descending to levels that come close to
matching his numbers prior to the midterm blowout he suffered in 2018.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67028?t=1005&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]On his signature policy issues, he’s doing even worse. A July Gallup
poll found only 38% of Americans approve of his handling of immigration;
37% approve of his economic stewardship; and 29% approve of his oversight
of the federal budget. And a more recent Pew poll shows just [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67029?t=1006&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]32% of
Americans support the tax and spending law that he refers to as the “Big
Beautiful Bill.” It turns out people don’t like the government cutting
Medicaid, transferring hundreds of millions of dollars to the wealthiest
1%, spending billions more on gestapo harassment of their neighbors and
adding nearly $4 trillion to the national debt.

In other words, with numbers like these there is no chance Trump can hold
the narrow majority he has in the House, especially since Democrats only
need to pick up three seats to take the Speaker’s gavel. Unless he can
change the fundamental dynamics of the 2026 election, there will soon be a
check on his lawlessness, accountability for his crimes and corruption and
the very real possibility that we’ll have something close to free and fair
elections in 2028.

And so, through Trump’s henchmen in Texas –Paxton, Gov. Greg Abbott, and
the Republican legislature – he is trying to radically alter the electoral
math in his favor by redrawing five congressional districts, making it
more likely that those Democratically-represented seats will be won by
Republicans in 2026.

That’s what we were fighting by supporting Texas Democrats’ quorum break.
Their courage in leaving the state – which opened them up to threats of
violence, arrest and removal from office – not only focused national
attention on Trump’s attempted power grab in Texas, it also provided the
time and political will for other political leaders to act.

Just look at California. Moved by the injustice of the Texas power grab
and the leadership shown by the Texas Democrats who left the state,
Governor Gavin Newsom is now working to redraw California’s congressional
maps, fighting fire with fire.

This is what Ken Paxton calls “bribery”.

But there’s another reason the Attorney General is weaponizing the full
force of the state’s prosecutorial power against me and Powered by People.

Paxton is running for Senate.

After leading in early polling by as much as 17%, Paxton is now [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67016?t=1007&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]locked
in a dead heat with incumbent Senator John Cornyn for the Republican
primary nomination. ([ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67017?t=1008&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]I also happen to be the highest polling Democrat
who could face him in a potential Senate general election.) He clearly
hopes that this political prosecution of me and Powered by People will
shore up his support and raise money for his campaign and damage a
potential opponent in the general election for U.S. Senate. That explains
the desperate flurry of misleading press releases, media appearances and
Twitter rants about me and these lawsuits.

[14](Note: the Fifteenth Court of Appeals are all conservative justices
appointed by Republican Governor Greg Abbott.)(Note: the Fifteenth Court
of Appeals are all conservative justices appointed by Republican Governor
Greg Abbott.)

Well, maybe there’s a third thing.

Paxton has his very own, very real, legal challenges. He might want
everyone to look the other way.

In 2015, for starters, he was indicted on state securities fraud. He just
settled the case last year, agreeing to pay $300,000 to his victims,
performing 100 hours of community service and taking fifteen hours of
legal ethics education.

Then, in 2020, seven members of Paxton’s staff, including some of his top
aides, called for him to be [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67018?t=1009&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]investigated for corruption “including
improper influence, abuse of office, bribery and other potential criminal
acts.”

That same year, after Joe Biden defeated Trump for President, Paxton filed
the unsuccessful Texas v. Pennsylvania case in an effort to overturn the
election and deny the will of the voters in Pennsylvania, Georgia,
Michigan and Wisconsin. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67019?t=1010&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]The United States Supreme Court was not
impressed with this obsequious attempt to both please Trump and steal a
freely and fairly decided election and refused to hear the case. (As an
additional consequence, the Texas State Bar filed a lawsuit in 2022
alleging Paxton made dishonest representations to the Supreme Court, but
it was eventually dismissed by the Texas Supreme Court.)

It's worth noting that Paxton was also one of the headline speakers at
Trump’s “Stop the Steal” rally on January 6^th 2021, immediately preceding
the attempt to violently steal the previous year’s presidential election.

You’d think he’d slow down after his indictment, rebuke by the Supreme
Court and the Texas Bar, but Paxton has only got one gear: corruption. It
soon became widely known that Paxton was apparently trading favors from
the AG’s office for benefits received from wealthy donors. The allegations
were serious and substantiated to the degree that in 2023 he was impeached
by a vote of 121-23 in the Texas House of Representatives. The articles of
impeachment alleged that Paxton “gave preferential treatment to a
political donor who bribed him, misapplied public resources and made false
statements against whistleblowers, obstructed justice in the securities
fraud trial against him, and made false statements regarding his financial
interests.”

He was acquitted in the Texas Senate but it’s worth noting that he
benefited from a series of unusually corrupt interventions on his behalf.
The presiding judge during his trial, Lieutenant Governor Dan
Patrick, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67020?t=1011&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]took $3 million from a pro-Paxton group in the lead-up to the
deliberations on the impeachment charges. Millions more were spent to
influence other Senators before they voted. The [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67021?t=1012&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]Wall Street
Journal wrote that the “fix was in from the start and that Mr. Patrick
lobbied his fellow GOP Senators to unite against the House articles of
impeachment.”

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67022?t=1013&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN ]Now this summer, we’ve learned that Paxton claimed as his primary
residence three separate houses, allowing him to illegally lock in low
interest rates. These lower rates saved the Paxtons tens of thousands of
dollars in loan payments. Paxton also received an improper homestead tax
break on two of those homes. To be clear, it is both a federal and a state
crime to make false statements on mortgage documents and it is illegal in
Texas to take a homestead tax break on two separate properties.

[20]Ken Paxton Claimed Three Houses as His Primary Residence, Records Show
Interestingly, Paxton’s AG office is tasked with investigating allegations
of mortgage fraud. Also interesting: the Trump administration is
aggressively pursuing mortgage fraud allegations against two of his
political opponents in “far less serious circumstances” (Sen. Adam Schiff
and New York AG Letitia James) and has now used mortgage fraud as the
basis for his attempt to fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook.

This might help explain why Ken Paxton would rather divert public
attention to me and Powered by People through this aggressive, frivolous
and untruthful litigation than address his own very real and successful
efforts to break the law, weaponize the justice system and do the
political bidding of his patron, Donald Trump.

What Powered by People was doing by raising support for the Texas
Democrats in this political fight – holding rallies and town halls, using
social and traditional media to draw attention and persuade people to
participate in the political process, encouraging people to donate to
support the Democrats – is all protected under the First Amendment of the
Constitution. In fact, it is the most hallowed speech of all. Because, if
we are unable to organize politically, if we are unable to freely contest
political decisions, if we are unable to peacefully and democratically vie
for political power, then we don’t live in a democracy at all.

Powered by People and I are political actors involved in a political
contest that will determine the balance of power in the House of
Representatives. There’s nothing more important than this fight at this
moment.

If we lose the fight, if Trump can successfully rig the 2026 election
before the first vote is cast, then I believe the consolidation of
authoritarian power in his hands will be nearly unstoppable. That means
more masked federal agents without badges or warrants sweeping our fellow
Americans off the streets, more of Trump’s political opponents targeted
for vengeance, intimidation and violence, and it means it is far more
likely that a Republican majority Congress will roll out the red carpet
for a Trump third term.

It is because Powered by People and I are fighting so fiercely that Paxton
is trying to silence me, destroy our organization and put me behind bars.
He fears our successful voter registration and turnout programs as well as
our strong support of the Texas Democratic legislators. He fears the power
of people should they be able to freely and fairly vote in future
elections.

At a moment where seemingly every person and institution that has the
power to fight Trump and his authoritarianism is instead bending the knee
– Harvard, Columbia, Paramount/CBS, Paul Weiss, Zuckerberg/Meta,
Bezos/Amazon and Cook/Apple, etc. – they will try to make examples out of
those with the courage of their convictions in order to cow others into
silence and complicity.

Which is all the more reason for us to fight.

And that’s what we’re going to do. Every day, with all we’ve got.

We’ve fought through every one of Paxton’s allegations in court and in the
court of public opinion, sued him in El Paso County and now brought the
fight to the 15th Court of Appeals, where this week we won a stay on
Paxton’s weaponization of the state’s prosecutorial power.

We’ve continued to hold rallies, town hall meetings and registration
drives. This summer, we’ve donated more than a million dollars to the
Texas House Democratic Caucus, the Black Caucus and the Mexican American
Legislative Caucus, and our volunteers are out there right now registering
more young Texans to vote and then staying in touch with them throughout
the next fourteen months to make sure they do.

And if Paxton is successful in draining the remaining resources we use to
run Powered by People through these expensive lawsuits, if he forces us to
close our doors... we’ll open new ones, all across the state, all over the
country.

We will continue the fight by whatever means necessary.

We’ll work with like-minded organizations focused on adding more active
Democratic voters to the rolls; we’ll work with the Democrats in these
newly drawn Texas districts, conceding nothing and even working to pick up
seats currently held by Republicans (they can’t defy the political gravity
of Trump’s sinking polls, especially since they had to lose Republican
voters to create the newly drawn districts); we will take an active role
in the national effort to stop authoritarianism and replace it with a
government of the people that boldly delivers for everyone in this
country.

Ken Paxton wants to make an example out of us, any one of us who dares
defy this authoritarian power grab. So let’s decide that we’ll all be the
example we need right now.

Do not give in. Do not give up. Do not submit, do not bend the knee. Fight
until we win and then keep fighting so that Texas and this country never
face this kind of authoritarianism again.

Thanks for reading,

Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1014&akid=240339%2E444211%2EnxBJDN

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
clean_body: For fighting the [ ]attempt to gerrymander five congressional seats in Texas, I have been accused of bribery by Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. I also face criminal contempt charges related to his bribery accusation. And if that were not enough, Paxton is now trying to shut down the voter registration and voting rights organization I founded. Our Texas-based assets have been frozen, and the AG has gone so far as to indicate that my personal assets could be frozen as well. We’ve racked up over $300,000 in legal fees over the last two weeks, and counting. And, if Paxton’s requests are granted in full, I will be locked up in the Tarrant County jail before long. [3]Texas AG asks judge to arrest Beto O'Rourke for redistricting battle fundraising You might wonder what laws I’ve broken to incur the full legal wrath of the State of Texas. Me too. But, as you’ll see, it turns out that this has nothing to do with the law and everything to do with Paxton’s attempt to decimate the opposition party before the next elections, improve his prospects in the Republican primary for U.S. Senate and divert attention from his own legal challenges. Here’s why Paxton is coming after me, our organization, our volunteers and ultimately the voters of the state of Texas. I run Powered by People, one of the largest voter registration organizations in the country. Over the last six years, our volunteers have helped register hundreds of thousands of Texas voters. This is no small thing. Texas is the toughest state in the nation for people to join the rolls. There is no online voter registration, no automatic voter registration and no same-day voter registration here. And the laws surrounding the few available means of getting registered are onerous and confusing. Our in-person, volunteer-driven registration program has worked to overcome these challenges, and our focus on young voters has proven particularly effective. In 2024, the young Texans we helped register voted at a rate of 79%. The national average for this demographic is 42%. One of our great volunteers Aimee, working with first-time voters in Houston. Our volunteers have also done important work outside of elections and politics. During the pandemic, for example, when demand at food pantries was high and the availability of traditional, older, volunteers was low, Powered by People volunteers took on more than 17,000 shift hours at food banks across the state and donated more than $200,000 to their operations. We provided a critical stop gap for our fellow Texans, regardless of party or any other difference between us. [4]Powered by People volunteers at the El Paso food bank in 2020.Powered by People volunteers at the El Paso food bank in 2020. The next year, during the 2021 Texas power grid failure, our volunteers made more than a million phone calls to senior citizens across the state to connect them with warming centers, clean drinking water, food and transportation. We also raised more than $1.4 million and donated every penny of it to local programs throughout the affected parts of Texas to provide shelter, water and assistance to people and communities who bore the brunt of this man-made disaster. [5]Grant from Beto O’Rourke’s group will help DeSoto pay for temporary housing for seniors displaced by winter storm While Senator Ted Cruz was at the Ritz Carlton in Cancun, while energy pipeline companies were making billions in obscene and illegal price gouging profits, while the governor and those in power were hapless and impotent, our volunteers once again stepped up to help those in need. In addition to our work registering people to vote and helping them in both natural and man-made disasters, we have also aggressively organized Texans in the fight for greater voting rights. Our thinking: how are we going to make things better for one another over the long haul if so many millions of our fellow citizens are locked out of the political process? Because Texas is the toughest in the nation in which to vote and register to vote, it’s critical that we do everything we can to elevate voting rights to the forefront of the state and national conversation. [6]Rally for voting rights at the Texas Capitol in Austin, Sunday June 20, 2021 This includes testifying at hearings, [ ]organizing rallies and protests, and making the issue central to elections at all levels of government. In 2021 we helped organize support for Democratic Texas lawmakers as they fought a series of anti-voter election bills being considered by the Republican majority. Our support included holding rallies at the Capitol, connecting citizens with opportunities to testify to legislators and raising more than $600,000 in donations to help Democratic lawmakers as they used one of their only points of leverage in the minority: breaking quorum to deprive their Republican colleagues the numbers necessary to steamroll the legislation through. Though the Democrats eventually returned and reestablished quorum, the attention they brought to the issue resulted in some positive changes to these otherwise anti-democratic voting laws. [8]Beto O’Rourke group gives $600,000 to Texas House Democrats’ stay in Washington, D.C. We faced no legal challenges to any of this work, including supporting the quorum break in 2021, because we were doing what you’re supposed to do in a democracy: use our first amendment rights to advocate for the changes we want to see. We vigorously contested the clear efforts to reduce voting rights and the political power of our fellow Texans and used legal, peaceful and democratic means to fight for what we knew to be right. But when we did the same thing earlier this month – that is, raise money to support the legal, democratic tactic of a quorum break to oppose anti-voter legislation – we were met with this blizzard of bizarre charges from the Attorney General’s office (bribery, criminal contempt, deceptive trade practices, etc. etc.). What changed between 2021 and 2025? Two things. First, unlike 2021, today Paxton and the larger MAGA movement are panicking over the prospect that Democrats could win a majority in the U.S. House of Representatives. It’s the sole reason that President Donald Trump asked Texas Governor Greg Abbott to find him these five Congressional seats. He understands that he and his administration are deeply unpopular and that he is on the path to a crushing electoral defeat in 2026. A [ ]survey from YouGov and The Economist conducted this month found 47% of Americans strongly disapprove of Trump (only 23% strongly approve). His overall approval rating is quickly descending to levels that come close to matching his numbers prior to the midterm blowout he suffered in 2018. [ ]On his signature policy issues, he’s doing even worse. A July Gallup poll found only 38% of Americans approve of his handling of immigration; 37% approve of his economic stewardship; and 29% approve of his oversight of the federal budget. And a more recent Pew poll shows just [ ]32% of Americans support the tax and spending law that he refers to as the “Big Beautiful Bill.” It turns out people don’t like the government cutting Medicaid, transferring hundreds of millions of dollars to the wealthiest 1%, spending billions more on gestapo harassment of their neighbors and adding nearly $4 trillion to the national debt. In other words, with numbers like these there is no chance Trump can hold the narrow majority he has in the House, especially since Democrats only need to pick up three seats to take the Speaker’s gavel. Unless he can change the fundamental dynamics of the 2026 election, there will soon be a check on his lawlessness, accountability for his crimes and corruption and the very real possibility that we’ll have something close to free and fair elections in 2028. And so, through Trump’s henchmen in Texas –Paxton, Gov. Greg Abbott, and the Republican legislature – he is trying to radically alter the electoral math in his favor by redrawing five congressional districts, making it more likely that those Democratically-represented seats will be won by Republicans in 2026. That’s what we were fighting by supporting Texas Democrats’ quorum break. Their courage in leaving the state – which opened them up to threats of violence, arrest and removal from office – not only focused national attention on Trump’s attempted power grab in Texas, it also provided the time and political will for other political leaders to act. Just look at California. Moved by the injustice of the Texas power grab and the leadership shown by the Texas Democrats who left the state, Governor Gavin Newsom is now working to redraw California’s congressional maps, fighting fire with fire. This is what Ken Paxton calls “bribery”. But there’s another reason the Attorney General is weaponizing the full force of the state’s prosecutorial power against me and Powered by People. Paxton is running for Senate. After leading in early polling by as much as 17%, Paxton is now [ ]locked in a dead heat with incumbent Senator John Cornyn for the Republican primary nomination. ([ ]I also happen to be the highest polling Democrat who could face him in a potential Senate general election.) He clearly hopes that this political prosecution of me and Powered by People will shore up his support and raise money for his campaign and damage a potential opponent in the general election for U.S. Senate. That explains the desperate flurry of misleading press releases, media appearances and Twitter rants about me and these lawsuits. Note: the Fifteenth Court of Appeals are all conservative justices appointed by Republican Governor Greg Abbott.(Note: the Fifteenth Court of Appeals are all conservative justices appointed by Republican Governor Greg Abbott.) name: Valerie Foushee
subject: It all started in a classroom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress

Can I tell you about my journey to Congress?

Peter, my journey to Congress has been somewhat _unconventional._ As I reflect on the windy path that has led me here, I can pinpoint a period when my husband and I were both working full-time. My boys were young, so when I got off the night shift at the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7am, I would go straight to their classrooms to volunteer. I couldn’t help but notice the students, especially Black and brown kids, were being underserved. **So, I did everything I could as a volunteer to ensure no student was left behind — but I knew I had to run for School Board to make a lasting difference.** On the School Board, I fought tooth and nail for better funding for our schools. But eventually, **I knew I had to run for Orange County Commissioner to make critical changes.** As Orange County Commissioner, I championed the construction of two schools, two senior centers, and affordable housing initiatives — **but, eventually, I knew the next step to securing long-term progress for our children’s and communities’ future was running for State House.** **All these twists and turns culminated in me representing my home district in Congress, Peter.** I got into this line of work in pursuit of building a better life for my community and followed my heart throughout every single step. **[Now I’m running for re-election because there’s still SO much more I can do. If you’re with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love — will you chip in $10 or more before tomorrow’s end of month fundraising deadline to help defend my seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114319656/566632952/1675519574?amount=10&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_082925_EOM04_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjI4NDJjNS1kYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JOESNLS9wJRM-3YJoJkENvrXWaLWDx9v0h_XM1ZdWx0=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Can I tell you about my journey to Congress? If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, my journey to Congress has been somewhat unconventional. As I reflect on the windy path that has led me here, I can pinpoint a period when my husband and I were both working full-time. My boys were young, so when I got off the night shift at the Chapel Hill Police Department at 7am, I would go straight to their classrooms to volunteer. I couldn’t help but notice the students, especially Black and brown kids, were being underserved. So, I did everything I could as a volunteer to ensure no student was left behind — but I knew I had to run for School Board to make a lasting difference. On the School Board, I fought tooth and nail for better funding for our schools. But eventually, I knew I had to run for Orange County Commissioner to make critical changes. As Orange County Commissioner, I championed the construction of two schools, two senior centers, and affordable housing initiatives — but, eventually, I knew the next step to securing long-term progress for our children’s and communities’ future was running for State House. All these twists and turns culminated in me representing my home district in Congress, Peter. I got into this line of work in pursuit of building a better life for my community and followed my heart throughout every single step. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m so grateful to have you alongside me on this journey, Peter. — Valerie * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. | | Hi Friend, I’ll be honest: end-of-month goals aren’t just numbers on a spreadsheet. They’re about whether we can keep building a campaign that reflects the kind of politics our communities deserve. **I’ve never believed in politics powered by the wealthy few. Progress is built when everyday people come together — when we put our time, our voices, and yes, our dollars behind leaders who are rooted in justice and community.** That’s how we’ve already made history. And it’s how we’ll keep going: by refusing to accept the status quo and by investing in a future where health care is a right, housing is accessible, and every family can thrive. They’re about whether we can keep building a campaign that reflects the kind of politics our communities deserve. I’ve never believed in politics powered by the wealthy few. name: Team Mazie
subject: We know what a GOP Senate looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
We’ve seen what a GOP Senate looks like, Peter. It’s been a disaster for working families. Republicans started by confirming every one of Donald Trump’s extreme and unqualified cabinet nominees — people like Robert F. Kennedy Jr., who has fired thousands of experts working to protect public health, and Pete Hegseth, who has leaked sensitive military information on not one but two separate occasions. Then, they let billionaire Elon Musk raid federal agencies and fire thousands of federal employees to fund tax breaks for himself and the ultra-wealthy. And we can’t forget about the GOP’s Big, Ugly Bill — which betrayed working families by slashing health care and food assistance for the people that need it most just to deliver a massive tax cut to billionaires. **[Republicans are perfectly fine with leaving working families out to dry as long as they can help billionaires, so it’s time for them to go. ---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Adam Schiff
Date: Tuesday, August 26, 2025
Subject: For our democracy. Our Constitution. Our futures.

Derek,

I want to take a moment to thank you.

Through every challenge, every headline, and every attack thrown my way
(of which there are many), you have stood unwaveringly with me.

I never take your support and confidence for granted.

And while the attacks on our work to uphold the values we share keep
mounting, I’m motivated by your continued support and willingness to fight
back alongside me.

For the sake of our democracy. Our Constitution. Our futures.

Derek, Donald
Trump and his allies will continue to come after me, and anyone else who
stands up to him. They hope that their persistent attacks will silence and
intimidate others from holding his corrupt regime accountable.

But I’m not backing down. I never have, and I never will.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=q32025_abs_em.YYaWHs&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20250830_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1011&akid=8952%2E5257348%2EsYciUD ]I’m so grateful for your support, but as these partisan attacks grow
bolder, I need to know you have my back once more. I have an end-of-month
fundraising deadline in a few days, and it would mean a lot to earn your
support. Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can to help us reach our
crucial goal before the deadline?

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114319848/566633880/1527952032?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODEyN2I5ZTktZGI4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pxvh7z8bP0GRgVp_2WtyP-ddiWtt5rmBEyp7fXEPI04=)
I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I couldn’t stop thinking about this key fact in our race.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114319852/566633884/1527952032?refcode=em-8.30.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODEyN2I5ZTktZGI4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pxvh7z8bP0GRgVp_2WtyP-ddiWtt5rmBEyp7fXEPI04=)
Just three seats (out of 435!) separate control of the House. I know you’ve heard it a lot from me (and certainly other political candidates) – but the future of our nation depends on the outcome.

**Here’s something other political candidates _can’t_ say: The majority could come down to this seat.**

CA-45 is one of the only races already ranked as a pure toss-up by experts. I flipped this seat by 653 votes, and you can bet it will come down to the wire again.

Republicans are rallying their base _right now_ to expand their majority and give Trump a free pass to continue decimating our democracy. They’ve already gutted health care funding and SNAP in exchange for tax relief for literal billionaires.

I’m fighting back as best as I can, but without control of the House, there’s a limit to what we as Democrats can do to stop it. It’s why we need to protect this seat, flip the House, and provide real accountability.

**[So before you get back to your holiday weekend, I’m asking you to chip in $3 to keep me in Congress. It’s no exaggeration to say it could all come down to this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114319855/566633888/1527952032?refcode=em-8.30.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODEyN2I5ZTktZGI4NS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pxvh7z8bP0GRgVp_2WtyP-ddiWtt5rmBEyp7fXEPI04=)**

clean_body: | = I’m sorry to reach out over the weekend, but I couldn’t stop thinking about this key fact in our race. = Just three seats (out of 435!) separate control of the House. I know you’ve heard it a lot from me (and certainly other political candidates) – but the future of our nation depends on the outcome. Here’s something other political candidates can’t say: The majority could come down to this seat. CA-45 is one of the only races already ranked as a pure toss-up by experts. I flipped this seat by 653 votes, and you can bet it will come down to the wire again. Republicans are rallying their base right now to expand their majority and give Trump a free pass to continue decimating our democracy. They’ve already gutted health care funding and SNAP in exchange for tax relief for literal billionaires. I’m fighting back as best as I can, but without control of the House, there’s a limit to what we as Democrats can do to stop it. It’s why we need to protect this seat, flip the House, and provide real accountability. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. **This should come as no surprise, but Donald Trump is engaging the power of his office to execute a MASSIVE cover-up of the Epstein files. So Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to hold him accountable.**
That’s why we filed a subpoena for ALL Epstein files, unredacted, to be released all at once.

The American people deserve truth, transparency, and accountability from their elected leaders. And that’s what Democrats are fighting for from this administration each and every day.
**[But we need your help to keep this up – because we know that Trump will do whatever it takes to distract from this. name: Tobias Read
subject: Oregon won’t back down
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250830em-eom1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250830em-eom1]
BREAKING FROM MSNBC:
Trump wants to end voting by mail.
Oregon won't give it up easily.
Hi, it's Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
President Trump is at it again — and this time, he’s coming straight for Oregon’s democracy.
He’s threatening an executive order to end vote-by-mail before the midterms.
Let me be crystal clear: that is unconstitutional, it is reckless, and it is an attack on every Oregonian who has made their voice heard through our secure, proven system for more than 25 years.
Oregon’s vote-by-mail elections are a national model. Fraud is virtually nonexistent. Participation is among the highest in the country. Democrats, Republicans, and independents alike rely on it. President Trump knows all of this — and he still wants to rip it away. Why? Because he’s trying to avoid accountability in next year’s elections. .
Well, I have news for him: Oregon will not back down.
We are prepared to challenge President Trump every step of the way. In the courts, in the public square, and anywhere else he tries to undermine our democracy. But to mount that fight, I need your help.
We've set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of August to defend Oregon from Trump's assault. Can you pitch in to help us defend Oregon's elections? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250830em-eom1]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250827em-msnbc-FR]
This is bigger than one state. If Trump gets away with dismantling Oregon’s vote-by-mail system, it sets a dangerous precedent for the entire country. That’s why our defense has to be fierce, and it must start now.
Together, we’ll protect Oregon’s democracy — and show Donald Trump that no executive order can silence the people.
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. You can read my op-ed here [https://www.msnbc.com/opinion/msnbc-opinion/trump-vote-mail-executive-order-oregon-rcna226337] , and please share it with your friends and networks >>

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My 2¢
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter:
When you serve in the military you become a part of something bigger than yourself.
That sounds patriotic and everything, but how it really manifests is you having a different view of the stuff the military does than civilians do.
I served in combat, yeah. But I also lived on base. I had to do a lot of hurry up and wait. I had to keep my hair in regs, keep my dress uniform pressed and ready. So, when I see these Guard troops deployed to DC, or Marines to LA, I see it a little different than you might.
More than anything, you can see that these troops don’t want to be there. Trump’s paying $1 million a day for trained soldiers to pick up trash and rake mulch. They’ve been away from their jobs and families for weeks, and there’s no end in sight.
Instead of keeping our country safe, Trump’s using them to set up a police state aimed at repressing the American people. None of them signed up to do that.
It won’t stop here, either. We’re talking about the guy who sent a mob to the Capitol on January 6th.
It’s time to get serious about next year's elections, and what we’re going to do to make sure they go off free and fair — and that we kick all of Trump’s MAGA goons the hell out of Congress.
That’s what I’m doing: spending my weekends and free time working with candidates, traveling the country, showing up where I’m needed to make sure we win.
I never stopped working after we won last November. It’d mean a lot to have your support.
[**Please, help me continue the fight. Make a donation. Our average contribution is about $14, but anything you can give helps. clean_body: Peter: When you serve in the military you become a part of something bigger than yourself. That sounds patriotic and everything, but how it really manifests is you having a different view of the stuff the military does than civilians do. I served in combat, yeah. But I also lived on base. I had to do a lot of hurry up and wait. I had to keep my hair in regs, keep my dress uniform pressed and ready. So, when I see these Guard troops deployed to DC, or Marines to LA, I see it a little different than you might. More than anything, you can see that these troops don’t want to be there. Trump’s paying $1 million a day for trained soldiers to pick up trash and rake mulch. They’ve been away from their jobs and families for weeks, and there’s no end in sight. Instead of keeping our country safe, Trump’s using them to set up a police state aimed at repressing the American people. None of them signed up to do that. It won’t stop here, either. We’re talking about the guy who sent a mob to the Capitol on January 6th. It’s time to get serious about next year's elections, and what we’re going to do to make sure they go off free and fair — and that we kick all of Trump’s MAGA goons the hell out of Congress. That’s what I’m doing: spending my weekends and free time working with candidates, traveling the country, showing up where I’m needed to make sure we win. I never stopped working after we won last November. It’d mean a lot to have your support. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

If you’re anything like me, your fight-or-flight response has probably been in overdrive for nearly a year now. It feels like Donald Trump and his allies in Congress are getting more and more extreme by the day, making it scary to think about what our country will look like one year, two years, or ten years down the road.
Frankly, with the way things are heading, it can be terrifying to think about the future right now. And at a moment like this, that’s perfectly natural.
**But what really matters is how we _respond_ to that fight-or-flight feeling. Whether we choose to run away in fear — or fight for our future.**
I choose to fight. And I hope you will too.
I’m fighting for a future where everyone has a shot at success, not just the wealthy and well-connected.
A future where every Kansan has the ability to live their lives free from discrimination.
A future where corrupt politicians are held accountable, not celebrated.
And I know you want that future too. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in this fight.
[_**If you’re feeling exhausted, enraged, or terrified by politics right now, this campaign is for you. Please, will you chip in right away to help us reach our goal, defend KS-03, and fight like hell for that brighter future?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114320595/566636350/212706120?refcode=email_083025_EOM3&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmZmN2I2NS1kZjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MuWCl3v_RXwAIKgpAEqPaOOoplb_bjDkUrYZF0k0xAc=)

Did you see Rev. Warnock's email, friend?
---
**We're following up because time is running out before tomorrow's end-of-month deadline, and we're on track to fall just short of our goal.**
We know the GOP's wealthy megadonors are gearing up to spend BIG to protect Trump's Senate majority. That means we're relying on grassroots support to fight back, protect every Democratic seat, and retake the majority. **But we can't close this gap without your help, so please:**
**[Will you donate $5 or more now to help us reach our end-of-month goal, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's Project 2025 agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114320733/566636894/994461346?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5590-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzczZDdjYS1lMDg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIihqXcSrzaLpCpIpe_Z9TfsS60uUp1LIJEwM9jS85E=)**
Thank you,
Team Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Raphael Warnock**
Subject: Chaos
| | |
---
_Chaos._

That's what folks have been facing ever since Donald Trump and the GOP came back into power, friend.
They have ripped health care away from millions. After promising to lower everyday prices, they have done nothing but make things _more_ expensive. And now that it's clear their agenda is deeply unpopular, they're working to rig our congressional maps so they can steal your vote and silence your voice.
It’s the honor of my life to fight for you in the Senate, and I’m doing everything I possibly can to hold the line against Donald Trump and his allies in Washington. But to truly put a stop to their dangerous agenda, we must take back the Senate – and we can't do that unless we protect every Democratic seat and make crucial investments right here, _today._
**That's why I've set an ambitious goal ahead of Sunday's end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I'm counting on your help to reach it.[So please, if you're with me in this fight, will you donate $5 or more now to help Democrats take back the Senate and put a stop to Trump's Project 2025 agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114320734/566636895/-1698202107?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5590-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzczZDdjYS1lMDg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gIihqXcSrzaLpCpIpe_Z9TfsS60uUp1LIJEwM9jS85E=)**

body:
Republicans have one of the slimmest majorities in history and Democrats need three more seats to take back the House.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114320921/566637550/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-08-30_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Mzk4YzY1NC1lMjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxessh7ZOLa7hf8eWuHAh2rpiMDI_jYLmOxWn3gEpPk=)

| The road to the House majority runs right through Michigan.

Republicans have one of the slimmest majorities in history and Democrats need three more seats to take back the House.

[_**There are three competitive seats right here in Michigan that we can flip in 2026. Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**

---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**

---

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: Let's get this done and save democracy
body:
|
#
Peter, here are three things you need to know about the state of our race to flip CA-40 and the House majority blue:
* **California is on the frontlines of the fight to stop Republicans from rigging the midterm elections.** I plan on finishing what we started, taking back control of the House. I am more committed than ever to that mission, because the American Dream is on the line.

* **My opponent Young Kim is a rubber stamp for the Trump White House.** She is betraying our communities, and I got in this race to put an end to the MAGA agenda and give working families the support they need in Congress.

* **I am the only candidate in this race who has stood up to MAGA bullies.** On the school board, I was targeted by far-right extremists who tried to break into my house, harassed me online, and threatened me with violence – it did not stop me then, and it will not stop me now.

**[Our end-of-month fundraising deadline expires tomorrow, and my finance team tells me we need a surge of support – 200 donations strong – to meet our goal. clean_body: | Peter, here are three things you need to know about the state of our race to flip CA-40 and the House majority blue: California is on the frontlines of the fight to stop Republicans from rigging the midterm elections. I plan on finishing what we started, taking back control of the House. I am more committed than ever to that mission, because the American Dream is on the line. My opponent Young Kim is a rubber stamp for the Trump White House. She is betraying our communities, and I got in this race to put an end to the MAGA agenda and give working families the support they need in Congress. I am the only candidate in this race who has stood up to MAGA bullies. On the school board, I was targeted by far-right extremists who tried to break into my house, harassed me online, and threatened me with violence – it did not stop me then, and it will not stop me now. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Christina | Christina Gagnier is a community leader, small business owner, former school board member, and privacy advocate defending Orange County and Inland Empire families. name: Steve Scalise
subject: I’d NEVER question your loyalty. You can count on that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
FIRSTLY: I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve don

I can’t stand when folks send you these emails, shaming you for “not doing enough.”
I hate that some pretend to be President Trump just to get your attention.
It drives me mad that some don’t even bother to thank you for your generosity.
I’ll never do that to you.
This is Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I get these messages too. And I completely understand how frustrating it is to get emails and texts from people you've never heard of, asking for your money, and some even questioning your loyalty.
**FIRSTLY: I want to personally thank you for everything you’ve done to help elect President Trump and Republicans all over the country. Without you, I don’t know where we’d be. You’re the lifeblood of the MAGA movement.**
SECONDLY: I’m humbly asking you to read the rest of this email and hear me out.
I'm deep in the trenches working to defeat the Democrat Machine, fighting with every fiber of my being to make the MAGA agenda into law and carve the Trump-DOGE cuts into stone. I’m ALSO doing everything I can to keep our RAZOR-THIN House Majority intact for ALL FOUR YEARS of President Trump’s term.
[But I can’t do it on my own.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
The Democrat Machine is scrambling the jets to unseat vulnerable Conservatives, seize control of the House, and jam up President Trump’s ENTIRE legislative agenda.
House Democrats are already unloading their $66 MILLION warchest into enough battleground districts to flip the House. They’re already weighing a new plot to hijack Republican seats. And they’re already dragging President Trump and his Administration to court.
They’re putting up a fierce fight. But we can still win IF AND ONLY IF we stick together.
[So – ONLY if you can afford it – please consider chipping in a few more bucks to help me out. It would mean the world to me personally and would make a HUGE difference in this fight.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Especially right now...
Our FINAL August deadline is bearing down on us and there is ZERO margin for error. The Democrat Machine is outraising and outworking us, and if we fail to hit this goal... We’ll lose EVERYTHING we’ve fought so hard for.
I hate to ask but would you please pitch in a few bucks?[ONLY IF YOU CAN: PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS HERE
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)If you can't, no worries at all. Take care of your family first – that's what matters most.
Either way, thank you for being part of this movement and for standing up for what you believe in, even when it's tough.
[I'm honored to be fighting alongside you.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
God bless you, – Steve
STEVE SCALISEHouse Majority Leader[ONLY IF YOU CAN: PITCH IN A FEW BUCKS HERE
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_ \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they’ll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!
**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/b41L/?__vbtrk=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE0Njc5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)|
---
|
---

---
Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network.

Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

320 First Street SE
