DOJ has escalated their attacks in Maine , with suppressive former Trump lawyer, now Assistant Attorney General Harmeet Dhillon demanding an electronic copy of the voter registration list that “ must contain all fields, including the registrant’s full name, date of birth, residential address, his or her state driver’s license number or the last four digits of the registrant’s social security number ” from December 1, 2023, through July 1, 2025.Folks, the U.S. Constitution entrusts the states, not the president or his agencies, to run elections. There's no legal basis for the DOJ to demand such sensitive and personally identifying information. It's yet another overreach by a president fueled by lies and taken by sycophants who are more loyal to his every whim than the rule of law they swore an oath to uphold. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. name: L.t. Gen. Michael Flynn
subject: Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality
body:
A multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump| | |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,**Did Barack Obama commit treason when he launched a multi-front campaign to destroy Donald Trump, his allies, and cripple his incoming Administration?** My answer is “Yes” because I was personally and professionally destroyed by them.Barack Obama along with Hillary Clinton, Susan Rice, James Comey, and other power-hungry radicals concocted this scheme from inside the White House.But the real conspiracy wasn’t just behind closed doors.Everyone was in on it – especially and most dangerously the mainstream media. I’m talking about 24/7 hit pieces. The never-ending barrage of mysterious leaks. Their conspiracy was made possible by collaborators inside the FBI like James Comey and the House Intelligence Committee like Adam Schiff who lied to your face that they had evidence to “get” Trump.This is why I’ve partnered with my friends at the American Media Council to make sure we can reshape the media landscape before the next hoax can destroy our country. **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting their critical mission.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ec432fb4873402c8d6ce78fed7d2f2a&_e=VJrfOwtGYuqIDBaZjXG5y6hBu0ifhu43NJxnuErgH1y6s0QfEVHxptecjHtVydT7Fbqr4UQoj-atLTNjVLLynNhxHayvuJfmEdTp3AMka9DIjYyT06hzUMQV1SKpkeTg-ov1FjNPSWgZ5A6RchgGw7ACyipiPAF0O15zVjOdD6-20v69Ri1uWVujxlSsaurRDv-LKncXPbiuFeXarFewI8RZybTvSiPbZjEsGvlc3D1tpunvn7YxE_y_JStjhOGHc-9Y94M7tZG7vqfsR7Nv_46dTQG6lWCgtjp3aNby5cwWQflBb3NOlZdlkYEdJVNJcvHCthjlFfwIPqPduHcT4PG13w4WhbM6KlQgSwtkz0_kaHdCy7M4ZiFKGkte2qLlJr3RMf5Dwi4oOap6WZ-R-rd1D4S3GGYwmZpu2Rdn3W5KS67yE9ttxzIRPqK1EDhs6aZOPg2BqIeKQroCBY-XfYL8dBtJANn_aXQdZ77EY03D5jIg3rqBgD_EczMoZuyxbQwcaDXBsl9hYxdzMSaebBzq4UvC_FwHyV4fQ0i-D0OO6nA6inLmmj_oq9t3_Buri-j6DQid9HLgUwhfPlq51TL77AO_breEdSr_NexeLADYK5pUuBoNPx2u-YEqGyuejKvwaUScsEGe6bPRtSMs1aY0Ji0dkMOH1bjS3wBeLlZpA38OyBI6Xx5hR6GWZgdWbD-kcx03vrbnqjD8XBOmcXFmQOFeT4JNfaNYD5Ukw_43ebDqj7INN0LmvMozjZV_k-Sk01Lil2nHJ_lJ47V4uFy2OCXdDdSsXTL3Mw4yJ2A%3D)** It’s a mission I care deeply about because I was the target of the Fake News’ lies.Here’s the truth: Obama and Hillary didn’t have a lick of evidence when they cooked up this hoax. Here’s the _disturbing_ truth: they didn’t need any.They could make up whatever they wanted to and feed it to the mainstream media monster. That’s exactly what they did.Let me explain:
---
1. They planted fake evidence in the mainstream media.

2. The mainstream media ran them as if they were fact.

3. The mainstream media's coverage was cited as proof the fake evidence was real.

---
It was terrible circular logic built on a mountain of lies.**But it worked.** It worked because the liberal media drilled it into the minds of millions of Americans that President Trump was some kind of traitor.The whole time, these Trump-hating journalists celebrated their role in making this hoax a reality. The Washington Post even won a Pulitzer Prize over it!The level to which the liberal media went to justify this insanity was insane itself.That’s why today I’m honored to partner with a group who’s fighting to stop another hoax like this from destroying our country.The American Media Council understands what’s really going on:**The power-hungry radicals in Washington who have weaponized our government have also weaponized the mainstream media.** Their mission is to restore truth in the media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They’re the reason I’m able to write you this. What I deeply respect about the American Media Council is that they aren’t sitting back and watching it happen. They’re on the frontlines trying to make a difference.
---
* They publish the facts behind top media hoaxes.
* They hold journalists accountable with their “Truth in Journalism” Pledge.
* They give out “Trustworthy Ratings” to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust.

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Six words for my sweet mom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
No one in this world will ever love you more than your mom.

How could they? Your mom knew you nine months before anyone else did. And great moms never relinquish that lead.

My mom, Vicky Jo Swalwell, born in 1956 in South Dakota, passed away on August 27, 2025, in Houston, Texas, surrounded by her family.

My mom grew up in California and graduated from San Ramon Valley High School. She’d soon meet my dad, Eric Nelson Swalwell, a local police officer. He was smart enough to marry her, and soon after, the newlyweds returned to her Midwestern roots. In Iowa, they built their careers on work—and a family on love.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP43/1/90727/images/swalwell-and-mom.jpg]

Together, my mom and dad raised four rambunctious sons—Eric, Joshua, Jacob, and Chase. All four of us would marvel daily at her breathless work ethic. She baked wedding cakes, made ceramics, and ran an arts and crafts store. She provided local daycare and led the local Little League and soccer organizations—all while keeping her household overflowing with love, laughter, and a great lasagna recipe.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP43/1/90727/images/Parents%20and%20brother.jpg]

She embodied the saying, “If you want something done, ask a busy person.” No one was busier. And no one got more stuff done.

“Why is there a referee in the stands?” That’s what I thought at one of my youth soccer matches when I looked over. But then I realized that the referee was my mom. To help support the dreams of her boys, she’d referee soccer matches in between our own. But that was my mom. Always working. Always looking out for her kids.

And free time? Forget it. Ask any mom with four boys and multiple jobs what they do with their “free time.” I hope all they do is laugh. Which is what my mom did.

When her sons grew older, she returned to professional work, first as a bookkeeper for Longs Drugs. Mid-career, she joined Chevron, where she worked for nearly 20 years as a beloved administrative assistant for their Reliability and Integrity team. In 2022, her job brought her to Houston, where she also benefited from the care of the heroes at the MD Anderson Cancer Center.

She found joy in the simple: walking, gardening, and traveling. But nothing brought her more joy than organizing her annual “Nana Camp” for her beloved grandchildren. Because nothing made her happier than time with them.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP43/1/90727/images/Swalwell-Mom-And-Son.jpg]

She knew one day her heart would stop, but that those memories would beat on in theirs. To Madex, Nolan, Dallas, Carson, Nelson, Cricket, and Hank, she’ll always be alive as long as you keep those images alive.

Throughout her life, my mom adored and supported the love of her life, my dad. They traveled across the country together. They treasured visits with their growing family and built a marriage of enduring love that spanned more than four decades.

Her legacy is one of strength. Devotion. Boundless generosity.

Let her life be the hope we all have about our own lives: that the splash of it will be memorable, but the ripples are even more so.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP43/1/90727/images/Swalwells-Bidens.jpg]

They say that the six worst words you’ll hear in life are, “I’m sorry. Your mom has died.”

I can’t believe I will never be able to talk to her again. But if she could hear me now, I’d say these six:

“Thank you, thank you, thank you.”

I love you, Mom,

Eric
Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. If you'd still like to stop receiving emails, you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/sSRynqGvEUuAD1QP3hBpsA2?unsubscribedata=iN75EHSQ74frmhvjiUw7gpGG%2Ffip4ziQCnJDI%2BrHaTubaScqoJ%2FpeFbk7l8UKM9Al2NkEH2kOr5BtqE6X0LP8BjGzZRWDFIcKSO7qnCRwDpIss6xjOMbx9rv2J17hV3z4aRDlyBSQZOSj3UM6LgVFy45c3Hul1Gtf7GQjteBZk9tN%2BCXo%2B1KbHG8ujd3keWPByy3ydN0kCgY7JTdXWGeWNev%2BaHxi%2BIICjfz2Jh20eV5PjHynRZuv%2FMe5kWzz2omt%2FrrGuUCbrG%2Bx9qb5MzRJuNMM1Qt9Mv7UntHfMIx3VTtEkQXCp4VP9kw9n8MRCSSHTkFrjWdz%2FQx4vWts3J9tAvMxvinJ8OGgEu8NnSRsVQ1HWUx6T0zmhRbRVCwjd8Q%2FbxImLRQEA0Hh75f%2FY%2FNokztFGen4Z8ibXLvyTd6qRA%3D

subject: Trump’s tariffs are hurting us

Peter,

Everywhere I go in Rhode Island, I hear the same thing: people are being squeezed. Wages aren’t keeping up, and prices at the checkout line are through the roof.

A nearly 39% spike in vegetable prices is unacceptable. Trump’s tariffs are nothing but an unnecessary tax on working people.

I’m in this fight because the middle class deserves a break — not another bill to pay. But we can’t win this fight alone. Our deadline is just hours away, and Republicans are counting on us falling short. Let’s prove them wrong.

[Can you chip in $10 right now to help us hit our goal and keep fighting for working people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322015/566641188/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250830_FR_EOM_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWZmNTk4MS1lNjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnIFaFURRgqACrfAqgFOUIsze1KWgIAElv6DnqsGY2A=) | | [RUSH YOUR DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322017/566641192/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250830_FR_EOM_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWZmNTk4MS1lNjg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnIFaFURRgqACrfAqgFOUIsze1KWgIAElv6DnqsGY2A=)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Your name at our campaign HQ
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
We’re going to be adding the names of everyone who pitches in to this email to our grassroots donor wall.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)
I have some exciting news:
**We recently opened the doors to our official campaign headquarters in Albuquerque!** This isn’t just a place to make phone calls or plan rallies — it’s where our movement will come together to build a better future for families across New Mexico.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250829_2_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250830-4110&refcode2=4110_400544_nVdB1D&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)
And right in the heart of our office is our **Grassroots Donor Wall** , a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people, _not_ billionaires and political insiders. I want your name on that wall!
**We’re going to be adding the names of _everyone_ who pitches in to this email before tomorrow's deadline to our donor wall, no matter how big or small your donation is. [Can I count on you to pitch in so we can put your name up there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250829_2_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250830-4110&refcode2=4110_400544_nVdB1D&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250829_2_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250830-4110&refcode2=4110_400544_nVdB1D&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)**
Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member will see it and know that _you_ helped make this movement possible.
With Donald Trump and his billionaire allies already trying to buy this election, the fight ahead will be tough. But when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: a **people-powered campaign** that reaches every corner of New Mexico.
I’ve seen what we can accomplish when everyday people come together. So let’s get to it!
**[If you can, please make a contribution of $5 or any amount before our deadline at midnight tomorrow so we can get your name on the Grassroots Donor Wall.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250829_2_office?amount=5&refcode=em20250830-4110&refcode2=4110_400544_nVdB1D&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250829-2&t=2&refcode2=4110_400544_nVdB1D&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=4110%2E400544%2EnVdB1D)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322171/566641748/823540626?refcode=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWEyMDVlNy1lNzg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xOF3h3Geudbpa8_RSpuN0gOB89syyDwp60-mfBG-CU=&emci=b1ef8ef5-9483-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
**Together, we can move mountains for this country, Peter.** We’ve had to do it right here in North Carolina — we spent _years_ working to get Medicaid Expansion, and we finally got Republicans to the table and got it passed. It wasn’t easy. We’ve had to fight like hell for every step forward we’ve taken. But I’m conscious of the fact that there is much more that needs to be done to protect the rights of Americans and provide a better path for the future when some politicians are set on dragging us back. Extreme Republicans have banned abortion in states across the country, endangered our public education system, and rolled back critical legislation combating climate change. They even slashed funding for Medicaid and SNAP just to give tax breaks to the richest. **This is wrong, Peter, but I still believe that we can change things.** I believe that every elected leader must do the hard work of creating safety, prosperity, and opportunity for all Americans, and that if we do, America can still be a place where dreams are fulfilled. **[Everything is possible when we do it together. Will you help me now? Please — pitch in any amount before our August fundraising deadline tomorrow so we can meet our goal and get to work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322173/566641749/-1743631236?refcode=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWEyMDVlNy1lNzg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xOF3h3Geudbpa8_RSpuN0gOB89syyDwp60-mfBG-CU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322176/566641752/-1743631236?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.69a205e7-e785-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWEyMDVlNy1lNzg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2xOF3h3Geudbpa8_RSpuN0gOB89syyDwp60-mfBG-CU=)

name: Kashia Jensen
subject: I’m directly asking
body:
| | Peter – All you need to know about our new opponent is that he’s everything Marie is not. He’s a career politician who has a reputation for rigging the rules against working families.

Tomorrow night is our first deadline since he jumped in the race, so we *must* show that we have what it takes to defend Marie and go toe-to-toe with his big-money backers.

**This may be the hardest race Marie has faced yet – she needs you now more than she’s ever needed you before.**

_Marie is one of us. She’s a mom. A small business owner. A Southwest Washingtonian who has already proven she will fight for our community in Congress._

[It’s time to bear down and prepare for the fight ahead. Please, donate any amount before midnight tomorrow – we’re still short of our goal. name: Team Moore
subject: One day left ⏳
body:
Governor Moore’s name has been in the news a lot this month.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=537%2E1086043%2E08thTy)
Governor Moore’s name has been in the news a lot this month. 📰
While the press spent a _lot_ of time covering President Trump’s attacks, the results Governor Moore has been driving in Maryland deserve more attention:
🧑🏭 **Work:** The Moore-Miller Administration invested millions to expand our workforce, helping thousands of Marylanders gain skills for good-paying jobs.
💵 **Wages:** We cut taxes for middle-class families and raised the minimum wage, so paychecks go further and families can thrive.
🏠 **Wealth:** Our team is breaking down barriers to opportunity. So, whether you live in Baltimore, Cumberland, or the Eastern Shore, every Marylander has a fair shot at building a bright future.
This is what leadership looks like. And, it’s only possible because our movement is powered by grassroots supporters like you, Peter.
**But, with only one day left before our end-of-month deadline, we are still $2,734 short of our fundraising goal.**
**[Can you chip in $5 to help us finish August strong and keep Wes and Aruna delivering for Maryland? **[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250830-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250830-2&refcode2=537_1086043_08thTy&akid=537%2E1086043%2E08thTy)** With gratitude, Team Moore

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Five reasons why your support today would make a big impact on our grassroots movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Your support fuels all of this important work.
#
Peter — we know your inbox is probably flooded with campaigns and organizations like ours emailing you about our big end-of-month deadline on Sunday. **So today, we’re sharing five reasons why your support makes a big impact:**
1. **We’re dedicated to helping real working people run for office.** Too often, the people who can best represent our communities are discouraged simply because they don’t have the network or resources. We’re working to flip the script.

2. **We’re committed to supporting strong candidates up and down the ballot.** In red states, purple states, and blue states — it has never been more important to elect leaders who will defend our freedoms at every level.

3. **Corporate PACs and billionaire insiders have corrupted our politics.** Look no further than Elon Musk and his shady Super PAC, which has already spent hundreds of millions of dollars to influence elections up and down the ballot.

4. **Grassroots movements are one of the most effective tools to fight back.** That’s what we’re building together — a people-powered movement to take on the corporate elites, billionaires, and corrupt politicians actively working to strip away our rights.

5. **Your support fuels all this important work.** Whether it’s making a donation today or simply supporting the candidates we email you about when you can, you are playing an instrumental role in our movement to take back power for working people.

**[So Peter, now that you know more about what our movement is fighting for, will you consider making a donation of $10 or more before our end-of-month fundraising deadline tomorrow?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94357?refcode=em20250830-9354&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9354%2E614464%2ESEcGZ-)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322360/566642291/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzZkYWNkYi1lOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxV3svkoruYZONNNHGXgNMLaO1i4MrMTHfD2zuo51U=&emci=c3ad3f17-dc84-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=176dacdb-e985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

We just checked our numbers, and things are looking up! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114322361/566642292/-1487867385?refcode=em25_250830_thermo_fndd_gq_act___sft_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250830_thermo_fndd_gq_act___sft_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=176dacdb-e985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=176dacdb-e985-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzZkYWNkYi1lOTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxV3svkoruYZONNNHGXgNMLaO1i4MrMTHfD2zuo51U=) Thanks to folks like you, we are so close to hitting our end-of-month fundraising goal for August. _But here’s the catch:_ We only have 24 hours left before the deadline hits, and we're counting on one huge push from this grassroots team to ensure we get there.

name: John Hart, Open the Books
subject: Washington Is Afraid of This Email
body:
META TAG (title): TheFederalistWire.com

@media (max-width:520px){.mobile_hide{display:none;}.row-content{width:100%!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}META TAG (title): @media (max-width:520px){.mobile_hide{display:none;}.row-content{width:100%!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Friend, You may not know us yet, but Open the Books is the watchdog that just exposed HHS's reckless spending spree on aid for migrants. Now, we’re turning our focus to a crisis in YOUR town, one that’s bankrupting our schools, empowering radical ideologues, and putting all our children’s education at risk. The Department of Education is a bloated $800 billion bureaucracy. But instead of using that money to improve student outcomes, it props up layers of red tape, bankrolls progressive activism, and punishes excellence in favor of ideology. The whole department is not about education anymore, it’s about indoctrination. Help Expose and Defund the Dept. Of “Education”Here’s Why It Matters to You:
• Classrooms Are Starving: While teachers plead for basic resources, billions are siphoned into consulting firms and “equity” schemes.• Politics Replaces Learning: Federal grants are funding agendas. Not phonics, history, or critical thinking.• Bigotry Hides Behind Buzzwords: Programs branded “inclusive” often shield antisemitism instead of combating it. They’re counting on you to stay silent. We’re counting on you to fight back.Here’s How We Take Action:
• We’ve built the largest private database of federal spending in America. • We file thousands of Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests to expose where your money goes.• We sue the agencies that refuse to come clean.• We SHUT THEM DOWN We’ve gone up against the biggest names in Washington and WON. Now, we’re going head-to-head with the Department of Education. Help Expose and Defund the Dept. Of “Education”Together with Open the Books your first gift can strike a critical blow. A tax-deductible contribution of $25, $50, or $100 will:
• Reveal DEI-driven grants draining classroom budgets • Expose funding that enables antisemitism on college campuses• Power lawsuits that demand transparency and dismantle corruption Help Expose and Defund the Dept. Trump is thin-skinned. He bullies people who stand up for what's right, who have the strength of character that he lacks. **And I have to assume that's why the President has set his sights on Abigail Spanberger.**

* * *
We’re sorry to be so direct, but this deadline is critical. **If you need to hear more before committing a donation to re-elect John, here are FIVE reasons why we’re asking for your $5 today:**
1) **John is pushing back against the chaos in Washington every way he can.** He’s fighting tooth and nail to safeguard Colorado’s public lands, push back against Trump’s inflationary tariff-taxes, and defend Coloradans’ access to affordable health care.
2) **Colorado is key to rebuilding our Senate majority.** If we lose John’s seat, Democrats will have **zero path** to taking back the Senate in 2026.
3) **National Republicans see Colorado as a prime pickup opportunity in the Senate.** If they sense any weakness in John’s campaign, they won’t hesitate to flood the state with outside money to replace him with a rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda.
4) **John refuses to accept a single cent of corporate PAC money** because as Colorado’s Senator, he’s accountable to YOU, _not special interests trying to buy his vote._

name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Checking in with Matt Cartwright
body:
Back in Business

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/096df3a52db9/checking-in-with-matt-cartwright?e=632a01d7cd)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
# Checking in with Matt Cartwright

As I served 12 years in the United States Congress, one of the best things about the job was that I was in a position to help a lot of people in our area. We helped thousands of people sort out problems with the government or get access to programs. For all of us, helping the people of our area was a joy.
I intend to continue helping.
Before congress, I served for 25 years as a courtroom lawyer, most of it with the Munley Law firm in northeastern Pennsylvania. I worked hard at learning the craft of the courtroom. I tried dozens of jury cases.
It’s a difficult skill set to master, and not many people have the tenacity to stay with it. The truth is, my first outings in court were a real struggle! But under the guidance of the late Robert W. Munley, I did stick with it, and I made myself a master in the courtroom.
I ended up winning, a lot. At that time, success for a trial lawyer was to get a 7-figure jury verdict. I got four of them, plus many settlements of that size. Standing up to giant wrongdoers and speaking truth for their victims: it was a passion I never lost.
This week, the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania granted my petition to return to the active practice of law, after my 12-year absence.
I will keep you posted on what I’m working on. In the meantime, let me know if I can lend a hand to you or someone you love.
Be safe and well,
Matt

---

name: Thank you, Stephen Colbert! (via VPP)
subject: Re: Stephen Colbert’s show ENDING >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
This marks the end of an incredible and honorable era.
| **This is __exactly__ what Trump had in mind when he went after CBS:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=6&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL) _Trump is attacking any voice that holds him accountable and speaks truth to his MAGA lies!_

That’s why he’s absolutely thrilled that Stephen Colbert’s late night program has been cancelled. **He said he “absolutely loves” that Colbert got fired — _we’re APPALLED!_**

[**To thank Stephen Colbert for his decade of hard work in the face of escalating MAGA attacks, we’re sending him a letter tomorrow at 9am promptly. Rush $3 to add your name before we hit send »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=7&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=8&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL)
---
TO: Stephen Colbert
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. Dear Stephen Colbert,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the last 10 years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

While Fox News and other far-right outlets spew misinformation and conspiracy theories, you have been a constant, outstanding voice for our democracy.

**We know this is exactly the outcome that Trump and his MAGA cronies wished for — _and we are committed to fighting back tirelessly to protect the free press._**

While I’m going to miss seeing you on TV every night, I’m glad you’ll finally be getting the much-needed rest and recuperation you deserve.

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to VPP to thank you for your years of service and to join VPP in the fight against Trump’s attacks on the free press. It is _absolutely critical_ that we elect good Democrats who will stand with your progressive values and honor your legacy, and we are so sad to see you go. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=9&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=10&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL) | [**CHIP IN $3 TO SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93507?t=11&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21073%2E878179%2EJhstYL).**

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I’m running for U.S. Senate – here's why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=704%2E49239%2EJzaGIp)

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5553?t=2&akid=704%2E49239%2EJzaGIp)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5554?t=3&akid=704%2E49239%2EJzaGIp)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5554?t=4&akid=704%2E49239%2EJzaGIp)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is already being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need****your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan. [ _Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5554?t=5&akid=704%2E49239%2EJzaGIp)**

**[I'll tell you more in a moment, but before I do, will you share your answers real quick? >>](http://go.dscc.org/go/21931?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21074%2E9716520%2Ec5Cde2)**

If I've learned anything in politics, it's that getting a head start isn't just important -- it's _crucial._ Victories only happen when we start well _before_ the elections. **And that means today.**

But we also need the right kind of head start. That's why **_not everybody's getting this email._** It's only going to top Democrats with a proven track record of making a difference in our country. **This is your chance to shape our vital 2026 Senate strategy, and believe me, it'll be very hard to get it right without your help.**

Today's survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **I don't have your response on file yet! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now: [www.dscc.org/DemStrategyInterview/#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/21931?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21074%2E9716520%2Ec5Cde2) **

**[START YOUR INTERVIEW](http://go.dscc.org/go/21931?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250830-Pat-PatDailyStrategyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=21074%2E9716520%2Ec5Cde2)**

This is why we’re building the next generation of progressives.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250830-2&t=1&akid=2603%2E587540%2EbTmc-r)
Peter,
Donald Trump is openly talking about sending troops into cities like Chicago, just like he’s already done in our nation’s capital.
He’s openly floating the idea of being a “dictator” if it means cracking down on crime.
And too many people are treating it like normal politics.
_This is what we’re up against._
The authoritarian movement isn’t just about Trump — it’s about an entire party backing inhumane immigration enforcement, voter suppression, book bans, forced birth, and state violence. And they are dead serious about holding onto power.
**That’s why we’re building the next generation of bold progressives — the kind of leaders who don’t back down, who organize in their communities, and who will never cozy up to fascists just to win reelection.**
But we can’t do it without resources. **_We’re $6,300 short of where we need to be today._** And with the August 31 deadline looming, every hour counts.
**[If you believe in building power outside of the DC establishment — if you believe in resistance that actually wins — chip in $5 or anything you can right now.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250830_2_eom?refcode=em20250830-2603&amount=5&refcode2=2603_587540_bTmc-r&akid=2603%2E587540%2EbTmc-r)**

name: Team In This Together PAC
subject: No fluff. Just real talk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Andy has a winning playbook, and we need to help him share it.

Peter,

Gov. Andy Beshear has been on the road, supporting candidates who are stepping up to fight for their communities in Kentucky and across the country.

He’s been sharing the same playbook that powered his own race: Show people what drives you and why you make decisions. Talk to people and not at them, and meet them where they are. No buzzwords or jargon or academic language. _**Just plain, honest communication that actually connects with real people.**_

The truth is that folks don’t want politicians who sound like they walked out of a think tank. They want leaders who see them, who know what they’re going through, who know that groceries cost too much, that wages don’t stretch as far as they used to, and when healthcare bills pile up.

That’s what Andy did in his race, and it's why he won in deep red Kentucky three times as a Democrat. And it’s exactly why we know that Democrats can win anywhere. From Kentucky to red and purple states and districts across the map, Andy is working to help good candidates cut through the noise, and win.

But here’s the thing: This work doesn’t pay for itself. Andy’s PAC, In This Together, only reaches as far as our resources allow. If we want more candidates speaking the language of everyday people — _and winning because of it_ — **we’ve got to keep fueling this work.**

**[Ahead of our end-of August fundraising deadline, can Andy count on you to chip in $5 to help him elect real, honest leaders at every body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em-welcome-bn&t=1&akid=501%2E294397%2EvURIj0)
It’s official: **Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court.**
[**Before we say more, can you pitch in $10 to fuel this campaign? We’re counting on grassroots support to win.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_welcome?amount=10&refcode=em-welcome-bn&refcode2=501_294397_vURIj0&akid=501%2E294397%2EvURIj0)
Chris has spent her entire career fighting for our freedoms. As a lawyer, public servant, and now as a judge, she’s never backed down from a tough fight.
**Now, Chris is stepping up once again — because our rights, our democracy, and our courts are under attack.**
If we’re going to compete with the right-wing money machine, we need a massive show of grassroots strength.
During the last Wisconsin Supreme Court election, right-wing special interests, including Elon Musk, spent over **_$54 million_** trying to buy a seat on our Supreme Court.
If they get involved again, we need to be ready for anything they throw at us. That’s why we’re asking:

subject: Help Katie Porter grow her lead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40093%2E3422442%2ErmiYuj)
Peter,
Katie Porter is leading the California governor’s race—but our Republican opponents are close behind.
That’s why we launched the **Frontrunner Fund** : a goal of raising $15,000 over email before the end of the month to help Katie Porter grow her lead. **[Can you chip in $5 before midnight tomorrow?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250830_2_ak?refcode=em20250830-40093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40093_3422442_rmiYuj&akid=40093%2E3422442%2ErmiYuj)**

Here’s the truth: polls show Katie is the clear Democratic frontrunner, but the two closest candidates are both Republicans. If we don’t consolidate support around Katie, Democrats risk being shut out of the general election altogether. _We can’t give Republicans an opening to flip California red._
And then there’s the billionaire in this race. He’s already poured more than $1 million into ads, with plenty more to come. Katie doesn’t have a personal fortune to fall back on—she’s counting on grassroots support to stop her opponents from buying this election.
To keep our frontrunner status and elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor, we all need to pull together. Katie’s always counted on Porter Supporters, and now she’s asking again:

Breaking via CNN:
“Trump’s new warnings about mail-in voting are the most sinister yet”

This is alarming.

name: M. Kelly (personal)
subject: Sorry to bother you, but this will only take 5 seconds
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark.
I know it's Labor Day weekend, and I hope you don’t mind me reaching out a little later than normal. We’ve just got an important deadline tomorrow, and I’m trying to keep an eye on progress towards our goal.
Right now, we’ve got a way to go. But if we all do our part, if a ton of people chip in, I think we can hit our goal by midnight on Sunday.
Can I count on you? Please, use this link and donate: [**https://act.markkelly.com/go/8-30-25**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug25/.JGniHS&refcode=em250830-2-700k&t=1&akid=6170%2E6688874%2E8njOqH)
Thanks very much.
MK

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6170%2E6688874%2E8njOqH).

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324483/566649538/1866411932?refcode=250830_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MGJjOS1mYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVS8nLFjCuNH6evLPI6y9EJZH2ztBX7FD2LRzWRl1u8=)
---
Friends, The cruelty and callousness from this Administration as they seek to round up thousands of people a day for deportation is gross and un-American. They're targeting hardworking families, longtime residents, and even Veterans. That’s why I stood up to them when they detained someone in Massachusetts earlier this year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324484/566649539/2005830277?refcode=250830_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MGJjOS1mYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVS8nLFjCuNH6evLPI6y9EJZH2ztBX7FD2LRzWRl1u8=) When I heard that an ICE processing facility in my own district was being used to detain people in inappropriate conditions for days on end, I went to see it for myself. And what I saw was completely inappropriate – inhumane for long-term detention. I went on the record with my concerns, yet instead of simply acknowledging the truth, ICE got defensive. This administration needs aggressive oversight by Congress, but the Republican majority isn’t going to let that happen. **We need to win again, but I need your help. My criticisms have made me a target.** I need your support to keep fighting for accountability and transparency in Washington. [**Can you chip in $5—or whatever you can—to support this fight and help elevate my message?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324485/566649540/2005830277?refcode=250830_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MGJjOS1mYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVS8nLFjCuNH6evLPI6y9EJZH2ztBX7FD2LRzWRl1u8=) _I will not back down in the fight against ICE._ Thank you for standing with me today. We won’t let the Trump administration intimidate those who speak the truth. Thank you,
Seth [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114324486/566649541/1866411932?refcode=250830_Seth_MFC_ICE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZDk3MGJjOS1mYTg1LWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVS8nLFjCuNH6evLPI6y9EJZH2ztBX7FD2LRzWRl1u8=)
